o de eipen o theos tōn paterōn ēmōn proecheirisato se gnōnai to thelēma autou kai idein ton dikaion kai akousai phōnēn ek tou stomatos autou
oti esē martus autō pros pantas anthrōpous ōn eōrakas kai ēkousas
kai nun ti melleis anastas baptisai kai apolousai tas amartias sou epikalesamenos to onoma autou
egeneto de moi upostrepsanti eis ierousalēm kai proseuchomenou mou en tō ierō genesthai me en ekstasei
kai idon auton legonta moi speuson kai exelthe en tachei ex ierousalēm dioti ou paradexontai sou marturian peri emou
kagō eipon kurie autoi epistantai oti egō ēmēn phulakizōn kai derōn kata tas sunagōgas tous pisteuontas epi se
kai ote exechunneto to aima stephanou tou marturos sou kai autos ēmēn ephestōs kai suneudokōn kai phulassōn ta imatia tōn anairountōn auton
kai eipen pros me poreuou oti egō eis ethnē makran exapostelō se
ēkouon de autou achri toutou tou logou kai epēran tēn phōnēn autōn legontes aire apo tēs gēs ton toiouton ou gar kathēken auton zēn
kraugazontōn de autōn kai riptountōn ta imatia kai koniorton ballontōn eis ton aera
ekeleusen o chiliarchos eisagesthai auton eis tēn parembolēn eipas mastixin anetazesthai auton ina epignō di ēn aitian outōs epephōnoun autō
ōs de proeteinan auton tois imasin eipen pros ton estōta ekatontarchon o paulos ei anthrōpon rōmaion kai akatakriton exestin umin mastizein
akousas de o ekatontarchēs proselthōn tō chiliarchō apēngeilen legōn ti melleis poiein o gar anthrōpos outos rōmaios estin
proselthōn de o chiliarchos eipen autō lege moi su rōmaios ei o de ephē nai
apekrithē de o chiliarchos egō pollou kephalaiou tēn politeian tautēn ektēsamēn o de paulos ephē egō de kai gegennēmai
eutheōs oun apestēsan ap autou oi mellontes auton anetazein kai o chiliarchos de ephobēthē epignous oti rōmaios estin kai oti auton ēn dedekōs
tē de epaurion boulomenos gnōnai to asphales to ti katēgoreitai upo tōn ioudaiōn elusen auton kai ekeleusen sunelthein tous archiereis kai pan to sunedrion kai katagagōn ton paulon estēsen eis autous
atenisas de tō sunedriō o paulos eipen andres adelphoi egō pasē suneidēsei agathē pepoliteumai tō theō achri tautēs tēs ēmeras
o de archiereus ananias epetaxen tois parestōsin autō tuptein autou to stoma
tote o paulos pros auton eipen tuptein se mellei o theos toiche kekoniamene kai su kathē krinōn me kata ton nomon kai paranomōn keleueis me tuptesthai
oi de parestōtes eipan ton archierea tou theou loidoreis
ephē te o paulos ouk ēdein adelphoi oti estin archiereus gegraptai gar oti archonta tou laou sou ouk ereis kakōs
gnous de o paulos oti to en meros estin saddoukaiōn to de eteron pharisaiōn ekrazen en tō sunedriō andres adelphoi egō pharisaios eimi uios pharisaiōn peri elpidos kai anastaseōs nekrōn egō krinomai
touto de autou lalēsantos egeneto stasis tōn pharisaiōn kai saddoukaiōn kai eschisthē to plēthos
saddoukaioi men gar legousin mē einai anastasin mēte angelon mēte pneuma pharisaioi de omologousin ta amphotera
egeneto de kraugē megalē kai anastantes tines tōn grammateōn tou merous tōn pharisaiōn diemachonto legontes ouden kakon euriskomen en tō anthrōpō toutō ei de pneuma elalēsen autō ē angelos
pollēs de ginomenēs staseōs phobētheis o chiliarchos mē diaspasthē o paulos up autōn ekeleusen to strateuma kataban arpasai auton ek mesou autōn agein te eis tēn parembolēn
tē de epiousē nukti epistas autō o kurios eipen tharsei ōs gar diemarturō ta peri emou eis ierousalēm outō se dei kai eis rōmēn marturēsai
genomenēs de ēmeras poiēsantes sustrophēn oi ioudaioi anethematisan eautous legontes mēte phagein mēte piein eōs ou apokteinōsin ton paulon
ēsan de pleious tesserakonta oi tautēn tēn sunōmosian poiēsamenoi
oitines proselthontes tois archiereusin kai tois presbuterois eipan anathemati anethematisamen eautous mēdenos geusasthai eōs ou apokteinōmen ton paulon

nun oun umeis emphanisate tō chiliarchō sun tō sunedriō opōs katagagē auton eis umas ōs mellontas diaginōskein akribesteron ta peri autou ēmeis de pro tou engisai auton etoimoi esmen tou anelein auton
akousas de o uios tēs adelphēs paulou tēn enedran paragenomenos kai eiselthōn eis tēn parembolēn apēngeilen tō paulō
proskalesamenos de o paulos ena tōn ekatontarchōn ephē ton neanian touton apage pros ton chiliarchon echei gar ti apangeilai autō
o men oun paralabōn auton ēgagen pros ton chiliarchon kai phēsin o desmios paulos proskalesamenos me ērōtēsen touton ton neaniskon agagein pros se echonta ti lalēsai soi
epilabomenos de tēs cheiros autou o chiliarchos kai anachōrēsas kat idian epunthaneto ti estin o echeis apangeilai moi
eipen de oti oi ioudaioi sunethento tou erōtēsai se opōs aurion ton paulon katagagēs eis to sunedrion ōs mellōn ti akribesteron punthanesthai peri autou

su oun mē peisthēs autois enedreuousin gar auton ex autōn andres pleious tesserakonta oitines anethematisan eautous mēte phagein mēte piein eōs ou anelōsin auton kai nun eisin etoimoi prosdechomenoi tēn apo sou epangelian
o men oun chiliarchos apeluse ton neaniskon parangeilas mēdeni eklalēsai oti tauta enephanisas pros eme
kai proskalesamenos tinas duo tōn ekatontarchōn eipen etoimasate stratiōtas diakosious opōs poreuthōsin eōs kaisarias kai ippeis ebdomēkonta kai dexiolabous diakosious apo tritēs ōras tēs nuktos
ktēnē te parastēsai ina epibibasantes ton paulon diasōsōsi pros phēlika ton ēgemona
grapsas epistolēn echousan ton tupon touton
meta de pente ēmeras katebē o archiereus ananias meta presbuterōn tinōn kai rētoros tertullou tinos oitines enephanisan tō ēgemoni kata tou paulou
klēthentos de autou ērxato katēgorein o tertullos legōn
pollēs eirēnēs tunchanontes dia sou kai diorthōmatōn ginomenōn tō ethnei toutō dia tēs sēs pronoias pantē te kai pantachou apodechometha kratiste phēlix meta pasēs eucharistias
ina de mē epi pleion se enkoptō parakalō akousai se ēmōn suntomōs tē sē epieikeia
eurontes gar ton andra touton loimon kai kinounta staseis pasin tois ioudaiois tois kata tēn oikoumenēn prōtostatēn te tēs tōn nazōraiōn aireseōs
os kai to ieron epeirasen bebēlōsai on kai ekratēsamen
par ou dunēsē autos anakrinas peri pantōn toutōn epignōnai ōn ēmeis katēgoroumen autou
sunepethento de kai oi ioudaioi phaskontes tauta outōs echein
apekrithē te o paulos neusantos autō tou ēgemonos legein ek pollōn etōn onta se kritēn tō ethnei toutō epistamenos euthumōs ta peri emautou apologoumai
dunamenou sou epignōnai oti ou pleious eisin moi ēmerai dōdeka aph ēs anebēn proskunēsōn eis ierousalēm
kai oute en tō ierō euron me pros tina dialegomenon ē epistasin poiounta ochlou oute en tais sunagōgais oute kata tēn polin
oude parastēsai dunantai soi peri ōn nuni katēgorousin mou
omologō de touto soi oti kata tēn odon ēn legousin airesin outōs latreuō tō patrōō theō pisteuōn pasi tois kata ton nomon kai tois en tois prophētais gegrammenois
elpida echōn pros ton theon ēn kai autoi outoi prosdechontai anastasin mellein esesthai dikaiōn te kai adikōn
en toutō kai autos askō aproskopon suneidēsin echein pros ton theon kai tous anthrōpous diapantos
di etōn de pleionōn eleēmosunas poiēsōn eis to ethnos mou paregenomēn kai prosphoras
en ais euron me ēgnismenon en tō ierō ou meta ochlou oude meta thorubou tines de apo tēs asias ioudaioi
ous edei epi sou pareinai kai katēgorein ei ti echoien pros eme
ē autoi outoi eipatōsan ti euron adikēma stantos mou epi tou sunedriou
ē peri mias tautēs phōnēs ēs ekekraxa en autois estōs oti peri anastaseōs nekrōn egō krinomai sēmeron eph umōn
anebaleto de autous o phēlix akribesteron eidōs ta peri tēs odou eipas otan lusias o chiliarchos katabē diagnōsomai ta kath umas
phēstos oun epibas tē eparcheiō meta treis ēmeras anebē eis ierosoluma apo kaisarias
enephanisan te autō oi archiereis kai oi prōtoi tōn ioudaiōn kata tou paulou kai parekaloun auton
aitoumenoi charin kat autou opōs metapempsētai auton eis ierousalēm enedran poiountes anelein auton kata tēn odon
o men oun phēstos apekrithē tēreisthai ton paulon eis kaisarian eauton de mellein en tachei ekporeuesthai
oi oun en umin phēsin dunatoi sunkatabantes ei ti estin en tō andri atopon katēgoreitōsan autou
diatripsas de en autois ēmeras ou pleious oktō ē deka katabas eis kaisarian tē epaurion kathisas epi tou bēmatos ekeleusen ton paulon achthēnai
paragenomenou de autou periestēsan auton oi apo ierosolumōn katabebēkotes ioudaioi polla kai barea aitiōmata katapherontes a ouk ischuon apodeixai
tou paulou apologoumenou oti oute eis ton nomon tōn ioudaiōn oute eis to ieron oute eis kaisara ti ēmarton
o phēstos de thelōn tois ioudaiois charin katathesthai apokritheis tō paulō eipen theleis eis ierosoluma anabas ekei peri toutōn krithēnai ep emou
eipen de o paulos estōs epi tou bēmatos kaisaros eimi ou me dei krinesthai ioudaious ouden ēdikēka ōs kai su kallion epiginōskeis
ei men oun adikō kai axion thanatou pepracha ti ou paraitoumai to apothanein ei de ouden estin ōn outoi katēgorousin mou oudeis me dunatai autois charisasthai kaisara epikaloumai
tote o phēstos sunlalēsas meta tou sumbouliou apekrithē kaisara epikeklēsai epi kaisara poreusē
ēmerōn de diagenomenōn tinōn agrippas o basileus kai bernikē katēntēsan eis kaisarian aspasamenoi ton phēston
ōs de pleious ēmeras dietribon ekei o phēstos tō basilei anetheto ta kata ton paulon legōn anēr tis estin kataleleimmenos upo phēlikos desmios
peri ou genomenou mou eis ierosoluma enephanisan oi archiereis kai oi presbuteroi tōn ioudaiōn aitoumenoi kat autou katadikēn
pros ous apekrithēn oti ouk estin ethos rōmaiois charizesthai tina anthrōpon prin ē o katēgoroumenos kata prosōpon echoi tous katēgorous topon te apologias laboi peri tou enklēmatos
sunelthontōn oun autōn enthade anabolēn mēdemian poiēsamenos tē exēs kathisas epi tou bēmatos ekeleusa achthēnai ton andra
peri ou stathentes oi katēgoroi oudemian aitian epheron ōn egō upenooun ponēran
zētēmata de tina peri tēs idias deisidaimonias eichon pros auton kai peri tinos iēsou tethnēkotos on ephasken o paulos zēn
agrippas de pros ton paulon ephē epitrepetai soi peri seautou legein tote o paulos ekteinas tēn cheira apelogeito
peri pantōn ōn enkaloumai upo ioudaiōn basileu agrippa ēgēmai emauton makarion epi sou mellōn sēmeron apologeisthai
malista gnōstēn se onta pantōn tōn kata ioudaious ethōn te kai zētēmatōn dio deomai makrothumōs akousai mou
tēn men oun biōsin mou tēn ek neotētos tēn ap archēs genomenēn en tō ethnei mou en te ierosolumois isasi pantes oi ioudaioi
proginōskontes me anōthen ean thelōsin marturein oti kata tēn akribestatēn airesin tēs ēmeteras thrēskias ezēsa pharisaios
kai nun ep elpidi tēs eis tous pateras ēmōn epangelias genomenēs upo tou theou estēka krinomenos
eis ēn to dōdekaphulon ēmōn en ekteneia nukta kai ēmeran latreuon elpizei katantēsai peri ēs elpidos enkaloumai upo ioudaiōn basileu
ti apiston krinetai par umin ei o theos nekrous egeirei
egō men oun edoxa emautō pros to onoma iēsou tou nazōraiou dein polla enantia praxai
o kai epoiēsa en ierosolumois kai pollous te tōn agiōn egō en phulakais katekleisa tēn para tōn archiereōn exousian labōn anairoumenōn te autōn katēnenka psēphon
kai kata pasas tas sunagōgas pollakis timōrōn autous ēnankazon blasphēmein perissōs te emmainomenos autois ediōkon eōs kai eis tas exō poleis
en ois poreuomenos eis tēn damaskon met exousias kai epitropēs tēs tōn archiereōn
ēmeras mesēs kata tēn odon eidon basileu ouranothen uper tēn lamprotēta tou ēliou perilampsan me phōs kai tous sun emoi poreuomenous
pantōn te katapesontōn ēmōn eis tēn gēn ēkousa phōnēn legousan pros me tē ebraidi dialektō saoul saoul ti me diōkeis sklēron soi pros kentra laktizein
egō de eipa tis ei kurie o de kurios eipen egō eimi iēsous on su diōkeis
alla anastēthi kai stēthi epi tous podas sou eis touto gar ōphthēn soi procheirisasthai se upēretēn kai martura ōn te eides ōn te ophthēsomai soi
exairoumenos se ek tou laou kai ek tōn ethnōn eis ous egō apostellō se
anoixai ophthalmous autōn tou epistrepsai apo skotous eis phōs kai tēs exousias tou satana epi ton theon tou labein autous aphesin amartiōn kai klēron en tois ēgiasmenois pistei tē eis eme
othen basileu agrippa ouk egenomēn apeithēs tē ouraniō optasia
ōs de ekrithē tou apoplein ēmas eis tēn italian paredidoun ton te paulon kai tinas eterous desmōtas ekatontarchē onomati iouliō speirēs sebastēs
epibantes de ploiō adramuttēnō mellonti plein eis tous kata tēn asian topous anēchthēmen ontos sun ēmin aristarchou makedonos thessalonikeōs
tē te etera katēchthēmen eis sidōna philanthrōpōs te o ioulios tō paulō chrēsamenos epetrepsen pros tous philous poreuthenti epimeleias tuchein
kakeithen anachthentes upepleusamen tēn kupron dia to tous anemous einai enantious
to te pelagos to kata tēn kilikian kai pamphulian diapleusantes katēlthamen eis murra tēs lukias
kakei eurōn o ekatontarchēs ploion alexandrinon pleon eis tēn italian enebibasen ēmas eis auto
en ikanais de ēmerais braduploountes kai molis genomenoi kata tēn knidon mē proseōntos ēmas tou anemou upepleusamen tēn krētēn kata salmōnēn
molis te paralegomenoi autēn ēlthomen eis topon tina kaloumenon kalous limenas ō engus polis ēn lasaia
ikanou de chronou diagenomenou kai ontos ēdē episphalous tou ploos dia to kai tēn nēsteian ēdē parelēluthenai parēnei o paulos
legōn autois andres theōrō oti meta ubreōs kai pollēs zēmias ou monon tou phortiou kai tou ploiou alla kai tōn psuchōn ēmōn mellein esesthai ton ploun
o de ekatontarchēs tō kubernētē kai tō nauklērō mallon epeitheto ē tois upo paulou legomenois

aneuthetou de tou limenos uparchontos pros paracheimasian oi pleiones ethento boulēn anachthēnai ekeithen eipōs dunainto katantēsantes eis phoinika paracheimasai limena tēs krētēs bleponta kata liba kai kata chōron
upopneusantos de notou doxantes tēs protheseōs kekratēkenai arantes asson parelegonto tēn krētēn
met ou polu de ebalen kat autēs anemos tuphōnikos o kaloumenos eurakulōn
sunarpasthentos de tou ploiou kai mē dunamenou antophthalmein tō anemō epidontes epherometha
nēsion de ti upodramontes kaloumenon klauda ischusamen molis perikrateis genesthai tēs skaphēs
ēn arantes boētheiais echrōnto upozōnnuntes to ploion phoboumenoi te mē eis tēn surtin ekpesōsin chalasantes to skeuos outōs epheronto
sphodrōs de cheimazomenōn ēmōn tē exēs ekbolēn epoiounto
kai tē tritē autocheires tēn skeuēn tou ploiou eripsan
mēte de ēliou mēte astrōn epiphainontōn epi pleionas ēmeras cheimōnos te ouk oligou epikeimenou loipon periēreito elpis pasa tou sōzesthai ēmas
pollēs te asitias uparchousēs tote statheis o paulos en mesō autōn eipen edei men ō andres peitharchēsantas moi mē anagesthai apo tēs krētēs kerdēsai te tēn ubrin tautēn kai tēn zēmian
kai ta nun parainō umas euthumein apobolē gar psuchēs oudemia estai ex umōn plēn tou ploiou
parestē gar moi tautē tē nukti tou theou ou eimi egō ō kai latreuō angelos
legōn mē phobou paule kaisari se dei parastēnai kai idou kecharistai soi o theos pantas tous pleontas meta sou
dio euthumeite andres pisteuō gar tō theō oti outōs estai kath on tropon lelalētai moi
eis nēson de tina dei ēmas ekpesein
kai diasōthentes tote epegnōmen oti melitē ē nēsos kaleitai
oi te barbaroi pareichan ou tēn tuchousan philanthrōpian ēmin apsantes gar puran proselabonto pantas ēmas dia ton ueton ton ephestōta kai dia to psuchos
sustrepsantos de tou paulou phruganōn ti plēthos kai epithentos epi tēn puran echidna apo tēs thermēs exelthousa kathēpsen tēs cheiros autou
ōs de eidon oi barbaroi kremamenon to thērion ek tēs cheiros autou pros allēlous elegon pantōs phoneus estin o anthrōpos outos on diasōthenta ek tēs thalassēs ē dikē zēn ouk eiasen
o men oun apotinaxas to thērion eis to pur epathen ouden kakon
oi de prosedokōn auton mellein pimprasthai ē katapiptein aphnō nekron epi polu de autōn prosdokōntōn kai theōrountōn mēden atopon eis auton ginomenon metaballomenoi elegon auton einai theon
en de tois peri ton topon ekeinon upērchen chōria tō prōtō tēs nēsou onomati popliō os anadexamenos ēmas treis ēmeras philophronōs exenisen
egeneto de ton patera tou popliou puretois kai dusenteriō sunechomenon katakeisthai pros on o paulos eiselthōn kai proseuxamenos epitheis tas cheiras autō iasato auton
toutou de genomenou kai oi loipoi oi en tē nēsō echontes astheneias prosērchonto kai etherapeuonto
oi kai pollais timais etimēsan ēmas kai anagomenois epethento ta pros tas chreias
meta de treis mēnas anēchthēmen en ploiō parakecheimakoti en tē nēsō alexandrinō parasēmō dioskourois
kai katachthentes eis surakousas epemeinamen ēmeras treis
othen perielthontes katēntēsamen eis rēgion kai meta mian ēmeran epigenomenou notou deuteraioi ēlthomen eis potiolous
ou eurontes adelphous pareklēthēmen par autois epimeinai ēmeras epta kai outōs eis tēn rōmēn ēlthamen
kakeithen oi adelphoi akousantes ta peri ēmōn ēlthan eis apantēsin ēmin achri appiou phorou kai triōn tabernōn ous idōn o paulos eucharistēsas tō theō elabe tharsos
ote de eisēlthomen eis tēn rōmēn epetrapē tō paulō menein kath eauton sun tō phulassonti auton stratiōtē

egeneto de meta ēmeras treis sunkalesasthai auton tous ontas tōn ioudaiōn prōtous sunelthontōn de autōn elegen pros autous egō andres adelphoi ouden enantion poiēsas tō laō ē tois ethesi tois patrōois desmios ex ierosolumōn paredothēn eis tas cheiras tōn rōmaiōn
oitines anakrinantes me eboulonto apolusai dia to mēdemian aitian thanatou uparchein en emoi
antilegontōn de tōn ioudaiōn ēnankasthēn epikalesasthai kaisara ouch ōs tou ethnous mou echōn ti katēgorein
dia tautēn oun tēn aitian parekalesa umas idein kai proslalēsai eineken gar tēs elpidos tou israēl tēn alusin tautēn perikeimai
oi de pros auton eipan ēmeis oute grammata peri sou edexametha apo tēs ioudaias oute paragenomenos tis tōn adelphōn apēngeilen ē elalēsen ti peri sou ponēron
axioumen de para sou akousai a phroneis peri men gar tēs aireseōs tautēs gnōston ēmin estin oti pantachou antilegetai

taxamenoi de autō ēmeran ēlthon pros auton eis tēn xenian pleiones ois exetitheto diamarturomenos tēn basileian tou theou peithōn te autous peri tou iēsou apo te tou nomou mōuseōs kai tōn prophētōn apo prōi eōs esperas
kai oi men epeithonto tois legomenois oi de ēpistoun
asumphōnoi te ontes pros allēlous apeluonto eipontos tou paulou rēma en oti kalōs to pneuma to agion elalēsen dia ēsaiou tou prophētou pros tous pateras umōn
legōn poreuthēti pros ton laon touton kai eipon akoē akousete kai ou mē sunēte kai blepontes blepsete kai ou mē idēte

epachunthē gar ē kardia tou laou toutou kai tois ōsin bareōs ēkousan kai tous ophthalmous autōn ekammusan mēpote idōsin tois ophthalmois kai tois ōsin akousōsin kai tē kardia sunōsin kai epistrepsōsin kai iasomai autous
gnōston oun estō umin oti tois ethnesin apestalē touto to sōtērion tou theou autoi kai akousontai
enemeinen de dietian olēn en idiō misthōmati kai apedecheto pantas tous eisporeuomenous pros auton

kērussōn tēn basileian tou theou kai didaskōn ta peri tou kuriou iēsou meta pasēs parrēsias akōlutōskai tous loipous ous men epi sanisin ous de epi tinōn tōn apo tou ploiou kai outōs egeneto pantas diasōthēnai epi tēn gēn

name: ΠΡΟΣ ΡΩΜΑΙΟΥΣ
chapters: paulos doulos christou iēsou klētos apostolos aphōrismenos eis euangelion theou
o proepēngeilato dia tōn prophētōn autou en graphais agiais
peri tou uiou autou tou genomenou ek spermatos daueid kata sarka
tou oristhentos uiou theou en dunamei kata pneuma agiōsunēs ex anastaseōs nekrōn iēsou christou tou kuriou ēmōn
di ou elabomen charin kai apostolēn eis upakoēn pisteōs en pasin tois ethnesin uper tou onomatos autou
en ois este kai umeis klētoi iēsou christou
pasin tois ousin en rōmē agapētois theou klētois agiois charis umin kai eirēnē apo theou patros ēmōn kai kuriou iēsou christou
prōton men eucharistō tō theō mou dia iēsou christou peri pantōn umōn oti ē pistis umōn katangelletai en olō tō kosmō
martus gar mou estin o theos ō latreuō en tō pneumati mou en tō euangeliō tou uiou autou ōs adialeiptōs mneian umōn poioumai
pantote epi tōn proseuchōn mou deomenos eipōs ēdē pote euodōthēsomai en tō thelēmati tou theou elthein pros umas
epipothō gar idein umas ina ti metadō charisma umin pneumatikon eis to stērichthēnai umas
touto de estin sunparaklēthēnai en umin dia tēs en allēlois pisteōs umōn te kai emou
ou thelō de umas agnoein adelphoi oti pollakis proethemēn elthein pros umas kai ekōluthēn achri tou deuro ina tina karpon schō kai en umin kathōs kai en tois loipois ethnesin
ellēsin te kai barbarois sophois te kai anoētois opheiletēs eimi
outōs to kat eme prothumon kai umin tois en rōmē euangelisasthai
ou gar epaischunomai to euangelion dunamis gar theou estin eis sōtērian panti tō pisteuonti ioudaiō te prōton kai ellēni
dikaiosunē gar theou en autō apokaluptetai ek pisteōs eis pistin kathōs gegraptai o de dikaios ek pisteōs zēsetai
apokaluptetai gar orgē theou ap ouranou epi pasan asebeian kai adikian anthrōpōn tōn tēn alētheian en adikia katechontōn
dio anapologētos ei ō anthrōpe pas o krinōn en ō gar krineis ton eteron seauton katakrineis ta gar auta prasseis o krinōn
oidamen gar oti to krima tou theou estin kata alētheian epi tous ta toiauta prassontas
logizē de touto ō anthrōpe o krinōn tous ta toiauta prassontas kai poiōn auta oti su ekpheuxē to krima tou theou
ē tou ploutou tēs chrēstotētos autou kai tēs anochēs kai tēs makrothumias kataphroneis agnoōn oti to chrēston tou theou eis metanoian se agei
kata de tēn sklērotēta sou kai ametanoēton kardian thēsaurizeis seautō orgēn en ēmera orgēs kai apokalupseōs dikaiokrisias tou theou
os apodōsei ekastō kata ta erga autou
tois men kath upomonēn ergou agathou doxan kai timēn kai aphtharsian zētousin zōēn aiōnion
tois de ex eritheias kai apeithousi tē alētheia peithomenois de tē adikia orgē kai thumos
thlipsis kai stenochōria epi pasan psuchēn anthrōpou tou katergazomenou to kakon ioudaiou te prōton kai ellēnos
doxa de kai timē kai eirēnē panti tō ergazomenō to agathon ioudaiō te prōton kai ellēni
ou gar estin prosōpolēmpsia para tō theō
osoi gar anomōs ēmarton anomōs kai apolountai kai osoi en nomō ēmarton dia nomou krithēsontai
ou gar oi akroatai nomou dikaioi para tō theō all oi poiētai nomou dikaiōthēsontai
otan gar ethnē ta mē nomon echonta phusei ta tou nomou poiōsin outoi nomon mē echontes eautois eisin nomos
oitines endeiknuntai to ergon tou nomou grapton en tais kardiais autōn sunmarturousēs autōn tēs suneidēseōs kai metaxu allēlōn tōn logismōn katēgorountōn ē kai apologoumenōn
en ēmera ote krinei o theos ta krupta tōn anthrōpōn kata to euangelion mou dia christou iēsou
ei de su ioudaios eponomazē kai epanapauē nomō kai kauchasai en theō
kai ginōskeis to thelēma kai dokimazeis ta diapheronta katēchoumenos ek tou nomou
pepoithas te seauton odēgon einai tuphlōn phōs tōn en skotei
paideutēn aphronōn didaskalon nēpiōn echonta tēn morphōsin tēs gnōseōs kai tēs alētheias en tō nomō
o oun didaskōn eteron seauton ou didaskeis o kērussōn mē kleptein klepteis
o legōn mē moicheuein moicheueis o bdelussomenos ta eidōla ierosuleis
os en nomō kauchasai dia tēs parabaseōs tou nomou ton theon atimazeis
to gar onoma tou theou di umas blasphēmeitai en tois ethnesin kathōs gegraptai
ti oun to perisson tou ioudaiou ē tis ē ōpheleia tēs peritomēs
polu kata panta tropon prōton men gar oti episteuthēsan ta logia tou theou
ti gar ei ēpistēsan tines mē ē apistia autōn tēn pistin tou theou katargēsei
mē genoito ginesthō de o theos alēthēs pas de anthrōpos pseustēs kathaper gegraptai opōs an dikaiōthēs en tois logois sou kai nikēseis en tō krinesthai se
ei de ē adikia ēmōn theou dikaiosunēn sunistēsin ti eroumen mē adikos o theos o epipherōn tēn orgēn kata anthrōpon legō
mē genoito epei pōs krinei o theos ton kosmon
ei de ē alētheia tou theou en tō emō pseusmati eperisseusen eis tēn doxan autou ti eti kagō ōs amartōlos krinomai
kai mē kathōs blasphēmoumetha kai kathōs phasin tines ēmas legein oti poiēsōmen ta kaka ina elthē ta agatha ōn to krima endikon estin
ti oun proechometha ou pantōs proētiasametha gar ioudaious te kai ellēnas pantas uph amartian einai
kathōs gegraptai oti ouk estin dikaios oude eis
ouk estin o suniōn ouk estin o ekzētōn ton theon
pantes exeklinan ama ēchreōthēsan ouk estin o poiōn chrēstotēta ouk estin eōs enos
taphos aneōgmenos o larugx autōn tais glōssais autōn edoliousan ios aspidōn upo ta cheilē autōn
ōn to stoma aras kai pikrias gemei
oxeis oi podes autōn ekcheai aima
suntrimma kai talaipōria en tais odois autōn
ti oun eroumen eurēkenai abraam ton propatora ēmōn kata sarka
ei gar abraam ex ergōn edikaiōthē echei kauchēma all ou pros theon
ti gar ē graphē legei episteusen de abraam tō theō kai elogisthē autō eis dikaiosunēn
tō de ergazomenō o misthos ou logizetai kata charin alla kata opheilēma
tō de mē ergazomenō pisteuonti de epi ton dikaiounta ton asebēn logizetai ē pistis autou eis dikaiosunēn
kathaper kai daueid legei ton makarismon tou anthrōpou ō o theos logizetai dikaiosunēn chōris ergōn
makarioi ōn aphethēsan ai anomiai kai ōn epekaluphthēsan ai amartiai
makarios anēr ou ou mē logisētai kurios amartian
o makarismos oun outos epi tēn peritomēn ē kai epi tēn akrobustian legomen gar elogisthē tō abraam ē pistis eis dikaiosunēn
pōs oun elogisthē en peritomē onti ē en akrobustia ouk en peritomē all en akrobustia
kai sēmeion elaben peritomēs sphragida tēs dikaiosunēs tēs pisteōs tēs en tē akrobustia eis to einai auton patera pantōn tōn pisteuontōn di akrobustias eis to logisthēnai autois dikaiosunēn
kai patera peritomēs tois ouk ek peritomēs monon alla kai tois stoichousin tois ichnesin tēs en akrobustia pisteōs tou patros ēmōn abraam
ou gar dia nomou ē epangelia tō abraam ē tō spermati autou to klēronomon auton einai kosmou alla dia dikaiosunēs pisteōs
ei gar oi ek nomou klēronomoi kekenōtai ē pistis kai katērgētai ē epangelia
o gar nomos orgēn katergazetai ou de ouk estin nomos oude parabasis
dia touto ek pisteōs ina kata charin eis to einai bebaian tēn epangelian panti tō spermati ou tō ek tou nomou monon alla kai tō ek pisteōs abraam os estin patēr pantōn ēmōn
kathōs gegraptai oti patera pollōn ethnōn tetheika se katenanti ou episteusen theou tou zōopoiountos tous nekrous kai kalountos ta mē onta ōs onta
os par elpida ep elpidi episteusen eis to genesthai auton patera pollōn ethnōn kata to eirēmenon outōs estai to sperma sou
kai mē asthenēsas tē pistei katenoēsen to eautou sōma nenekrōmenon ekatontaetēs pou uparchōn kai tēn nekrōsin tēs mētras sarras
eis de tēn epangelian tou theou ou diekrithē tē apistia all enedunamōthē tē pistei dous doxan tō theō
kai plērophorētheis oti o epēngeltai dunatos estin kai poiēsai
dio kai elogisthē autō eis dikaiosunēn
ouk egraphē de di auton monon oti elogisthē autō
alla kai di ēmas ois mellei logizesthai tois pisteuousin epi ton egeiranta iēsoun ton kurion ēmōn ek nekrōn
dikaiōthentes oun ek pisteōs eirēnēn echōmen pros ton theon dia tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou
di ou kai tēn prosagōgēn eschēkamen tē pistei eis tēn charin tautēn en ē estēkamen kai kauchōmetha ep elpidi tēs doxēs tou theou
ou monon de alla kai kauchōmetha en tais thlipsesin eidotes oti ē thlipsis upomonēn katergazetai
ē de upomonē dokimēn ē de dokimē elpida
ē de elpis ou kataischunei oti ē agapē tou theou ekkechutai en tais kardiais ēmōn dia pneumatos agiou tou dothentos ēmin
eti gar christos ontōn ēmōn asthenōn eti kata kairon uper asebōn apethanen
molis gar uper dikaiou tis apothaneitai uper gar tou agathou tacha tis kai tolma apothanein
sunistēsin de tēn eautou agapēn eis ēmas o theos oti eti amartōlōn ontōn ēmōn christos uper ēmōn apethanen
pollō oun mallon dikaiōthentes nun en tō aimati autou sōthēsometha di autou apo tēs orgēs
ei gar echthroi ontes katēllagēmen tō theō dia tou thanatou tou uiou autou pollō mallon katallagentes sōthēsometha en tē zōē autou
ou monon de alla kai kauchōmenoi en tō theō dia tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou di ou nun tēn katallagēn elabomen
dia touto ōsper di enos anthrōpou ē amartia eis ton kosmon eisēlthen kai dia tēs amartias o thanatos kai outōs eis pantas anthrōpous o thanatos diēlthen eph ō pantes ēmarton
achri gar nomou amartia ēn en kosmō amartia de ouk ellogeitai mē ontos nomou
alla ebasileusen o thanatos apo adam mechri mōuseōs kai epi tous mē amartēsantas epi tō omoiōmati tēs parabaseōs adam os estin tupos tou mellontos

all ouch ōs to paraptōma outōs kai to charisma ei gar tō tou enos paraptōmati oi polloi apethanon pollō mallon ē charis tou theou kai ē dōrea en chariti tē tou enos anthrōpou iēsou christou eis tous pollous eperisseusen
ti oun eroumen epimenōmen tē amartia ina ē charis pleonasē
mē genoito oitines apethanomen tē amartia pōs eti zēsomen en autē
ē agnoeite oti osoi ebaptisthēmen eis christon iēsoun eis ton thanaton autou ebaptisthēmen
sunetaphēmen oun autō dia tou baptismatos eis ton thanaton ina ōsper ēgerthē christos ek nekrōn dia tēs doxēs tou patros outōs kai ēmeis en kainotēti zōēs peripatēsōmen
ei gar sumphutoi gegonamen tō omoiōmati tou thanatou autou alla kai tēs anastaseōs esometha
touto ginōskontes oti o palaios ēmōn anthrōpos sunestaurōthē ina katargēthē to sōma tēs amartias tou mēketi douleuein ēmas tē amartia
o gar apothanōn dedikaiōtai apo tēs amartias
ei de apethanomen sun christō pisteuomen oti kai suzēsomen autō
eidotes oti christos egertheis ek nekrōn ouketi apothnēskei thanatos autou ouketi kurieuei
o gar apethanen tē amartia apethanen ephapax o de zē zē tō theō
outōs kai umeis logizesthe eautous einai nekrous men tē amartia zōntas de tō theō en christō iēsou
mē oun basileuetō ē amartia en tō thnētō umōn sōmati eis to upakouein tais epithumiais autou
mēde paristanete ta melē umōn opla adikias tē amartia alla parastēsate eautous tō theō ōsei ek nekrōn zōntas kai ta melē umōn opla dikaiosunēs tō theō
amartia gar umōn ou kurieusei ou gar este upo nomon alla upo charin
ti oun amartēsōmen oti ouk esmen upo nomon alla upo charin mē genoito
ouk oidate oti ō paristanete eautous doulous eis upakoēn douloi este ō upakouete ētoi amartias eis thanaton ē upakoēs eis dikaiosunēn
charis de tō theō oti ēte douloi tēs amartias upēkousate de ek kardias eis on paredothēte tupon didachēs
eleutherōthentes de apo tēs amartias edoulōthēte tē dikaiosunē

anthrōpinon legō dia tēn astheneian tēs sarkos umōn ōsper gar parestēsate ta melē umōn doula tē akatharsia kai tē anomia eis tēn anomian outōs nun parastēsate ta melē umōn doula tē dikaiosunē eis agiasmon
ote gar douloi ēte tēs amartias eleutheroi ēte tē dikaiosunē
tina oun karpon eichete tote eph ois nun epaischunesthe to gar telos ekeinōn thanatos
nuni de eleutherōthentes apo tēs amartias doulōthentes de tō theō echete ton karpon umōn eis agiasmon to de telos zōēn aiōnion
ta gar opsōnia tēs amartias thanatos to de charisma tou theou zōē aiōnios en christō iēsou tō kuriō ēmōn
ē agnoeite adelphoi ginōskousin gar nomon lalō oti o nomos kurieuei tou anthrōpou eph oson chronon zē
ē gar upandros gunē tō zōnti andri dedetai nomō ean de apothanē o anēr katērgētai apo tou nomou tou andros
ara oun zōntos tou andros moichalis chrēmatisei ean genētai andri eterō ean de apothanē o anēr eleuthera estin apo tou nomou tou mē einai autēn moichalida genomenēn andri eterō
ōste adelphoi mou kai umeis ethanatōthēte tō nomō dia tou sōmatos tou christou eis to genesthai umas eterō tō ek nekrōn egerthenti ina karpophorēsōmen tō theō
ote gar ēmen en tē sarki ta pathēmata tōn amartiōn ta dia tou nomou enērgeito en tois melesin ēmōn eis to karpophorēsai tō thanatō
nuni de katērgēthēmen apo tou nomou apothanontes en ō kateichometha ōste douleuein ēmas en kainotēti pneumatos kai ou palaiotēti grammatos
ti oun eroumen o nomos amartia mē genoito alla tēn amartian ouk egnōn ei mē dia nomou tēn te gar epithumian ouk ēdein ei mē o nomos elegen ouk epithumēseis
aphormēn de labousa ē amartia dia tēs entolēs katērgasato en emoi pasan epithumian chōris gar nomou amartia nekra
egō de ezōn chōris nomou pote elthousēs de tēs entolēs ē amartia anezēsen
egō de apethanon kai eurethē moi ē entolē ē eis zōēn autē eis thanaton
ē gar amartia aphormēn labousa dia tēs entolēs exēpatēsen me kai di autēs apekteinen
ōste o men nomos agios kai ē entolē agia kai dikaia kai agathē
to oun agathon emoi egeneto thanatos mē genoito alla ē amartia ina phanē amartia dia tou agathou moi katergazomenē thanaton ina genētai kath uperbolēn amartōlos ē amartia dia tēs entolēs
oidamen gar oti o nomos pneumatikos estin egō de sarkinos eimi pepramenos upo tēn amartian
o gar katergazomai ou ginōskō ou gar o thelō touto prassō all o misō touto poiō
ei de o ou thelō touto poiō sumphēmi tō nomō oti kalos
nuni de ouketi egō katergazomai auto alla ē enoikousa en emoi amartia
oida gar oti ouk oikei en emoi tout estin en tē sarki mou agathon to gar thelein parakeitai moi to de katergazesthai to kalon ou
ou gar o thelō poiō agathon alla o ou thelō kakon touto prassō
ei de o ou thelō egō touto poiō ouketi egō katergazomai auto alla ē oikousa en emoi amartia
euriskō ara ton nomon tō thelonti emoi poiein to kalon oti emoi to kakon parakeitai
sunēdomai gar tō nomō tou theou kata ton esō anthrōpon
blepō de eteron nomon en tois melesin mou antistrateuomenon tō nomō tou noos mou kai aichmalōtizonta me en tō nomō tēs amartias tō onti en tois melesin mou
talaipōros egō anthrōpos tis me rusetai ek tou sōmatos tou thanatou toutou
charis de tō theō dia iēsou christou tou kuriou ēmōn ara oun autos egō tō noi douleuō nomō theou tē de sarki nomō amartias
ouden ara nun katakrima tois en christō iēsou
o gar nomos tou pneumatos tēs zōēs en christō iēsou ēleutherōsen se apo tou nomou tēs amartias kai tou thanatou
to gar adunaton tou nomou en ō ēsthenei dia tēs sarkos o theos ton eautou uion pempsas en omoiōmati sarkos amartias kai peri amartias katekrinen tēn amartian en tē sarki
ina to dikaiōma tou nomou plērōthē en ēmin tois mē kata sarka peripatousin alla kata pneuma
oi gar kata sarka ontes ta tēs sarkos phronousin oi de kata pneuma ta tou pneumatos
to gar phronēma tēs sarkos thanatos to de phronēma tou pneumatos zōē kai eirēnē
dioti to phronēma tēs sarkos echthra eis theon tō gar nomō tou theou ouch upotassetai oude gar dunatai
oi de en sarki ontes theō aresai ou dunantai
umeis de ouk este en sarki alla en pneumati eiper pneuma theou oikei en umin ei de tis pneuma christou ouk echei outos ouk estin autou
ei de christos en umin to men sōma nekron dia amartian to de pneuma zōē dia dikaiosunēn
ei de to pneuma tou egeirantos ton iēsoun ek nekrōn oikei en umin o egeiras ek nekrōn christon iēsoun zōopoiēsei kai ta thnēta sōmata umōn dia tou enoikountos autou pneumatos en umin
ara oun adelphoi opheiletai esmen ou tē sarki tou kata sarka zēn
ei gar kata sarka zēte mellete apothnēskein ei de pneumati tas praxeis tou sōmatos thanatoute zēsesthe
osoi gar pneumati theou agontai outoi uioi eisin theou
ou gar elabete pneuma doulias palin eis phobon alla elabete pneuma uiothesias en ō krazomen abba o patēr
auto to pneuma sunmarturei tō pneumati ēmōn oti esmen tekna theou
ei de tekna kai klēronomoi klēronomoi men theou sunklēronomoi de christou eiper sunpaschomen ina kai sundoxasthōmen
logizomai gar oti ouk axia ta pathēmata tou nun kairou pros tēn mellousan doxan apokaluphthēnai eis ēmas
ē gar apokaradokia tēs ktiseōs tēn apokalupsin tōn uiōn tou theou apekdechetai
tē gar mataiotēti ē ktisis upetagē ouch ekousa alla dia ton upotaxanta eph elpidi
dioti kai autē ē ktisis eleutherōthēsetai apo tēs doulias tēs phthoras eis tēn eleutherian tēs doxēs tōn teknōn tou theou
oidamen gar oti pasa ē ktisis sustenazei kai sunōdinei achri tou nun
ou monon de alla kai autoi tēn aparchēn tou pneumatos echontes ēmeis kai autoi en eautois stenazomen uiothesian apekdechomenoi tēn apolutrōsin tou sōmatos ēmōn
tē gar elpidi esōthēmen elpis de blepomenē ouk estin elpis o gar blepei tis ti kai elpizei
ei de o ou blepomen elpizomen di upomonēs apekdechometha
ōsautōs de kai to pneuma sunantilambanetai tē astheneia ēmōn to gar ti proseuxōmetha katho dei ouk oidamen alla auto to pneuma uperentunchanei stenagmois alalētois
o de eraunōn tas kardias oiden ti to phronēma tou pneumatos oti kata theon entunchanei uper agiōn
oidamen de oti tois agapōsin ton theon panta sunergei eis agathon tois kata prothesin klētois ousin
oti ous proegnō kai proōrisen summorphous tēs eikonos tou uiou autou eis to einai auton prōtotokon en pollois adelphois
ous de proōrisen toutous kai ekalesen kai ous ekalesen toutous kai edikaiōsen ous de edikaiōsen toutous kai edoxasen
ti oun eroumen pros tauta ei o theos uper ēmōn tis kath ēmōn
os ge tou idiou uiou ouk epheisato alla uper ēmōn pantōn paredōken auton pōs ouchi kai sun autō ta panta ēmin charisetai
tis enkalesei kata eklektōn theou theos o dikaiōn
tis o katakrinōn christos iēsous o apothanōn mallon de egertheis os estin en dexia tou theou os kai entunchanei uper ēmōn
tis ēmas chōrisei apo tēs agapēs tou christou thlipsis ē stenochōria ē diōgmos ē limos ē gumnotēs ē kindunos ē machaira
alētheian legō en christō ou pseudomai sunmarturousēs moi tēs suneidēseōs mou en pneumati agiō
oti lupē moi estin megalē kai adialeiptos odunē tē kardia mou
ēuchomēn gar anathema einai autos egō apo tou christou uper tōn adelphōn mou tōn sungenōn mou kata sarka
oitines eisin israēleitai ōn ē uiothesia kai ē doxa kai ai diathēkai kai ē nomothesia kai ē latreia kai ai epangeliai
ōn oi pateres kai ex ōn o christos to kata sarka o ōn epi pantōn theos eulogētos eis tous aiōnas amēn
ouch oion de oti ekpeptōken o logos tou theou ou gar pantes oi ex israēl outoi israēl
oud oti eisin sperma abraam pantes tekna all en isaak klēthēsetai soi sperma
tout estin ou ta tekna tēs sarkos tauta tekna tou theou alla ta tekna tēs epangelias logizetai eis sperma
epangelias gar o logos outos kata ton kairon touton eleusomai kai estai tē sarra uios
ou monon de alla kai rebekka ex enos koitēn echousa isaak tou patros ēmōn
mēpō gar gennēthentōn mēde praxantōn ti agathon ē phaulon ina ē kat eklogēn prothesis tou theou menē ouk ex ergōn all ek tou kalountos
errethē autē oti o meizōn douleusei tō elassoni
kathōs gegraptai ton iakōb ēgapēsa ton de ēsau emisēsa
ti oun eroumen mē adikia para tō theō mē genoito
tō mōusei gar legei eleēsō on an eleō kai oikteirēsō on an oikteirō
ara oun ou tou thelontos oude tou trechontos alla tou eleōntos theou
legei gar ē graphē tō pharaō oti eis auto touto exēgeira se opōs endeixōmai en soi tēn dunamin mou kai opōs diangelē to onoma mou en pasē tē gē
ara oun on thelei eleei on de thelei sklērunei
ereis moi oun ti eti memphetai tō gar boulēmati autou tis anthestēken
ō anthrōpe menounge su tis ei o antapokrinomenos tō theō mē erei to plasma tō plasanti ti me epoiēsas outōs
ē ouk echei exousian o kerameus tou pēlou ek tou autou phuramatos poiēsai o men eis timēn skeuos o de eis atimian
ei de thelōn o theos endeixasthai tēn orgēn kai gnōrisai to dunaton autou ēnenken en pollē makrothumia skeuē orgēs katērtismena eis apōleian
kai ina gnōrisē ton plouton tēs doxēs autou epi skeuē eleous a proētoimasen eis doxan
ous kai ekalesen ēmas ou monon ex ioudaiōn alla kai ex ethnōn
ōs kai en tō ōsēe legei kalesō ton ou laon mou laon mou kai tēn ouk ēgapēmenēn ēgapēmenēn
kai estai en tō topō ou errethē autois ou laos mou umeis ekei klēthēsontai uioi theou zōntos
ēsaias de krazei uper tou israēl ean ē o arithmos tōn uiōn israēl ōs ē ammos tēs thalassēs to upoleimma sōthēsetai
adelphoi ē men eudokia tēs emēs kardias kai ē deēsis pros ton theon uper autōn eis sōtērian
marturō gar autois oti zēlon theou echousin all ou kat epignōsin
agnoountes gar tēn tou theou dikaiosunēn kai tēn idian dikaiosunēn zētountes stēsai tē dikaiosunē tou theou ouch upetagēsan
telos gar nomou christos eis dikaiosunēn panti tō pisteuonti
mōusēs gar graphei oti tēn dikaiosunēn tēn ek nomou o poiēsas anthrōpos zēsetai en autē
ē de ek pisteōs dikaiosunē outōs legei mē eipēs en tē kardia sou tis anabēsetai eis ton ouranon tout estin christon katagagein
ē tis katabēsetai eis tēn abusson tout estin christon ek nekrōn anagagein
alla ti legei engus sou to rēma estin en tō stomati sou kai en tē kardia sou tout estin to rēma tēs pisteōs o kērussomen
oti ean omologēsēs en tō stomati sou kurion iēsoun kai pisteusēs en tē kardia sou oti o theos auton ēgeiren ek nekrōn sōthēsē
kardia gar pisteuetai eis dikaiosunēn stomati de omologeitai eis sōtērian
legei gar ē graphē pas o pisteuōn ep autō ou kataischunthēsetai
ou gar estin diastolē ioudaiou te kai ellēnos o gar autos kurios pantōn ploutōn eis pantas tous epikaloumenous auton
pas gar os an epikalesētai to onoma kuriou sōthēsetai
pōs oun epikalesōntai eis on ouk episteusan pōs de pisteusōsin ou ouk ēkousan pōs de akousontai chōris kērussontos
pōs de kēruxōsin ean mē apostalōsin kathōs gegraptai ōs ōraioi oi podes tōn euangelizomenōn ta agatha
all ou pantes upēkousan tō euangeliō ēsaias gar legei kurie tis episteusen tē akoē ēmōn
ara ē pistis ex akoēs ē de akoē dia rēmatos christou
alla legō mē ouk ēkousan menounge eis pasan tēn gēn exēlthen o phthongos autōn kai eis ta perata tēs oikoumenēs ta rēmata autōn
alla legō mē israēl ouk egnō prōtos mōusēs legei egō parazēlōsō umas ep ouk ethnei ep ethnei asunetō parorgiō umas
ēsaias de apotolma kai legei eurethēn tois eme mē zētousin emphanēs egenomēn tois eme mē eperōtōsin
pros de ton israēl legei olēn tēn ēmeran exepetasa tas cheiras mou pros laon apeithounta kai antilegonta
legō oun mē apōsato o theos ton laon autou mē genoito kai gar egō israēleitēs eimi ek spermatos abraam phulēs beniamein
ouk apōsato o theos ton laon autou on proegnō ē ouk oidate en ēleia ti legei ē graphē ōs entunchanei tō theō kata tou israēl
kurie tous prophētas sou apekteinan ta thusiastēria sou kateskapsan kagō upeleiphthēn monos kai zētousin tēn psuchēn mou
alla ti legei autō o chrēmatismos katelipon emautō eptakischilious andras oitines ouk ekampsan gonu tē baal
outōs oun kai en tō nun kairō leimma kat eklogēn charitos gegonen
ei de chariti ouketi ex ergōn epei ē charis ouketi ginetai charis
ti oun o epizētei israēl touto ouk epetuchen ē de eklogē epetuchen oi de loipoi epōrōthēsan
kathaper gegraptai edōken autois o theos pneuma katanuxeōs ophthalmous tou mē blepein kai ōta tou mē akouein eōs tēs sēmeron ēmeras
kai daueid legei genēthētō ē trapeza autōn eis pagida kai eis thēran kai eis skandalon kai eis antapodoma autois
skotisthētōsan oi ophthalmoi autōn tou mē blepein kai ton nōton autōn diapantos sunkampson
legō oun mē eptaisan ina pesōsin mē genoito alla tō autōn paraptōmati ē sōtēria tois ethnesin eis to parazēlōsai autous
ei de to paraptōma autōn ploutos kosmou kai to ēttēma autōn ploutos ethnōn posō mallon to plērōma autōn
umin de legō tois ethnesin eph oson men oun eimi egō ethnōn apostolos tēn diakonian mou doxazō
eipōs parazēlōsō mou tēn sarka kai sōsō tinas ex autōn
ei gar ē apobolē autōn katallagē kosmou tis ē proslēmpsis ei mē zōē ek nekrōn
ei de ē aparchē agia kai to phurama kai ei ē riza agia kai oi kladoi
ei de tines tōn kladōn exeklasthēsan su de agrielaios ōn enekentristhēs en autois kai sunkoinōnos tēs rizēs tēs piotētos tēs elaias egenou
mē katakauchō tōn kladōn ei de katakauchasai ou su tēn rizan bastazeis alla ē riza se
ereis oun exeklasthēsan kladoi ina egō enkentristhō
kalōs tē apistia exeklasthēsan su de tē pistei estēkas mē upsēla phronei alla phobou
ei gar o theos tōn kata phusin kladōn ouk epheisato oude sou pheisetai
ide oun chrēstotēta kai apotomian theou epi men tous pesontas apotomia epi de se chrēstotēs theou ean epimenēs tē chrēstotēti epei kai su ekkopēsē
kakeinoi de ean mē epimenōsin tē apistia enkentristhēsontai dunatos gar estin o theos palin enkentrisai autous
parakalō oun umas adelphoi dia tōn oiktirmōn tou theou parastēsai ta sōmata umōn thusian zōsan agian tō theō euareston tēn logikēn latreian umōn
kai mē sunschēmatizesthe tō aiōni toutō alla metamorphousthe tē anakainōsei tou noos eis to dokimazein umas ti to thelēma tou theou to agathon kai euareston kai teleion
legō gar dia tēs charitos tēs dotheisēs moi panti tō onti en umin mē uperphronein par o dei phronein alla phronein eis to sōphronein ekastō ōs o theos emerisen metron pisteōs
kathaper gar en eni sōmati polla melē echomen ta de melē panta ou tēn autēn echei praxin
outōs oi polloi en sōma esmen en christō to de kath eis allēlōn melē
echontes de charismata kata tēn charin tēn dotheisan ēmin diaphora eite prophēteian kata tēn analogian tēs pisteōs
eite diakonian en tē diakonia eite o didaskōn en tē didaskalia
eite o parakalōn en tē paraklēsei o metadidous en aplotēti o proistamenos en spoudē o eleōn en ilarotēti
ē agapē anupokritos apostugountes to ponēron kollōmenoi tō agathō
tē philadelphia eis allēlous philostorgoi tē timē allēlous proēgoumenoi
tē spoudē mē oknēroi tō pneumati zeontes tō kuriō douleuontes
tē elpidi chairontes tē thlipsei upomenontes tē proseuchē proskarterountes
tais chreiais tōn agiōn koinōnountes tēn philoxenian diōkontes
eulogeite tous diōkontas umas eulogeite kai mē katarasthe
chairein meta chairontōn klaiein meta klaiontōn
to auto eis allēlous phronountes mē ta upsēla phronountes alla tois tapeinois sunapagomenoi mē ginesthe phronimoi par eautois
mēdeni kakon anti kakou apodidontes pronooumenoi kala enōpion pantōn anthrōpōn
ei dunaton to ex umōn meta pantōn anthrōpōn eirēneuontes
mē eautous ekdikountes agapētoi alla dote topon tē orgē gegraptai gar emoi ekdikēsis egō antapodōsō legei kurios
alla ean peina o echthros sou psōmize auton ean dipsa potize auton touto gar poiōn anthrakas puros sōreuseis epi tēn kephalēn autou
mē nikō upo tou kakou alla nika en tō agathō to kakon
pasa psuchē exousiais uperechousais upotassesthō ou gar estin exousia ei mē upo theou ai de ousai upo theou tetagmenai eisin
ōste o antitassomenos tē exousia tē tou theou diatagē anthestēken oi de anthestēkotes eautois krima lēmpsontai
oi gar archontes ouk eisin phobos tō agathō ergō alla tō kakō theleis de mē phobeisthai tēn exousian to agathon poiei kai exeis epainon ex autēs
theou gar diakonos estin soi eis to agathon ean de to kakon poiēs phobou ou gar eikē tēn machairan phorei theou gar diakonos estin ekdikos eis orgēn tō to kakon prassonti
dio anankē upotassesthai ou monon dia tēn orgēn alla kai dia tēn suneidēsin
dia touto gar kai phorous teleite leitourgoi gar theou eisin eis auto touto proskarterountes
apodote pasin tas opheilas tō ton phoron ton phoron tō to telos to telos tō ton phobon ton phobon tō tēn timēn tēn timēn
mēdeni mēden opheilete ei mē to allēlous agapan o gar agapōn ton eteron nomon peplērōken
to gar ou moicheuseis ou phoneuseis ou klepseis ouk epithumēseis kai ei tis etera entolē en tō logō toutō anakephalaioutai en tō agapēseis ton plēsion sou ōs seauton
ē agapē tō plēsion kakon ouk ergazetai plērōma oun nomou ē agapē
kai touto eidotes ton kairon oti ōra ēdē umas ex upnou egerthēnai nun gar enguteron ēmōn ē sōtēria ē ote episteusamen
ē nux proekopsen ē de ēmera ēngiken apothōmetha oun ta erga tou skotous endusōmetha de ta opla tou phōtos
ōs en ēmera euschēmonōs peripatēsōmen mē kōmois kai methais mē koitais kai aselgeiais mē eridi kai zēlō
alla endusasthe ton kurion iēsoun christon kai tēs sarkos pronoian mē poieisthe eis epithumias
ton de asthenounta tē pistei proslambanesthe mē eis diakriseis dialogismōn
os men pisteuei phagein panta o de asthenōn lachana esthiei
o esthiōn ton mē esthionta mē exoutheneitō o de mē esthiōn ton esthionta mē krinetō o theos gar auton proselabeto
su tis ei o krinōn allotrion oiketēn tō idiō kuriō stēkei ē piptei stathēsetai de dunatei gar o kurios stēsai auton
os men gar krinei ēmeran par ēmeran os de krinei pasan ēmeran ekastos en tō idiō noi plērophoreisthō
o phronōn tēn ēmeran kuriō phronei kai o esthiōn kuriō esthiei eucharistei gar tō theō kai o mē esthiōn kuriō ouk esthiei kai eucharistei tō theō
oudeis gar ēmōn eautō zē kai oudeis eautō apothnēskei
ean te gar zōmen tō kuriō zōmen ean te apothnēskōmen tō kuriō apothnēskomen ean te oun zōmen ean te apothnēskōmen tou kuriou esmen
eis touto gar christos apethanen kai ezēsen ina kai nekrōn kai zōntōn kurieusē
su de ti krineis ton adelphon sou ē kai su ti exoutheneis ton adelphon sou pantes gar parastēsometha tō bēmati tou theou
gegraptai gar zō egō legei kurios oti emoi kampsei pan gonu kai pasa glōssa exomologēsetai tō theō
ara oun ekastos ēmōn peri eautou logon dōsei tō theō
mēketi oun allēlous krinōmen alla touto krinate mallon to mē tithenai proskomma tō adelphō ē skandalon
oida kai pepeismai en kuriō iēsou oti ouden koinon di eautou ei mē tō logizomenō ti koinon einai ekeinō koinon
ei gar dia brōma o adelphos sou lupeitai ouketi kata agapēn peripateis mē tō brōmati sou ekeinon apollue uper ou christos apethanen
opheilomen de ēmeis oi dunatoi ta asthenēmata tōn adunatōn bastazein kai mē eautois areskein
ekastos ēmōn tō plēsion aresketō eis to agathon pros oikodomēn
kai gar o christos ouch eautō ēresen alla kathōs gegraptai oi oneidismoi tōn oneidizontōn se epepesan ep eme
osa gar proegraphē eis tēn ēmeteran didaskalian egraphē ina dia tēs upomonēs kai dia tēs paraklēseōs tōn graphōn tēn elpida echōmen
o de theos tēs upomonēs kai tēs paraklēseōs dōē umin to auto phronein en allēlois kata christon iēsoun
ina omothumadon en eni stomati doxazēte ton theon kai patera tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou
dio proslambanesthe allēlous kathōs kai o christos proselabeto umas eis doxan tou theou
legō gar christon diakonon gegenēsthai peritomēs uper alētheias theou eis to bebaiōsai tas epangelias tōn paterōn
ta de ethnē uper eleous doxasai ton theon kathōs gegraptai dia touto exomologēsomai soi en ethnesin kai tō onomati sou psalō
kai palin legei euphranthēte ethnē meta tou laou autou
kai palin aineite panta ta ethnē ton kurion kai epainesatōsan auton pantes oi laoi
kai palin ēsaias legei estai ē riza tou iessai kai o anistamenos archein ethnōn ep autō ethnē elpiousin
o de theos tēs elpidos plērōsai umas pasēs charas kai eirēnēs en tō pisteuein eis to perisseuein umas en tē elpidi en dunamei pneumatos agiou
pepeismai de adelphoi mou kai autos egō peri umōn oti kai autoi mestoi este agathōsunēs peplērōmenoi pasēs tēs gnōseōs dunamenoi kai allēlous nouthetein
tolmēroteron de egrapsa umin apo merous ōs epanamimnēskōn umas dia tēn charin tēn dotheisan moi apo tou theou
eis to einai me leitourgon christou iēsou eis ta ethnē ierourgounta to euangelion tou theou ina genētai ē prosphora tōn ethnōn euprosdektos ēgiasmenē en pneumati agiō
echō oun tēn kauchēsin en christō iēsou ta pros ton theon
ou gar tolmēsō ti lalein ōn ou kateirgasato christos di emou eis upakoēn ethnōn logō kai ergō
en dunamei sēmeiōn kai teratōn en dunamei pneumatos theou ōste me apo ierousalēm kai kuklō mechri tou illurikou peplērōkenai to euangelion tou christou
outōs de philotimoumenon euangelizesthai ouch opou ōnomasthē christos ina mē ep allotrion themelion oikodomō
alla kathōs gegraptai ois ouk anēngelē peri autou opsontai kai oi ouk akēkoasin sunēsousin
dio kai enekoptomēn ta polla tou elthein pros umas
nuni de mēketi topon echōn en tois klimasi toutois epipothian de echōn tou elthein pros umas apo pollōn etōn
ōs an poreuōmai eis tēn spanian elpizō gar diaporeuomenos theasasthai umas kai uph umōn propemphthēnai ekei ean umōn prōton apo merous emplēsthō
nuni de poreuomai eis ierousalēm diakonōn tois agiois
ēudokēsan gar makedonia kai achaia koinōnian tina poiēsasthai eis tous ptōchous tōn agiōn tōn en ierousalēm
ēudokēsan gar kai opheiletai eisin autōn ei gar tois pneumatikois autōn ekoinōnēsan ta ethnē opheilousin kai en tois sarkikois leitourgēsai autois
touto oun epitelesas kai sphragisamenos autois ton karpon touton apeleusomai di umōn eis spanian
oida de oti erchomenos pros umas en plērōmati eulogias christou eleusomai
parakalō de umas adelphoi dia tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou kai dia tēs agapēs tou pneumatos sunagōnisasthai moi en tais proseuchais uper emou pros ton theon
ina rusthō apo tōn apeithountōn en tē ioudaia kai ē diakonia mou ē eis ierousalēm euprosdektos tois agiois genētai
ina elthōn en chara pros umas dia thelēmatos theou sunanapausōmai umin
o de theos tēs eirēnēs meta pantōn umōn amēn
sunistēmi de umin phoibēn tēn adelphēn ēmōn ousan diakonon tēs ekklēsias tēs en kenchreais
ina autēn prosdexēsthe en kuriō axiōs tōn agiōn kai parastēte autē en ō an umōn chrēzē pragmati kai gar autē prostatis pollōn egenēthē kai emou autou
aspasasthe priskan kai akulan tous sunergous mou en christō iēsou
oitines uper tēs psuchēs mou ton eautōn trachēlon upethēkan ois ouk egō monos eucharistō alla kai pasai ai ekklēsiai tōn ethnōn
kai tēn kat oikon autōn ekklēsian aspasasthe epaineton ton agapēton mou os estin aparchē tēs asias eis christon
aspasasthe mariam ētis polla ekopiasen eis umas
aspasasthe andronikon kai iounian tous sungeneis mou kai sunaichmalōtous mou oitines eisin episēmoi en tois apostolois oi kai pro emou gegonan en christō
aspasasthe ampliaton ton agapēton mou en kuriō
aspasasthe ourbanon ton sunergon ēmōn en christō kai stachun ton agapēton mou
aspasasthe apellēn ton dokimon en christō aspasasthe tous ek tōn aristoboulou

name: ΠΡΟΣ ΚΟΡΙΝΘΙΟΥΣ Α΄
chapters: paulos klētos apostolos christou iēsou dia thelēmatos theou kai sōsthenēs o adelphos
tē ekklēsia tou theou tē ousē en korinthō ēgiasmenois en christō iēsou klētois agiois sun pasin tois epikaloumenois to onoma tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou en panti topō autōn kai ēmōn
charis umin kai eirēnē apo theou patros ēmōn kai kuriou iēsou christou
eucharistō tō theō mou pantote peri umōn epi tē chariti tou theou tē dotheisē umin en christō iēsou
oti en panti eploutisthēte en autō en panti logō kai pasē gnōsei
kathōs to marturion tou christou ebebaiōthē en umin
ōste umas mē ustereisthai en mēdeni charismati apekdechomenous tēn apokalupsin tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou
os kai bebaiōsei umas eōs telous anenklētous en tē ēmera tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou
pistos o theos di ou eklēthēte eis koinōnian tou uiou autou iēsou christou tou kuriou ēmōn
parakalō de umas adelphoi dia tou onomatos tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou ina to auto legēte pantes kai mē ē en umin schismata ēte de katērtismenoi en tō autō noi kai en tē autē gnōmē
edēlōthē gar moi peri umōn adelphoi mou upo tōn chloēs oti erides en umin eisin
legō de touto oti ekastos umōn legei egō men eimi paulou egō de apollō egō de kēpha egō de christou
memeristai o christos mē paulos estaurōthē uper umōn ē eis to onoma paulou ebaptisthēte
eucharistō oti oudena umōn ebaptisa ei mē krispon kai gaion
ina mē tis eipē oti eis to emon onoma ebaptisthēte
ebaptisa de kai ton stephana oikon loipon ouk oida ei tina allon ebaptisa
ou gar apesteilen me christos baptizein alla euangelizesthai ouk en sophia logou ina mē kenōthē o stauros tou christou
o logos gar o tou staurou tois men apollumenois mōria estin tois de sōzomenois ēmin dunamis theou estin
gegraptai gar apolō tēn sophian tōn sophōn kai tēn sunesin tōn sunetōn athetēsō
pou sophos pou grammateus pou suzētētēs tou aiōnos toutou ouchi emōranen o theos tēn sophian tou kosmou
epeidē gar en tē sophia tou theou ouk egnō o kosmos dia tēs sophias ton theon eudokēsen o theos dia tēs mōrias tou kērugmatos sōsai tous pisteuontas
epeidē kai ioudaioi sēmeia aitousin kai ellēnes sophian zētousin
ēmeis de kērussomen christon estaurōmenon ioudaiois men skandalon ethnesin de mōrian
autois de tois klētois ioudaiois te kai ellēsin christon theou dunamin kai theou sophian
oti to mōron tou theou sophōteron tōn anthrōpōn estin kai to asthenes tou theou ischuroteron tōn anthrōpōn
blepete gar tēn klēsin umōn adelphoi oti ou polloi sophoi kata sarka ou polloi dunatoi ou polloi eugeneis
alla ta mōra tou kosmou exelexato o theos ina kataischunē tous sophous kai ta asthenē tou kosmou exelexato o theos ina kataischunē ta ischura
kai ta agenē tou kosmou kai ta exouthenēmena exelexato o theos ta mē onta ina ta onta katargēsē
opōs mē kauchēsētai pasa sarx enōpion tou theou
ex autou de umeis este en christō iēsou os egenēthē sophia ēmin apo theou dikaiosunē te kai agiasmos kai apolutrōsis
ina kathōs gegraptai o kauchōmenos en kuriō kauchasthō
kagō elthōn pros umas adelphoi ēlthon ou kath uperochēn logou ē sophias katangellōn umin to mustērion tou theou
ou gar ekrina eidenai ti en umin ei mē iēsoun christon kai touton estaurōmenon
kagō en astheneia kai en phobō kai en tromō pollō egenomēn pros umas
kai o logos mou kai to kērugma mou ouk en peithois sophias logois all en apodeixei pneumatos kai dunameōs
ina ē pistis umōn mē ē en sophia anthrōpōn all en dunamei theou
sophian de laloumen en tois teleiois sophian de ou tou aiōnos toutou oude tōn archontōn tou aiōnos toutou tōn katargoumenōn
alla laloumen theou sophian en mustēriō tēn apokekrummenēn ēn proōrisen o theos pro tōn aiōnōn eis doxan ēmōn
ēn oudeis tōn archontōn tou aiōnos toutou egnōken ei gar egnōsan ouk an ton kurion tēs doxēs estaurōsan
alla kathōs gegraptai a ophthalmos ouk eiden kai ous ouk ēkousen kai epi kardian anthrōpou ouk anebē a ētoimasen o theos tois agapōsin auton
ēmin de apekalupsen o theos dia tou pneumatos to gar pneuma panta erauna kai ta bathē tou theou
tis gar oiden anthrōpōn ta tou anthrōpou ei mē to pneuma tou anthrōpou to en autō outōs kai ta tou theou oudeis egnōken ei mē to pneuma tou theou
ēmeis de ou to pneuma tou kosmou elabomen alla to pneuma to ek tou theou ina eidōmen ta upo tou theou charisthenta ēmin
a kai laloumen ouk en didaktois anthrōpinēs sophias logois all en didaktois pneumatos pneumatikois pneumatika sunkrinontes
psuchikos de anthrōpos ou dechetai ta tou pneumatos tou theou mōria gar autō estin kai ou dunatai gnōnai oti pneumatikōs anakrinetai
o de pneumatikos anakrinei panta autos de up oudenos anakrinetai
tis gar egnō noun kuriou os sumbibasei auton ēmeis de noun christou echomen
kagō adelphoi ouk ēdunēthēn lalēsai umin ōs pneumatikois all ōs sarkinois ōs nēpiois en christō
gala umas epotisa ou brōma oupō gar edunasthe all oude eti nun dunasthe
eti gar sarkikoi este opou gar en umin zēlos kai eris ouchi sarkikoi este kai kata anthrōpon peripateite
otan gar legē tis egō men eimi paulou eteros de egō apollō ouk anthrōpoi este
ti oun estin apollōs ti de estin paulos diakonoi di ōn episteusate kai ekastō ōs o kurios edōken
egō ephuteusa apollōs epotisen alla o theos ēuxanen
ōste oute o phuteuōn estin ti oute o potizōn all o auxanōn theos
o phuteuōn de kai o potizōn en eisin ekastos de ton idion misthon lēmpsetai kata ton idion kopon
theou gar esmen sunergoi theou geōrgion theou oikodomē este
kata tēn charin tou theou tēn dotheisan moi ōs sophos architektōn themelion ethēka allos de epoikodomei ekastos de blepetō pōs epoikodomei
themelion gar allon oudeis dunatai theinai para ton keimenon os estin iēsous christos
ei de tis epoikodomei epi ton themelion chrusion argurion lithous timious xula chorton kalamēn
ekastou to ergon phaneron genēsetai ē gar ēmera dēlōsei oti en puri apokaluptetai kai ekastou to ergon opoion estin to pur auto dokimasei
ei tinos to ergon menei o epoikodomēsen misthon lēmpsetai
ei tinos to ergon katakaēsetai zēmiōthēsetai autos de sōthēsetai outōs de ōs dia puros
ouk oidate oti naos theou este kai to pneuma tou theou oikei en umin
ei tis ton naon tou theou phtheirei phtherei touton o theos o gar naos tou theou agios estin oitines este umeis
mēdeis eauton exapatatō ei tis dokei sophos einai en umin en tō aiōni toutō mōros genesthō ina genētai sophos
ē gar sophia tou kosmou toutou mōria para tō theō estin gegraptai gar o drassomenos tous sophous en tē panourgia autōn
kai palin kurios ginōskei tous dialogismous tōn sophōn oti eisin mataioi
ōste mēdeis kauchasthō en anthrōpois panta gar umōn estin
eite paulos eite apollōs eite kēphas eite kosmos eite zōē eite thanatos eite enestōta eite mellonta panta umōn
umeis de christou christos de theou
outōs ēmas logizesthō anthrōpos ōs upēretas christou kai oikonomous mustēriōn theou
ōde loipon zēteitai en tois oikonomois ina pistos tis eurethē
emoi de eis elachiston estin ina uph umōn anakrithō ē upo anthrōpinēs ēmeras all oude emauton anakrinō
ouden gar emautō sunoida all ouk en toutō dedikaiōmai o de anakrinōn me kurios estin
ōste mē pro kairou ti krinete eōs an elthē o kurios os kai phōtisei ta krupta tou skotous kai phanerōsei tas boulas tōn kardiōn kai tote o epainos genēsetai ekastō apo tou theou
tauta de adelphoi meteschēmatisa eis emauton kai apollōn di umas ina en ēmin mathēte to mē uper a gegraptai ina mē eis uper tou enos phusiousthe kata tou eterou
tis gar se diakrinei ti de echeis o ouk elabes ei de kai elabes ti kauchasai ōs mē labōn
ēdē kekoresmenoi este ēdē eploutēsate chōris ēmōn ebasileusate kai ophelon ge ebasileusate ina kai ēmeis umin sumbasileusōmen
dokō gar o theos ēmas tous apostolous eschatous apedeixen ōs epithanatious oti theatron egenēthēmen tō kosmō kai angelois kai anthrōpois
ēmeis mōroi dia christon umeis de phronimoi en christō ēmeis astheneis umeis de ischuroi umeis endoxoi ēmeis de atimoi
achri tēs arti ōras kai peinōmen kai dipsōmen kai gumniteuomen kai kolaphizometha kai astatoumen
kai kopiōmen ergazomenoi tais idiais chersin loidoroumenoi eulogoumen diōkomenoi anechometha
dusphēmoumenoi parakaloumen ōs perikatharmata tou kosmou egenēthēmen pantōn peripsēma eōs arti
ouk entrepōn umas graphō tauta all ōs tekna mou agapēta nouthetōn
ean gar murious paidagōgous echēte en christō all ou pollous pateras en gar christō iēsou dia tou euangeliou egō umas egennēsa
parakalō oun umas mimētai mou ginesthe
dia touto epempsa umin timotheon os estin mou teknon agapēton kai piston en kuriō os umas anamnēsei tas odous mou tas en christō iēsou kathōs pantachou en pasē ekklēsia didaskō
ōs mē erchomenou de mou pros umas ephusiōthēsan tines
eleusomai de tacheōs pros umas ean o kurios thelēsē kai gnōsomai ou ton logon tōn pephusiōmenōn alla tēn dunamin
ou gar en logō ē basileia tou theou all en dunamei
ti thelete en rabdō elthō pros umas ē en agapē pneumati te prautētos
olōs akouetai en umin porneia kai toiautē porneia ētis oude en tois ethnesin ōste gunaika tina tou patros echein
kai umeis pephusiōmenoi este kai ouchi mallon epenthēsate ina arthē ek mesou umōn o to ergon touto praxas
egō men gar apōn tō sōmati parōn de tō pneumati ēdē kekrika ōs parōn ton outōs touto katergasamenon
en tō onomati tou kuriou iēsou sunachthentōn umōn kai tou emou pneumatos sun tē dunamei tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou
paradounai ton toiouton tō satana eis olethron tēs sarkos ina to pneuma sōthē en tē ēmera tou kuriou iēsou
ou kalon to kauchēma umōn ouk oidate oti mikra zumē olon to phurama zumoi
ekkatharate tēn palaian zumēn ina ēte neon phurama kathōs este azumoi kai gar to pascha ēmōn etuthē christos
ōste eortazōmen mē en zumē palaia mēde en zumē kakias kai ponērias all en azumois eilikrinias kai alētheias
egrapsa umin en tē epistolē mē sunanamignusthai pornois
ou pantōs tois pornois tou kosmou toutou ē tois pleonektais kai arpaxin ē eidōlolatrais epei ōpheilete ara ek tou kosmou exelthein
nun de egrapsa umin mē sunanamignusthai ean tis adelphos onomazomenos ē pornos ē pleonektēs ē eidōlolatrēs ē loidoros ē methusos ē arpax tō toioutō mēde sunesthiein
ti gar moi tous exō krinein ouchi tous esō umeis krinete
tous de exō o theos krinei exarate ton ponēron ex umōn autōn
tolma tis umōn pragma echōn pros ton eteron krinesthai epi tōn adikōn kai ouchi epi tōn agiōn
ē ouk oidate oti oi agioi ton kosmon krinousin kai ei en umin krinetai o kosmos anaxioi este kritēriōn elachistōn
ouk oidate oti angelous krinoumen mētige biōtika
biōtika men oun kritēria ean echēte tous exouthenēmenous en tē ekklēsia toutous kathizete
pros entropēn umin legō outōs ouk eni en umin oudeis sophos os dunēsetai diakrinai ana meson tou adelphou autou
alla adelphos meta adelphou krinetai kai touto epi apistōn
ēdē men olōs ēttēma umin estin oti krimata echete meth eautōn diati ouchi mallon adikeisthe diati ouchi mallon apostereisthe
alla umeis adikeite kai apostereite kai touto adelphous
ē ouk oidate oti adikoi theou basileian ou klēronomēsousin mē planasthe oute pornoi oute eidōlolatrai oute moichoi oute malakoi oute arsenokoitai
oute kleptai oute pleonektai ou methusoi ou loidoroi ouch arpages basileian theou klēronomēsousin
kai tauta tines ēte alla apelousasthe alla ēgiasthēte alla edikaiōthēte en tō onomati tou kuriou iēsou christou kai en tō pneumati tou theou ēmōn
panta moi exestin all ou panta sumpherei panta moi exestin all ouk egō exousiasthēsomai upo tinos
ta brōmata tē koilia kai ē koilia tois brōmasin o de theos kai tautēn kai tauta katargēsei to de sōma ou tē porneia alla tō kuriō kai o kurios tō sōmati
o de theos kai ton kurion ēgeiren kai ēmas exegerei dia tēs dunameōs autou
ouk oidate oti ta sōmata umōn melē christou estin aras oun ta melē tou christou poiēsō pornēs melē mē genoito
ē ouk oidate oti o kollōmenos tē pornē en sōma estin esontai gar phēsin oi duo eis sarka mian
o de kollōmenos tō kuriō en pneuma estin
pheugete tēn porneian pan amartēma o ean poiēsē anthrōpos ektos tou sōmatos estin o de porneuōn eis to idion sōma amartanei
ē ouk oidate oti to sōma umōn naos tou en umin agiou pneumatos estin ou echete apo theou kai ouk este eautōn
ēgorasthēte gar timēs doxasate dē ton theon en tō sōmati umōn
peri de ōn egrapsate kalon anthrōpō gunaikos mē aptesthai
dia de tas porneias ekastos tēn eautou gunaika echetō kai ekastē ton idion andra echetō
tē gunaiki o anēr tēn opheilēn apodidotō omoiōs de kai ē gunē tō andri
ē gunē tou idiou sōmatos ouk exousiazei alla o anēr omoiōs de kai o anēr tou idiou sōmatos ouk exousiazei alla ē gunē
mē apostereite allēlous ei mēti an ek sumphōnou pros kairon ina scholasēte tē proseuchē kai palin epi to auto ēte ina mē peirazē umas o satanas dia tēn akrasian umōn
touto de legō kata sungnōmēn ou kat epitagēn
thelō de pantas anthrōpous einai ōs kai emauton alla ekastos idion echei charisma ek theou o men outōs o de outōs
legō de tois agamois kai tais chērais kalon autois ean meinōsin ōs kagō
ei de ouk enkrateuontai gamēsatōsan kreitton gar estin gamein ē purousthai
tois de gegamēkosin parangellō ouk egō alla o kurios gunaika apo andros mē chōristhēnai
ean de kai chōristhē menetō agamos ē tō andri katallagētō kai andra gunaika mē aphienai
tois de loipois legō egō ouch o kurios ei tis adelphos gunaika echei apiston kai autē suneudokei oikein met autou mē aphietō autēn
kai gunē ētis ei tis echei andra apiston kai outos suneudokei oikein met autēs mē aphietō ton andra
ēgiastai gar o anēr o apistos en tē gunaiki kai ēgiastai ē gunē ē apistos en tō adelphō epei ara ta tekna umōn akatharta estin nun de agia estin
ei de o apistos chōrizetai chōrizesthō ou dedoulōtai o adelphos ē ē adelphē en tois toioutois en de eirēnē keklēken umas o theos
ti gar oidas gunai ei ton andra sōseis ē ti oidas aner ei tēn gunaika sōseis
ei mē ekastō ōs memeriken o kurios ekaston ōs keklēken o theos outōs peripateitō kai outōs en tais ekklēsiais pasais diatassomai
peritetmēmenos tis eklēthē mē epispasthō en akrobustia keklētai tis mē peritemnesthō
ē peritomē ouden estin kai ē akrobustia ouden estin alla tērēsis entolōn theou
ekastos en tē klēsei ē eklēthē en tautē menetō
doulos eklēthēs mē soi meletō all ei kai dunasai eleutheros genesthai mallon chrēsai
o gar en kuriō klētheis doulos apeleutheros kuriou estin omoiōs o eleutheros klētheis doulos estin christou
timēs ēgorasthēte mē ginesthe douloi anthrōpōn
ekastos en ō eklēthē adelphoi en toutō menetō para theō
peri de tōn parthenōn epitagēn kuriou ouk echō gnōmēn de didōmi ōs ēleēmenos upo kuriou pistos einai
peri de tōn eidōlothutōn oidamen oti pantes gnōsin echomen ē gnōsis phusioi ē de agapē oikodomei
ei tis dokei egnōkenai ti oupō egnō kathōs dei gnōnai
ei de tis agapa ton theon outos egnōstai up autou
peri tēs brōseōs oun tōn eidōlothutōn oidamen oti ouden eidōlon en kosmō kai oti oudeis theos ei mē eis
kai gar eiper eisin legomenoi theoi eite en ouranō eite epi gēs ōsper eisin theoi polloi kai kurioi polloi
all ēmin eis theos o patēr ex ou ta panta kai ēmeis eis auton kai eis kurios iēsous christos di ou ta panta kai ēmeis di autou
all ouk en pasin ē gnōsis tines de tē sunētheia eōs arti tou eidōlou ōs eidōlothuton esthiousin kai ē suneidēsis autōn asthenēs ousa molunetai
brōma de ēmas ou parastēsei tō theō oute ean phagōmen perissteoumen oute ean mē phagōmen usteroumetha
blepete de mēpōs ē exousia umōn autē proskomma genētai tois asthenesin
ean gar tis idē se ton echonta gnōsin en eidōliō katakeimenon ouchi ē suneidēsis autou asthenous ontos oikodomēthēsetai eis to ta eidōlothuta esthiein
apollutai gar o asthenōn en tē sē gnōsei o adelphos di on christos apethanen
outōs de amartanontes eis tous adelphous kai tuptontes autōn tēn suneidēsin asthenousan eis christon amartanete
dioper ei brōma skandalizei ton adelphon mou ou mē phagō krea eis ton aiōna ina mē ton adelphon mou skandalisō
ouk eimi eleutheros ouk eimi apostolos ouchi iēsoun ton kurion ēmōn eoraka ou to ergon mou umeis este en kuriō
ei allois ouk eimi apostolos alla ge umin eimi ē gar sphragis mou tēs apostolēs umeis este en kuriō
ē emē apologia tois eme anakrinousin estin autē
mē ouk echomen exousian phagein kai pein
mē ouk echomen exousian adelphēn gunaika periagein ōs kai oi loipoi apostoloi kai oi adelphoi tou kuriou kai kēphas
ē monos egō kai barnabas ouk echomen exousian mē ergazesthai
tis strateuetai idiois opsōniois pote tis phuteuei ampelōna kai ton karpon autou ouk esthiei ē tis poimainei poimnēn kai ek tou galaktos tēs poimnēs ouk esthiei
mē kata anthrōpon tauta lalō ē kai o nomos tauta ou legei
en gar tō mōuseōs nomō gegraptai ou kēmōseis boun aloōnta mē tōn boōn melei tō theō
ē di ēmas pantōs legei di ēmas gar egraphē oti opheilei ep elpidi o arotriōn arotrian kai o aloōn ep elpidi tou metechein
ei ēmeis umin ta pneumatika espeiramen mega ei ēmeis umōn ta sarkika therisomen
ei alloi tēs umōn exousias metechousin ou mallon ēmeis all ouk echrēsametha tē exousia tautē alla panta stegomen ina mē tina ekkopēn dōmen tō euangeliō tou christou
ouk oidate oti oi ta iera ergazomenoi ta ek tou ierou esthiousin oi tō thusiastēriō paredreuontes tō thusiastēriō summerizontai
outōs kai o kurios dietaxen tois to euangelion katangellousin ek tou euangeliou zēn
egō de ou kechrēmai oudeni toutōn ouk egrapsa de tauta ina outōs genētai en emoi kalon gar moi mallon apothanein ē to kauchēma mou oudeis kenōsei
ean gar euangelizōmai ouk estin moi kauchēma anankē gar moi epikeitai ouai gar moi estin ean mē euangelizōmai
ei gar ekōn touto prassō misthon echō ei de akōn oikonomian pepisteumai
tis oun mou estin o misthos ina euangelizomenos adapanon thēsō to euangelion eis to mē katachrēsasthai tē exousia mou en tō euangeliō
eleutheros gar ōn ek pantōn pasin emauton edoulōsa ina tous pleionas kerdēsō
kai egenomēn tois ioudaiois ōs ioudaios ina ioudaious kerdēsō tois upo nomon ōs upo nomon mē ōn autos upo nomon ina tous upo nomon kerdēsō
tois anomois ōs anomos mē ōn anomos theou all ennomos christou ina kerdanō tous anomous
egenomēn tois asthenesin asthenēs ina tous astheneis kerdēsō tois pasin gegona panta ina pantōs tinas sōsō
panta de poiō dia to euangelion ina sunkoinōnos autou genōmai
ouk oidate oti oi en stadiō trechontes pantes men trechousin eis de lambanei to brabeion outōs trechete ina katalabēte
pas de o agōnizomenos panta enkrateuetai ekeinoi men oun ina phtharton stephanon labōsin ēmeis de aphtharton
egō toinun outōs trechō ōs ouk adēlōs outōs pukteuō ōs ouk aera derōn
alla upōpiazō mou to sōma kai doulagōgō mēpōs allois kēruxas autos adokimos genōmai
ou thelō gar umas agnoein adelphoi oti oi pateres ēmōn pantes upo tēn nephelēn ēsan kai pantes dia tēs thalassēs diēlthon
kai pantes eis ton mōusēn ebaptisthēsan en tē nephelē kai en tē thalassē
kai pantes to auto pneumatikon brōma ephagon
kai pantes to auto pneumatikon epion poma epinon gar ek pneumatikēs akolouthousēs petras ē petra de ēn o christos
all ouk en tois pleiosin autōn eudokēsen o theos katestrōthēsan gar en tē erēmō
tauta de tupoi ēmōn egenēthēsan eis to mē einai ēmas epithumētas kakōn kathōs kakeinoi epethumēsan
mēde eidōlolatrai ginesthe kathōs tines autōn ōsper gegraptai ekathisen o laos phagein kai pein kai anestēsan paizein
mēde porneuōmen kathōs tines autōn eporneusan kai epesan mia ēmera eikositreis chiliades
mēde ekpeirazōmen ton kurion kathōs tines autōn exepeirasan kai upo tōn opheōn apōllunto
mēde gonguzete kathaper tines autōn egongusan kai apōlonto upo tou olothreutou
tauta de tupikōs sunebainen ekeinois egraphē de pros nouthesian ēmōn eis ous ta telē tōn aiōnōn katēntēken
ōste o dokōn estanai blepetō mē pesē
peirasmos umas ouk eilēphen ei mē anthrōpinos pistos de o theos os ouk easei umas peirasthēnai uper o dunasthe alla poiēsei sun tō peirasmō kai tēn ekbasin tou dunasthai upenenkein
dioper agapētoi mou pheugete apo tēs eidōlolatreias
ōs phronimois legō krinate umeis o phēmi
to potērion tēs eulogias o eulogoumen ouchi koinōnia tou aimatos tou christou estin ton arton on klōmen ouchi koinōnia tou sōmatos tou christou estin
oti eis artos en sōma oi polloi esmen oi gar pantes ek tou enos artou metechomen
blepete ton israēl kata sarka ouch oi esthiontes tas thusias koinōnoi tou thusiastēriou eisin
mimētai mou ginesthe kathōs kagō christou
epainō de umas oti panta mou memnēsthe kai kathōs paredōka umin tas paradoseis katechete
thelō de umas eidenai oti pantos andros ē kephalē o christos estin kephalē de gunaikos o anēr kephalē de tou christou o theos
pas anēr proseuchomenos ē prophēteuōn kata kephalēs echōn kataischunei tēn kephalēn autou
pasa de gunē proseuchomenē ē prophēteuousa akatakaluptō tē kephalē kataischunei tēn kephalēn autēs en gar estin kai to auto tē exurēmenē
ei gar ou katakaluptetai gunē kai keirasthō ei de aischron gunaiki to keirasthai ē xurasthai katakaluptesthō
anēr men gar ouk opheilei katakaluptesthai tēn kephalēn eikōn kai doxa theou uparchōn ē gunē de doxa andros estin
ou gar estin anēr ek gunaikos alla gunē ex andros
kai gar ouk ektisthē anēr dia tēn gunaika alla gunē dia ton andra
dia touto opheilei ē gunē exousian echein epi tēs kephalēs dia tous angelous
plēn oute gunē chōris andros oute anēr chōris gunaikos en kuriō
ōsper gar ē gunē ek tou andros outōs kai o anēr dia tēs gunaikos ta de panta ek tou theou
en umin autois krinate prepon estin gunaika akatakalupton tō theō proseuchesthai
oude ē phusis autē didaskei umas oti anēr men ean koma atimia autō estin
gunē de ean koma doxa autē estin oti ē komē anti peribolaiou dedotai autē
ei de tis dokei philoneikos einai ēmeis toiautēn sunētheian ouk echomen oude ai ekklēsiai tou theou
touto de parangellōn ouk epainō oti ouk eis to kreisson alla eis to ēsson sunerchesthe
prōton men gar sunerchomenōn umōn en ekklēsia akouō schismata en umin uparchein kai meros ti pisteuō
dei gar kai aireseis en umin einai ina oi dokimoi phaneroi genōntai en umin
sunerchomenōn oun umōn epi to auto ouk estin kuriakon deipnon phagein
ekastos gar to idion deipnon prolambanei en tō phagein kai os men peina os de methuei
mē gar oikias ouk echete eis to esthiein kai pinein ē tēs ekklēsias tou theou kataphroneite kai kataischunete tous mē echontas ti eipō umin epainesō umas en toutō ouk epainō
egō gar parelabon apo tou kuriou o kai paredōka umin oti o kurios iēsous en tē nukti ē paredideto elaben arton
kai eucharistēsas eklasen kai eipen touto mou estin to sōma to uper umōn touto poieite eis tēn emēn anamnēsin
ōsautōs kai to potērion meta to deipnēsai legōn touto to potērion ē kainē diathēkē estin en tō emō aimati touto poieite osakis ean pinēte eis tēn emēn anamnēsin
osakis gar ean esthiēte ton arton touton kai to potērion pinēte ton thanaton tou kuriou katangellete achri ou elthē
ōste os an esthiē ton arton ē pinē to potērion tou kuriou anaxiōs enochos estai tou sōmatos kai tou aimatos tou kuriou
dokimazetō de anthrōpos eauton kai outōs ek tou artou esthietō kai ek tou potēriou pinetō
o gar esthiōn kai pinōn krima eautō esthiei kai pinei mē diakrinōn to sōma
dia touto en umin polloi astheneis kai arrōstoi kai koimōntai ikanoi
ei de eautous diekrinomen ouk an ekrinometha
krinomenoi de upo tou kuriou paideuometha ina mē sun tō kosmō katakrithōmen
ōste adelphoi mou sunerchomenoi eis to phagein allēlous ekdechesthe
ei tis peina en oikō esthietō ina mē eis krima sunerchēsthe ta de loipa ōs an elthō diataxomai
peri de tōn pneumatikōn adelphoi ou thelō umas agnoein
oidate oti ote ethnē ēte pros ta eidōla ta aphōna ōs an ēgesthe apagomenoi
dio gnōrizō umin oti oudeis en pneumati theou lalōn legei anathema iēsous kai oudeis dunatai eipein kurios iēsous ei mē en pneumati agiō
diaireseis de charismatōn eisin to de auto pneuma
kai diaireseis diakoniōn eisin kai o autos kurios
kai diaireseis energēmatōn eisin o de autos theos o energōn ta panta en pasin
ekastō de didotai ē phanerōsis tou pneumatos pros to sumpheron
ō men gar dia tou pneumatos didotai logos sophias allō de logos gnōseōs kata to auto pneuma
eterō pistis en tō autō pneumati allō de charismata iamatōn en tō eni pneumati
allō de energēmata dunameōn allō de prophēteia allō de diakrisis pneumatōn eterō genē glōssōn allō de ermēneia glōssōn
panta de tauta energei to en kai to auto pneuma diairoun idia ekastō kathōs bouletai
kathaper gar to sōma en estin kai melē polla echei panta de ta melē tou sōmatos polla onta en estin sōma outōs kai o christos
kai gar en eni pneumati ēmeis pantes eis en sōma ebaptisthēmen eite ioudaioi eite ellēnes eite douloi eite eleutheroi kai pantes en pneuma epotisthēmen
kai gar to sōma ouk estin en melos alla polla
ean eipē o pous oti ouk eimi cheir ouk eimi ek tou sōmatos ou para touto ouk estin ek tou sōmatos
ean tais glōssais tōn anthrōpōn lalō kai tōn angelōn agapēn de mē echō gegona chalkos ēchōn ē kumbalon alalazon
kai ean echō prophēteian kai eidō ta mustēria panta kai pasan tēn gnōsin kai ean echō pasan tēn pistin ōste orē methistanai agapēn de mē echō outhen eimi
kai psōmisō panta ta uparchonta mou kai ean paradō to sōma mou ina kauchthsōmai agapēn de mē echō outhen ōpheloumai
ē agapē makrothumei chrēsteuetai ē agapē ou zēloi ē agapē ou perpereuetai ou phusioutai
ouk aschēmonei ou zētei ta eautēs ou paroxunetai ou logizetai to kakon
ou chairei epi tē adikia sunchairei de tē alētheia
panta stegei panta pisteuei panta elpizei panta upomenei
ē agapē oudepote piptei eite de prophēteiai katargēthēsontai eite glōssai pausontai eite gnōsis katargēthēsetai
ek merous gar ginōskomen kai ek merous prophēteuomen
otan de elthē to teleion to ek merous katargēthēsetai
ote ēmēn nēpios elaloun ōs nēpios ephronoun ōs nēpios elogizomēn ōs nēpios ote gegona anēr katērgēka ta tou nēpiou
blepomen gar arti di esoptrou en ainigmati tote de prosōpon pros prosōpon arti ginōskō ek merous tote de epignōsomai kathōs kai epegnōsthēn
nuni de menei pistis elpis agapē ta tria tauta meizōn de toutōn ē agapē
diōkete tēn agapēn zēloute de ta pneumatika mallon de ina prophēteuēte
o gar lalōn glōssē ouk anthrōpois lalei alla theō oudeis gar akouei pneumati de lalei mustēria
o de prophēteuōn anthrōpois lalei oikodomēn kai paraklēsin kai paramuthian
o lalōn glōssē eauton oikodomei o de prophēteuōn ekklēsian oikodomei
thelō de pantas umas lalein glōssais mallon de ina prophēteuēte meizōn de o prophēteuōn ē o lalōn glōssais ektos ei mē diermēneuē ina ē ekklēsia oikodomēn labē
nun de adelphoi ean elthō pros umas glōssais lalōn ti umas ōphelēsō ean mē umin lalēsō ē en apokalupsei ē en gnōsei ē en prophēteia ē didachē
omōs ta apsucha phōnēn didonta eite aulos eite kithara ean diastolēn tois phthongois mē dō pōs gnōsthēsetai to auloumenon ē to kitharizomenon
kai gar ean adēlon salpigx phōnēn dō tis paraskeuasetai eis polemon
outōs kai umeis dia tēs glōssēs ean mē eusēmon logon dōte pōs gnōsthēsetai to laloumenon esesthe gar eis aera lalountes
tosauta ei tuchoi genē phōnōn eisin en kosmō kai ouden aphōnon
ean oun mē eidō tēn dunamin tēs phōnēs esomai tō lalounti barbaros kai o lalōn en emoi barbaros
outōs kai umeis epei zēlōtai este pneumatōn pros tēn oikodomēn tēs ekklēsias zēteite ina perisseuēte
dio o lalōn glōssē proseuchesthō ina diermēneuē
ean gar proseuchōmai glōssē to pneuma mou proseuchetai o de nous mou akarpos estin
ti oun estin proseuxomai tō pneumati proseuxomai de kai tō noi psalō tō pneumati psalō de kai tō noi
epei ean eulogēs pneumati o anaplērōn ton topon tou idiōtou pōs erei to amēn epi tē sē eucharistia epeidē ti legeis ouk oiden
su men gar kalōs eucharisteis all o eteros ouk oikodomeitai
eucharistō tō theō pantōn umōn mallon glōssē lalō
alla en ekklēsia thelō pente logous tō noi mou lalēsai ina kai allous katēchēsō ē murious logous en glōssē
