adelphoi mē paidia ginesthe tais phresin alla tē kakia nēpiazete tais de phresin teleioi ginesthe
gnōrizō de umin adelphoi to euangelion o euēngelisamēn umin o kai parelabete en ō kai estēkate
di ou kai sōzesthe tini logō euēngelisamēn umin ei katechete ektos ei mē eikē episteusate
paredōka gar umin en prōtois o kai parelabon oti christos apethanen uper tōn amartiōn ēmōn kata tas graphas
kai oti etaphē kai oti egēgertai tē ēmera tē tritē kata tas graphas
kai oti ōphthē kēpha epeita tois dōdeka
epeita ōphthē epanō pentakosiois adelphois ephapax ex ōn oi pleiones menousin eōs arti tines de ekoimēthēsan
epeita ōphthē iakōbō epeita tois apostolois pasin
eschaton de pantōn ōsperei tō ektrōmati ōphthē kamoi
egō gar eimi o elachistos tōn apostolōn os ouk eimi ikanos kaleisthai apostolos dioti ediōxa tēn ekklēsian tou theou
chariti de theou eimi o eimi kai ē charis autou ē eis eme ou kenē egenēthē alla perissoteron autōn pantōn ekopiasa ouk egō de alla ē charis tou theou sun emoi
eite oun egō eite ekeinoi outōs kērussomen kai outōs episteusate
ei de christos kērussetai oti egēgertai ek nekrōn pōs legousin en umin tines oti anastasis nekrōn ouk estin
ei de anastasis nekrōn ouk estin oude christos egēgertai
ei de christos ouk egēgertai kenon ara kai to kērugma ēmōn kenē kai ē pistis umōn
euriskometha de kai pseudomartures tou theou oti emarturēsamen kata tou theou oti ēgeiren ton christon on ouk ēgeiren eiper ara nekroi ouk egeirontai
ei gar nekroi ouk egeirontai oude christos egēgertai
ei de christos ouk egēgertai mataia ē pistis umōn eti este en tais amartiais umōn
ara kai oi koimēthentes en christō apōlonto
ei en tē zōē tautē en christō ēlpikotes esmen monon eleeinoteroi pantōn anthrōpōn esmen
nuni de christos egēgertai ek nekrōn aparchē tōn kekoimēmenōn
peri de tēs logias tēs eis tous agious ōsper dietaxa tais ekklēsiais tēs galatias outōs kai umeis poiēsate
kata mian sabbatou ekastos umōn par eautō tithetō thēsaurizōn o ti an euodōtai ina mē otan elthō tote logiai ginōntai
otan de paragenōmai ous ean dokimasēte di epistolōn toutous pempsō apenenkein tēn charin umōn eis ierousalēm
ean de ē axion tou kame poreuesthai sun emoi poreusontai
eleusomai de pros umas otan makedonian dielthō makedonian gar dierchomai
pros umas de tuchon paramenō ē kai paracheimasō ina umeis me propempsēte ou ean poreuōmai
ou thelō gar umas arti en parodō idein elpizō gar chronon tina epimeinai pros umas ean o kurios epitrepsē
epimenō de en ephesō eōs tēs pentēkostēs
thura gar moi aneōgen megalē kai energēs kai antikeimenoi polloi
ean de elthē timotheos blepete ina aphobōs genētai pros umas to gar ergon kuriou ergazetai ōs kagō
mē tis oun auton exouthenēsē propempsate de auton en eirēnē ina elthē pros me ekdechomai gar auton meta tōn adelphōn
peri de apollō tou adelphou polla parekalesa auton ina elthē pros umas meta tōn adelphōn kai pantōs ouk ēn thelēma ina nun elthē eleusetai de otan eukairēsē
grēgoreite stēkete en tē pistei andrizesthe krataiousthe
parakalō de umas adelphoi oidate tēn oikian stephana oti estin aparchē tēs achaias kai eis diakonian tois agiois etaxan eautous
ina kai umeis upotassēsthe tois toioutois kai panti tō sunergounti kai kopiōnti
chairō de epi tē parousia stephana kai phortounatou kai achaikou oti to umeteron usterēma outoi aneplērōsan
anepausan gar to emon pneuma kai to umōn epiginōskete oun tous toioutous
aspazontai umas ai ekklēsiai tēs asias aspazetai umas en kuriō polla akulas kai priska sun tē kat oikon autōn ekklēsia
aspazontai umas oi adelphoi pantes aspasasthe allēlous en philēmati agiō
o aspasmos tē emē cheiri paulou
ei tis ou philei ton kurion ētō anathema maran atha
ē charis tou kuriou iēsou meth umōn
ē agapē mou meta pantōn umōn en christō iēsouōste adelphoi mou agapētoi edraioi ginesthe ametakinētoi perisseuontes en tō ergō tou kuriou pantote eidotes oti o kopos umōn ouk estin kenos en kuriō

name: ΠΡΟΣ ΚΟΡΙΝΘΙΟΥΣ Β΄
chapters: paulos apostolos christou iēsou dia thelēmatos theou kai timotheos o adelphos tē ekklēsia tou theou tē ousē en korinthō sun tois agiois pasin tois ousin en olē tē achaia
charis umin kai eirēnē apo theou patros ēmōn kai kuriou iēsou christou
eulogētos o theos kai patēr tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou o patēr tōn oiktirmōn kai theos pasēs paraklēseōs
o parakalōn ēmas epi pasē tē thlipsei ēmōn eis to dunasthai ēmas parakalein tous en pasē thlipsei dia tēs paraklēseōs ēs parakaloumetha autoi upo tou theou
oti kathōs perisseuei ta pathēmata tou christou eis ēmas outōs dia tou christou perisseuei kai ē paraklēsis ēmōn

eite de thlibometha uper tēs umōn paraklēseōs kai sōtērias eite parakaloumetha uper tēs umōn paraklēseōs tēs energoumenēs en upomonē tōn autōn pathēmatōn ōn kai ēmeis paschomen kai ē elpis ēmōn bebaia uper umōn
eidotes oti ōs koinōnoi este tōn pathēmatōn outōs kai tēs paraklēseōs
ou gar thelomen umas agnoein adelphoi uper tēs thlipseōs ēmōn tēs genomenēs en tē asia oti kath uperbolēn uper dunamin ebarēthēmen ōste exaporēthēnai ēmas kai tou zēn
alla autoi en eautois to apokrima tou thanatou eschēkamen ina mē pepoithotes ōmen eph eautois all epi tō theō tō egeironti tous nekrous
os ek tēlikoutou thanatou errusato ēmas kai rusetai eis on ēlpikamen oti kai eti rusetai
sunupourgountōn kai umōn uper ēmōn tē deēsei ina ek pollōn prosōpōn to eis ēmas charisma dia pollōn eucharistēthē uper ēmōn

ē gar kauchēsis ēmōn autē estin to marturion tēs suneidēseōs ēmōn oti en agiotēti kai eilikrinia tou theou ouk en sophia sarkikē all en chariti theou anestraphēmen en tō kosmō perissoterōs de pros umas
ou gar alla graphomen umin all ē a anaginōskete ē kai epiginōskete elpizō de oti eōs telous epignōsesthe
kathōs kai epegnōte ēmas apo merous oti kauchēma umōn esmen kathaper kai umeis ēmōn en tē ēmera tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou
kai tautē tē pepoithēsei eboulomēn proteron pros umas elthein ina deuteran charin schēte
kai di umōn dielthein eis makedonian kai palin apo makedonias elthein pros umas kai uph umōn propemphthēnai eis tēn ioudaian
touto oun boulomenos mēti ara tē elaphria echrēsamēn ē a bouleuomai kata sarka bouleuomai ina ē par emoi to nai nai kai to ou ou
pistos de o theos oti o logos ēmōn o pros umas ouk estin nai kai ou
o tou theou gar uios christos iēsous o en umin di ēmōn kēruchtheis di emou kai silouanou kai timotheou ouk egeneto nai kai ou alla nai en autō gegonen
osai gar epangeliai theou en autō to nai dio kai di autou to amēn tō theō pros doxan di ēmōn
o de bebaiōn ēmas sun umin eis christon kai chrisas ēmas theos
o kai sphragisamenos ēmas kai dous ton arabōna tou pneumatos en tais kardiais ēmōn
ekrina de emautō touto to mē palin en lupē pros umas elthein
ei gar egō lupō umas kai tis o euphrainōn me ei mē o lupoumenos ex emou
kai egrapsa touto auto ina mē elthōn lupēn schō aph ōn edei me chairein pepoithōs epi pantas umas oti ē emē chara pantōn umōn estin
ek gar pollēs thlipseōs kai sunochēs kardias egrapsa umin dia pollōn dakruōn ouch ina lupēthēte alla tēn agapēn ina gnōte ēn echō perissoterōs eis umas
ei de tis lelupēken ouk eme lelupēken alla apo merous ina mē epibarō pantas umas
ikanon tō toioutō ē epitimia autē ē upo tōn pleionōn
ōste tounantion mallon umas charisasthai kai parakalesai mēpōs tē perissotera lupē katapothē o toioutos
dio parakalō umas kurōsai eis auton agapēn
eis touto gar kai egrapsa ina gnō tēn dokimēn umōn ei eis panta upēkooi este
ō de ti charizesthe kagō kai gar egō o kecharismai ei ti kecharismai di umas en prosōpō christou
ina mē pleonektēthōmen upo tou satana ou gar autou ta noēmata agnooumen
elthōn de eis tēn trōada eis to euangelion tou christou kai thuras moi aneōgmenēs en kuriō
ouk eschēka anesin tō pneumati mou tō mē eurein me titon ton adelphon mou alla apotaxamenos autois exēlthon eis makedonian
tō de theō charis tō pantote thriambeuonti ēmas en tō christō kai tēn osmēn tēs gnōseōs autou phanerounti di ēmōn en panti topō
oti christou euōdia esmen tō theō en tois sōzomenois kai en tois apollumenois
ois men osmē ek thanatou eis thanaton ois de osmē ek zōēs eis zōēn kai pros tauta tis ikanos
ou gar esmen ōs oi polloi kapēleuontes ton logon tou theou all ōs ex eilikrinias all ōs ek theou katenanti theou en christō laloumen
archometha palin eautous sunistanein ē mē chrēzomen ōs tines sustatikōn epistolōn pros umas ē ex umōn
ē epistolē ēmōn umeis este engegrammenē en tais kardiais ēmōn ginōskomenē kai anaginōskomenē upo pantōn anthrōpōn
phaneroumenoi oti este epistolē christou diakonētheisa uph ēmōn engegrammenē ou melani alla pneumati theou zōntos ouk en plaxin lithinais all en plaxin kardiais sarkinais
pepoithēsin de toiautēn echomen dia tou christou pros ton theon
ouch oti aph eautōn ikanoi esmen logisasthai ti ōs ex eautōn all ē ikanotēs ēmōn ek tou theou
os kai ikanōsen ēmas diakonous kainēs diathēkēs ou grammatos alla pneumatos to gar gramma apoktennei to de pneuma zōopoiei

ei de ē diakonia tou thanatou en grammasin entetupōmenē lithois egenēthē en doxē ōste mē dunasthai atenisai tous uious israēl eis to prosōpon mōuseōs dia tēn doxan tou prosōpou autou tēn katargoumenēn
pōs ouchi mallon ē diakonia tou pneumatos estai en doxē
ei gar tē diakonia tēs katakriseōs doxa pollō mallon perisseuei ē diakonia tēs dikaiosunēs doxē
kai gar ou dedoxastai to dedoxasmenon en toutō tō merei eineken tēs uperballousēs doxēs
ei gar to katargoumenon dia doxēs pollō mallon to menon en doxē
echontes oun toiautēn elpida pollē parrēsia chrōmetha
kai ou kathaper mōusēs etithei kalumma epi to prosōpon eautou pros to mē atenisai tous uious israēl eis to telos tou katargoumenou
alla epōrōthē ta noēmata autōn achri gar tēs sēmeron ēmeras to auto kalumma epi tē anagnōsei tēs palaias diathēkēs menei mē anakaluptomenon oti en christō katargeitai
all eōs sēmeron ēnika an anaginōskētai mōusēs kalumma epi tēn kardian autōn keitai
ēnika de ean epistrepsē pros kurion periaireitai to kalumma
o de kurios to pneuma estin ou de to pneuma kuriou eleutheria
ēmeis de pantes anakekalummenō prosōpō tēn doxan kuriou katoptrizomenoi tēn autēn eikona metamorphoumetha apo doxēs eis doxan kathaper apo kuriou pneumatos
dia touto echontes tēn diakonian tautēn kathōs ēleēthēmen ouk enkakoumen

alla apeipametha ta krupta tēs aischunēs mē peripatountes en panourgia mēde dolountes ton logon tou theou alla tē phanerōsei tēs alētheias sunistantes eautous pros pasan suneidēsin anthrōpōn enōpion tou theou
ei de kai estin kekalummenon to euangelion ēmōn en tois apollumenois estin kekalummenon
en ois o theos tou aiōnos toutou etuphlōsen ta noēmata tōn apistōn eis to mē augasai ton phōtismon tou euangeliou tēs doxēs tou christou os estin eikōn tou theou
ou gar eautous kērussomen alla christon iēsoun kurion eautous de doulous umōn dia iēsoun
oti o theos o eipōn ek skotous phōs lampsei os elampsen en tais kardiais ēmōn pros phōtismon tēs gnōseōs tēs doxēs tou theou en prosōpō christou
echomen de ton thēsauron touton en ostrakinois skeuesin ina ē uperbolē tēs dunameōs ē tou theou kai mē ex ēmōn
en panti thlibomenoi all ou stenochōroumenoi aporoumenoi all ouk exaporoumenoi
diōkomenoi all ouk enkataleipomenoi kataballomenoi all ouk apollumenoi
pantote tēn nekrōsin tou iēsou en tō sōmati peripherontes ina kai ē zōē tou iēsou en tois sōmasin ēmōn phanerōthē
aei gar ēmeis oi zōntes eis thanaton paradidometha dia iēsoun ina kai ē zōē tou iēsou phanerōthē en tē thnētē sarki ēmōn
ōste o thanatos en ēmin energeitai ē de zōē en umin
echontes de to auto pneuma tēs pisteōs kata to gegrammenon episteusa dio elalēsa kai ēmeis pisteuomen dio kai laloumen
eidotes oti o egeiras ton kurion iēsoun kai ēmas sun iēsou egerei kai parastēsei sun umin
ta gar panta di umas ina ē charis pleonasasa dia tōn pleionōn tēn eucharistian perisseusē eis tēn doxan tou theou
dio ouk enkakoumen all ei kai o exō ēmōn anthrōpos diaphtheiretai all o esō ēmōn anakainoutai ēmera kai ēmera
to gar parautika elaphron tēs thlipseōs ēmōn kath uperbolēn eis uperbolēn aiōnion baros doxēs katergazetai ēmin
mē skopountōn ēmōn ta blepomena alla ta mē blepomena ta gar blepomena proskaira ta de mē blepomena aiōnia

name: ΠΡΟΣ ΓΑΛΑΤΑΣ
chapters: paulos apostolos ouk ap anthrōpōn oude di anthrōpou alla dia iēsou christou kai theou patros tou egeirantos auton ek nekrōn
kai oi sun emoi pantes adelphoi tais ekklēsiais tēs galatias
charis umin kai eirēnē apo theou patros kai kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou
tou dontos eauton peri tōn amartiōn ēmōn opōs exelētai ēmas ek tou aiōnos tou enestōtos ponērou kata to thelēma tou theou kai patros ēmōn
ō ē doxa eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn amēn
thaumazō oti outōs tacheōs metatithesthe apo tou kalesantos umas en chariti christou eis eteron euangelion
o ouk estin allo ei mē tines eisin oi tarassontes umas kai thelontes metastrepsai to euangelion tou christou
alla kai ean ēmeis ē angelos ex ouranou euangelisētai par o euēngelisametha umin anathema estō
ōs proeirēkamen kai arti palin legō ei tis umas euangelizetai par o parelabete anathema estō
arti gar anthrōpous peithō ē ton theon ē zētō anthrōpois areskein ei eti anthrōpois ēreskon christou doulos ouk an ēmēn
gnōrizō de umin adelphoi to euangelion to euangelisthen up emou oti ouk estin kata anthrōpon
oude gar egō para anthrōpou parelabon auto oute edidachthēn alla di apokalupseōs iēsou christou
ēkousate gar tēn emēn anastrophēn pote en tō ioudaismō oti kath uperbolēn ediōkon tēn ekklēsian tou theou kai eporthoun autēn
kai proekopton en tō ioudaismō uper pollous sunēlikiōtas en tō genei mou perissoterōs zēlōtēs uparchōn tōn patrikōn mou paradoseōn
ote de eudokēsen o aphorisas me ek koilias mētros mou kai kalesas dia tēs charitos autou
apokalupsai ton uion autou en emoi ina euangelizōmai auton en tois ethnesin eutheōs ou prosanethemēn sarki kai aimati
oude anēlthon eis ierosoluma pros tous pro emou apostolous alla apēlthon eis arabian kai palin upestrepsa eis damaskon
epeita meta tria etē anēlthon eis ierosoluma istorēsai kēphan kai epemeina pros auton ēmeras dekapente
eteron de tōn apostolōn ouk eidon ei mē iakōbon ton adelphon tou kuriou
a de graphō umin idou enōpion tou theou oti ou pseudomai
epeita ēlthon eis ta klimata tēs surias kai tēs kilikias
ēmēn de agnooumenos tō prosōpō tais ekklēsiais tēs ioudaias tais en christō
monon de akouontes ēsan oti o diōkōn ēmas pote nun euangelizetai tēn pistin ēn pote eporthei
kai edoxazon en emoi ton theon
epeita dia dekatessarōn etōn palin anebēn eis ierosoluma meta barnaba sunparalabōn kai titon
anebēn de kata apokalupsin kai anethemēn autois to euangelion o kērussō en tois ethnesin kat idian de tois dokousin mēpōs eis kenon trechō ē edramon
all oude titos o sun emoi ellēn ōn ēnankasthē peritmēthēnai
dia de tous pareisaktous pseudadelphous oitines pareisēlthon kataskopēsai tēn eleutherian ēmōn ēn echomen en christō iēsou ina ēmas katadoulōsousin
ois oude pros ōran eixamen tē upotagē ina ē alētheia tou euangeliou diameinē pros umas
apo de tōn dokountōn einai ti opoioi pote ēsan ouden moi diapherei prosōpon o theos anthrōpou ou lambanei emoi gar oi dokountes ouden prosanethento
alla tounantion idontes oti pepisteumai to euangelion tēs akrobustias kathōs petros tēs peritomēs
o gar energēsas petrō eis apostolēn tēs peritomēs enērgēsen kai emoi eis ta ethnē
kai gnontes tēn charin tēn dotheisan moi iakōbos kai kēphas kai iōannēs oi dokountes stuloi einai dexias edōkan emoi kai barnaba koinōnias ina ēmeis eis ta ethnē autoi de eis tēn peritomēn
monon tōn ptōchōn ina mnēmoneuōmen o kai espoudasa auto touto poiēsai
ote de ēlthen kēphas eis antiocheian kata prosōpon autō antestēn oti kategnōsmenos ēn
pro tou gar elthein tinas apo iakōbou meta tōn ethnōn sunēsthien ote de ēlthon upestellen kai aphōrizen eauton phoboumenos tous ek peritomēs
kai sunupekrithēsan autō kai oi loipoi ioudaioi ōste kai barnabas sunapēchthē autōn tē upokrisei
all ote eidon oti ouk orthopodousin pros tēn alētheian tou euangeliou eipon tō kēpha emprosthen pantōn ei su ioudaios uparchōn ethnikōs kai ouch ioudaikōs zēs pōs ta ethnē anankazeis ioudaizein
ēmeis phusei ioudaioi kai ouk ex ethnōn amartōloi

eidotes de oti ou dikaioutai anthrōpos ex ergōn nomou ean mē dia pisteōs christou iēsou kai ēmeis eis christon iēsoun episteusamen ina dikaiōthōmen ek pisteōs christou kai ouk ex ergōn nomou oti ex ergōn nomou ou dikaiōthēsetai pasa sarx
ei de zētountes dikaiōthēnai en christō eurethēmen kai autoi amartōloi ara christos amartias diakonos mē genoito
ei gar a katelusa tauta palin oikodomō parabatēn emauton sunistanō
egō gar dia nomou nomō apethanon ina theō zēsō
christō sunestaurōmai zō de ouketi egō zē de en emoi christos o de nun zō en sarki en pistei zō tē tou uiou tou theou tou agapēsantos me kai paradontos eauton uper emou
ouk athetō tēn charin tou theou ei gar dia nomou dikaiosunē ara christos dōrean apethanen
ō anoētoi galatai tis umas ebaskanen ois kat ophthalmous iēsous christos proegraphē estaurōmenos
touto monon thelō mathein aph umōn ex ergōn nomou to pneuma elabete ē ex akoēs pisteōs
outōs anoētoi este enarxamenoi pneumati nun sarki epiteleisthe
tosauta epathete eikē eige kai eikē
o oun epichorēgōn umin to pneuma kai energōn dunameis en umin ex ergōn nomou ē ex akoēs pisteōs
kathōs abraam episteusen tō theō kai elogisthē autō eis dikaiosunēn
ginōskete ara oti oi ek pisteōs outoi uioi eisin abraam
proidousa de ē graphē oti ek pisteōs dikaioi ta ethnē o theos proeuēngelisato tō abraam oti eneulogēthēsontai en soi panta ta ethnē
ōste oi ek pisteōs eulogountai sun tō pistō abraam
osoi gar ex ergōn nomou eisin upo kataran eisin gegraptai gar oti epikataratos pas os ouk emmenei pasin tois gegrammenois en tō bibliō tou nomou tou poiēsai auta
oti de en nomō oudeis dikaioutai para tō theō dēlon oti o dikaios ek pisteōs zēsetai
o de nomos ouk estin ek pisteōs alla o poiēsas auta zēsetai en autois
christos ēmas exēgorasen ek tēs kataras tou nomou genomenos uper ēmōn katara oti gegraptai epikataratos pas o kremamenos epi xulou
ina eis ta ethnē ē eulogia tou abraam genētai en christō iēsou ina tēn epangelian tou pneumatos labōmen dia tēs pisteōs
adelphoi kata anthrōpon legō omōs anthrōpou kekurōmenēn diathēkēn oudeis athetei ē epidiatassetai
tō de abraam errethēsan ai epangeliai kai tō spermati autou ou legei kai tois spermasin ōs epi pollōn all ōs eph enos kai tō spermati sou os estin christos
touto de legō diathēkēn prokekurōmenēn upo tou theou o meta tetrakosia kai triakonta etē gegonōs nomos ouk akuroi eis to katargēsai tēn epangelian
ei gar ek nomou ē klēronomia ouketi ex epangelias tō de abraam di epangelias kecharistai o theos
ti oun o nomos tōn parabaseōn charin prosetethē achris ou elthē to sperma ō epēngeltai diatageis di angelōn en cheiri mesitou
o de mesitēs enos ouk estin o de theos eis estin
o oun nomos kata tōn epangeliōn tou theou mē genoito ei gar edothē nomos o dunamenos zōopoiēsai ontōs ek nomou ēn an ē dikaiosunē
legō de eph oson chronon o klēronomos nēpios estin ouden diapherei doulou kurios pantōn ōn
alla upo epitropous estin kai oikonomous achri tēs prothesmias tou patros
outōs kai ēmeis ote ēmen nēpioi upo ta stoicheia tou kosmou ēmetha dedoulōmenoi
ote de ēlthen to plērōma tou chronou exapesteilen o theos ton uion autou genomenon ek gunaikos genomenon upo nomon
ina tous upo nomon exagorasē ina tēn uiothesian apolabōmen
oti de este uioi exapesteilen o theos to pneuma tou uiou autou eis tas kardias ēmōn krazon abba o patēr
ōste ouketi ei doulos alla uios ei de uios kai klēronomos dia theou
alla tote men ouk eidotes theon edouleusate tois phusei mē ousin theois
nun de gnontes theon mallon de gnōsthentes upo theou pōs epistrephete palin epi ta asthenē kai ptōcha stoicheia ois palin anōthen douleusai thelete
ēmeras paratēreisthe kai mēnas kai kairous kai eniautous
phoboumai umas mēpōs eikē kekopiaka eis umas
ginesthe ōs egō oti kagō ōs umeis adelphoi deomai umōn ouden me ēdikēsate
oidate de oti di astheneian tēs sarkos euēngelisamēn umin to proteron
kai ton peirasmon umōn en tē sarki mou ouk exouthenēsate oude exeptusate alla ōs angelon theou edexasthe me ōs christon iēsoun
pou oun o makarismos umōn marturō gar umin oti ei dunaton tous ophthalmous umōn exoruxantes edōkate moi
ōste echthros umōn gegona alētheuōn umin
zēlousin umas ou kalōs alla ekkleisai umas thelousin ina autous zēloute
kalon de zēlousthai en kalō pantote kai mē monon en tō pareinai me pros umas
tekna mou ous palin ōdinō mechris ou morphōthē christos en umin
ēthelon de pareinai pros umas arti kai allaxai tēn phōnēn mou oti aporoumai en umin
legete moi oi upo nomon thelontes einai ton nomon ouk akouete
gegraptai gar oti abraam duo uious eschen ena ek tēs paidiskēs kai ena ek tēs eleutheras
tē eleutheria ēmas christos ēleutherōsen stēkete oun kai mē palin zugō doulias enechesthe
ide egō paulos legō umin oti ean peritemnēsthe christos umas ouden ōphelēsei
marturomai de palin panti anthrōpō peritemnomenō oti opheiletēs estin olon ton nomon poiēsai
katērgēthēte apo christou oitines en nomō dikaiousthe tēs charitos exepesate
ēmeis gar pneumati ek pisteōs elpida dikaiosunēs apekdechometha
en gar christō iēsou oute peritomē ti ischuei oute akrobustia alla pistis di agapēs energoumenē
etrechete kalōs tis umas enekopsen alētheia mē peithesthai
ē peismonē ouk ek tou kalountos umas
mikra zumē olon to phurama zumoi
egō pepoitha eis umas en kuriō oti ouden allo phronēsete o de tarassōn umas bastasei to krima ostis ean ē
egō de adelphoi ei peritomēn eti kērussō ti eti diōkomai ara katērgētai to skandalon tou staurou
ophelon kai apokopsontai oi anastatountes umas
adelphoi ean kai prolēmphthē anthrōpos en tini paraptōmati umeis oi pneumatikoi katartizete ton toiouton en pneumati prautētos skopōn seauton mē kai su peirasthēs
allēlōn ta barē bastazete kai outōs anaplērōsete ton nomon tou christou
ei gar dokei tis einai ti mēden ōn phrenapata eauton
to de ergon eautou dokimazetō ekastos kai tote eis eauton monon to kauchēma exei kai ouk eis ton eteron
ekastos gar to idion phortion bastasei
koinōneitō de o katēchoumenos ton logon tō katēchounti en pasin agathois
mē planasthe theos ou muktērizetai o gar ean speirē anthrōpos touto kai therisei
oti o speirōn eis tēn sarka eautou ek tēs sarkos therisei phthoran o de speirōn eis to pneuma ek tou pneumatos therisei zōēn aiōnion
to de kalon poiountes mē enkakōmen kairō gar idiō therisomen mē ekluomenoi
ara oun ōs kairon echōmen ergazōmetha to agathon pros pantas malista de pros tous oikeious tēs pisteōs
idete pēlikois umin grammasin egrapsa tē emē cheiri
osoi thelousin euprosōpēsai en sarki outoi anankazousin umas peritemnesthai monon ina tō staurō tou christou mē diōkontai
oude gar oi peritemnomenoi autoi nomon phulassousin alla thelousin umas peritemnesthai ina en tē umetera sarki kauchēsōntai
emoi de mē genoito kauchasthai ei mē en tō staurō tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou di ou emoi kosmos estaurōtai kagō kosmō
oute gar peritomē ti estin oute akrobustia alla kainē ktisis
kai osoi tō kanoni toutō stoichēsousin eirēnē ep autous kai eleos kai epi ton israēl tou theou
tou loipou kopous moi mēdeis parechetō egō gar ta stigmata tou iēsou en tō sōmati mou bastazō
ē charis tou kuriou umōn iēsou christou meta tou pneumatos umōn adelphoi amēnmē ginōmetha kenodoxoi allēlous prokaloumenoi allēlois phthonountes

name: ΠΡΟΣ ΕΦΕΣΙΟΥΣ
chapters: paulos apostolos christou iēsou dia thelēmatos theou tois agiois tois ousin [en ephesō] kai pistois en christō iēsou
charis umin kai eirēnē apo theou patros ēmōn kai kuriou iēsou christou
eulogētos o theos kai patēr tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou o eulogēsas ēmas en pasē eulogia pneumatikē en tois epouraniois en christō
kathōs exelexato ēmas en autō pro katabolēs kosmou einai ēmas agious kai amōmous katenōpion autou en agapē
proorisas ēmas eis uiothesian dia iēsou christou eis auton kata tēn eudokian tou thelēmatos autou
eis epainon doxēs tēs charitos autou ēs echaritōsen ēmas en tō ēgapēmenō
en ō echomen tēn apolutrōsin dia tou aimatos autou tēn aphesin tōn paraptōmatōn kata to ploutos tēs charitos autou
ēs eperisseusen eis ēmas en pasē sophia kai phronēsei
gnōrisas ēmin to mustērion tou thelēmatos autou kata tēn eudokian autou ēn proetheto en autō
eis oikonomian tou plērōmatos tōn kairōn anakephalaiōsasthai ta panta en tō christō ta epi tois ouranois kai ta epi tēs gēs en autō
en ō kai eklērōthēmen prooristhentes kata prothesin tou ta panta energountos kata tēn boulēn tou thelēmatos autou
eis to einai ēmas eis epainon doxēs autou tous proēlpikotas en tō christō
en ō kai umeis akousantes ton logon tēs alētheias to euangelion tēs sōtērias umōn en ō kai pisteusantes esphragisthēte tō pneumati tēs epangelias tō agiō
os estin arrabōn tēs klēronomias ēmōn eis apolutrōsin tēs peripoiēseōs eis epainon tēs doxēs autou
dia touto kagō akousas tēn kath umas pistin en tō kuriō iēsou kai tēn agapēn tēn eis pantas tous agious
ou pauomai eucharistōn uper umōn mneian poioumenos epi tōn proseuchōn mou
ina o theos tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou o patēr tēs doxēs dōē umin pneuma sophias kai apokalupseōs en epignōsei autou
pephōtismenous tous ophthalmous tēs kardias umōn eis to eidenai umas tis estin ē elpis tēs klēseōs autou tis o ploutos tēs doxēs tēs klēronomias autou en tois agiois
kai ti to uperballon megethos tēs dunameōs autou eis ēmas tous pisteuontas kata tēn energeian tou kratous tēs ischuos autou
ēn enērgēken en tō christō egeiras auton ek nekrōn kai kathisas auton en dexia autou en tois epouraniois
uperanō pasēs archēs kai exousias kai dunameōs kai kuriotētos kai pantos onomatos onomazomenou ou monon en tō aiōni toutō alla kai en tō mellonti
kai panta upetaxen upo tous podas autou kai auton edōken kephalēn uper panta tē ekklēsia
ētis estin to sōma autou to plērōma tou ta panta en pasin plēroumenou
kai umas ontas nekrous tois paraptōmasin kai tais amartiais umōn
en ais pote periepatēsate kata ton aiōna tou kosmou toutou kata ton archonta tēs exousias tou aeros tou pneumatos tou nun energountos en tois uiois tēs apeitheias
en ois kai ēmeis pantes anestraphēmen pote en tais epithumiais tēs sarkos ēmōn poiountes ta thelēmata tēs sarkos kai tōn dianoiōn kai ēmetha tekna phusei orgēs ōs kai oi loipoi
o de theos plousios ōn en eleei dia tēn pollēn agapēn autou ēn ēgapēsen ēmas
kai ontas ēmas nekrous tois paraptōmasin sunezōopoiēsen tō christō chariti este sesōsmenoi
kai sunēgeiren kai sunekathisen en tois epouraniois en christō iēsou
ina endeixētai en tois aiōsin tois eperchomenois to uperballon ploutos tēs charitos autou en chrēstotēti eph ēmas en christō iēsou
tē gar chariti este sesōsmenoi dia pisteōs kai touto ouk ex umōn theou to dōron
ouk ex ergōn ina mē tis kauchēsētai
autou gar esmen poiēma ktisthentes en christō iēsou epi ergois agathois ois proētoimasen o theos ina en autois peripatēsōmen
dio mnēmoneuete oti pote umeis ta ethnē en sarki oi legomenoi akrobustia upo tēs legomenēs peritomēs en sarki cheiropoiētou
oti ēte tō kairō ekeinō chōris christou apēllotriōmenoi tēs politeias tou israēl kai xenoi tōn diathēkōn tēs epangelias elpida mē echontes kai atheoi en tō kosmō
nuni de en christō iēsou umeis oi pote ontes makran egenēthēte engus en tō aimati tou christou
autos gar estin ē eirēnē ēmōn o poiēsas ta amphotera en kai to mesotoichon tou phragmou lusas
tēn echthran en tē sarki autou ton nomon tōn entolōn en dogmasin katargēsas ina tous duo ktisē en autō eis ena kainon anthrōpon poiōn eirēnēn
kai apokatallaxē tous amphoterous en eni sōmati tō theō dia tou staurou apokteinas tēn echthran en autō
kai elthōn euēngelisato eirēnēn umin tois makran kai eirēnēn tois engus
oti di autou echomen tēn prosagōgēn oi amphoteroi en eni pneumati pros ton patera
ara oun ouketi este xenoi kai paroikoi alla este sunpolitai tōn agiōn kai oikeioi tou theou
epoikodomēthentes epi tō themeliō tōn apostolōn kai prophētōn ontos akrogōniaiou autou christou iēsou
en ō pasa oikodomē sunarmologoumenē auxei eis naon agion en kuriō
en ō kai umeis sunoikodomeisthe eis katoikētērion tou theou en pneumati
toutou charin egō paulos o desmios tou christou uper umōn tōn ethnōn
eige ēkousate tēn oikonomian tēs charitos tou theou tēs dotheisēs moi eis umas
oti kata apokalupsin egnōristhē moi to mustērion kathōs proegrapsa en oligō
pros o dunasthe anaginōskontes noēsai tēn sunesin mou en tō mustēriō tou christou
o eterais geneais ouk egnōristhē tois uiois tōn anthrōpōn ōs nun apekaluphthē tois agiois apostolois autou kai prophētais en pneumati
einai ta ethnē sunklēronoma kai sunsōma kai sunmetocha tēs epangelias en christō iēsou dia tou euangeliou
ou egenēthēn diakonos kata tēn dōrean tēs charitos tou theou tēs dotheisēs moi kata tēn energeian tēs dunameōs autou
emoi tō elachistoterō pantōn agiōn edothē ē charis autē tois ethnesin euangelisasthai to anexichniaston ploutos tou christou
kai phōtisai tis ē oikonomia tou mustēriou tou apokekrummenou apo tōn aiōnōn en tō theō tō ta panta ktisanti
ina gnōristhē nun tais archais kai tais exousiais en tois epouraniois dia tēs ekklēsias ē polupoikilos sophia tou theou
kata prothesin tōn aiōnōn ēn epoiēsen en tō christō iēsou tō kuriō ēmōn
en ō echomen tēn parrēsian kai prosagōgēn en pepoithēsei dia tēs pisteōs autou
dio aitoumai mē enkakein en tais thlipsesin mou uper umōn ētis estin doxa umōn
toutou charin kamptō ta gonata mou pros ton patera
ex ou pasa patria en ouranois kai epi gēs onomazetai
ina dō umin kata to ploutos tēs doxēs autou dunamei krataiōthēnai dia tou pneumatos autou eis ton esō anthrōpon
katoikēsai ton christon dia tēs pisteōs en tais kardiais umōn
en agapē errizōmenoi kai tethemeliōmenoi ina exischusēte katalabesthai sun pasin tois agiois ti to platos kai mēkos kai bathos kai upsos
gnōnai te tēn uperballousan tēs gnōseōs agapēn tou christou ina plērōthēte eis pan to plērōma tou theou
tō de dunamenō uper panta poiēsai uperekperissou ōn aitoumetha ē nooumen kata tēn dunamin tēn energoumenēn en ēmin
autō ē doxa en tē ekklēsia kai en christō iēsou eis pasas tas geneas tou aiōnos tōn aiōnōn amēn
parakalō oun umas egō o desmios en kuriō axiōs peripatēsai tēs klēseōs ēs eklēthēte
meta pasēs tapeinophrosunēs kai prautētos meta makrothumias anechomenoi allēlōn en agapē
spoudazontes tērein tēn enotēta tou pneumatos en tō sundesmō tēs eirēnēs
en sōma kai en pneuma kathōs kai eklēthēte en mia elpidi tēs klēseōs umōn
eis kurios mia pistis en baptisma
eis theos kai patēr pantōn o epi pantōn kai dia pantōn kai en pasin
eni de ekastō ēmōn edothē ē charis kata to metron tēs dōreas tou christou
dio legei anabas eis upsos ēchmalōteusen aichmalōsian edōken domata tois anthrōpois
to de anebē ti estin ei mē oti kai katebē eis ta katōtera merē tēs gēs
o katabas autos estin kai o anabas uperanō pantōn tōn ouranōn ina plērōsē ta panta
kai autos edōken tous men apostolous tous de prophētas tous de euangelistas tous de poimenas kai didaskalous
pros ton katartismon tōn agiōn eis ergon diakonias eis oikodomēn tou sōmatos tou christou
ginesthe oun mimētai tou theou ōs tekna agapēta
kai peripateite en agapē kathōs kai o christos ēgapēsen umas kai paredōken eauton uper ēmōn prosphoran kai thusian tō theō eis osmēn euōdias
porneia de kai akatharsia pasa ē pleonexia mēde onomazesthō en umin kathōs prepei agiois
kai aischrotēs ē mōrologia ē eutrapelia a ouk anēken alla mallon eucharistia
touto gar iste ginōskontes oti pas pornos ē akathartos ē pleonektēs o estin eidōlolatrēs ouk echei klēronomian en tē basileia tou christou kai theou
mēdeis umas apatatō kenois logois dia tauta gar erchetai ē orgē tou theou epi tous uious tēs apeitheias
ēte gar pote skotos nun de phōs en kuriō ōs tekna phōtos peripateite
o gar karpos tou phōtos en pasē agathōsunē kai dikaiosunē kai alētheia
dokimazontes ti estin euareston tō kuriō
kai mē sunkoinōneite tois ergois tois akarpois tou skotous mallon de kai elenchete
ta gar kruphē ginomena up autōn aischron estin kai legein
ta de panta elenchomena upo tou phōtos phaneroutai pan gar to phaneroumenon phōs estin
dio legei egeire o katheudōn kai anasta ek tōn nekrōn kai epiphausei soi o christos
blepete oun akribōs pōs peripateite mē ōs asophoi all ōs sophoi
exagorazomenoi ton kairon oti ai ēmerai ponērai eisin
dia touto mē ginesthe aphrones alla suniete ti to thelēma tou kuriou
kai mē methuskesthe oinō en ō estin asōtia alla plērousthe en pneumati
lalountes eautois psalmois kai umnois kai ōdais pneumatikais adontes kai psallontes tē kardia umōn tō kuriō
eucharistountes pantote uper pantōn en onomati tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou tō theō kai patri
ai gunaikes tois idiois andrasin ōs tō kuriō
oti anēr estin kephalē tēs gunaikos ōs kai o christos kephalē tēs ekklēsias autos sōtēr tou sōmatos
alla ōs ē ekklēsia upotassetai tō christō outōs kai ai gunaikes tois andrasin en panti
oi andres agapate tas gunaikas kathōs kai o christos ēgapēsen tēn ekklēsian kai eauton paredōken uper autēs
ta tekna upakouete tois goneusin umōn en kuriō touto gar estin dikaion
tima ton patera sou kai tēn mētera ētis estin entolē prōtē en epangelia
ina eu soi genētai kai esē makrochronios epi tēs gēs
kai oi pateres mē parorgizete ta tekna umōn alla ektrephete auta en paideia kai nouthesia kuriou
oi douloi upakouete tois kata sarka kuriois meta phobou kai tromou en aplotēti kardias umōn ōs tō christō
mē kat ophthalmodoulian ōs anthrōpareskoi all ōs douloi christou poiountes to thelēma tou theou ek psuchēs
met eunoias douleuontes ōs tō kuriō kai ouk anthrōpois
eidotes oti ekastos ean ti poiēsē agathon touto komisetai para kuriou eite doulos eite eleutheros
kai oi kurioi ta auta poieite pros autous anientes tēn apeilēn eidotes oti kai autōn kai umōn o kurios estin en ouranois kai prosōpolēmpsia ouk estin par autō
tou loipou endunamousthe en kuriō kai en tō kratei tēs ischuos autou
endusasthe tēn panoplian tou theou pros to dunasthai umas stēnai pros tas methodias tou diabolou
oti ouk estin ēmin ē palē pros aima kai sarka alla pros tas archas pros tas exousias pros tous kosmokratoras tou skotous toutou pros ta pneumatika tēs ponērias en tois epouraniois
dia touto analabete tēn panoplian tou theou ina dunēthēte antistēnai en tē ēmera tē ponēra kai apanta katergasamenoi stēnai
stēte oun perizōsamenoi tēn osphun umōn en alētheia kai endusamenoi ton thōraka tēs dikaiosunēs
kai upodēsamenoi tous podas en etoimasia tou euangeliou tēs eirēnēs
en pasin analabontes ton thureon tēs pisteōs en ō dunēsesthe panta ta belē tou ponērou ta pepurōmena sbesai
kai tēn perikephalaian tou sōtēriou dexasthe kai tēn machairan tou pneumatos o estin rēma theou
dia pasēs proseuchēs kai deēseōs proseuchomenoi en panti kairō en pneumati kai eis auto agrupnountes en pasē proskarterēsei kai deēsei peri pantōn tōn agiōn
kai uper emou ina moi dothē logos en anoixei tou stomatos mou en parrēsia gnōrisai to mustērion tou euangeliou
uper ou presbeuō en alusei ina en autō parrēsiasōmai ōs dei me lalēsai
ina de kai umeis eidēte ta kat eme ti prassō panta gnōrisei umin tuchikos o agapētos adelphos kai pistos diakonos en kuriō
on epempsa pros umas eis auto touto ina gnōte ta peri ēmōn kai parakalesē tas kardias umōn
eirēnē tois adelphois kai agapē meta pisteōs apo theou patros kai kuriou iēsou christou

name: ΠΡΟΣ ΦΙΛΙΠΠΗΣΙΟΥΣ
chapters: paulos kai timotheos douloi christou iēsou pasin tois agiois en christō iēsou tois ousin en philippois sun episkopois kai diakonois
charis umin kai eirēnē apo theou patros ēmōn kai kuriou iēsou christou
eucharistō tō theō mou epi pasē tē mneia umōn
pantote en pasē deēsei mou uper pantōn umōn meta charas tēn deēsin poioumenos
epi tē koinōnia umōn eis to euangelion apo tēs prōtēs ēmeras achri tou nun
pepoithōs auto touto oti o enarxamenos en umin ergon agathon epitelesei achri ēmeras christou iēsou

kathōs estin dikaion emoi touto phronein uper pantōn umōn dia to echein me en tē kardia umas en te tois desmois mou kai en tē apologia kai bebaiōsei tou euangeliou sunkoinōnous mou tēs charitos pantas umas ontas
martus gar mou o theos ōs epipothō pantas umas en splanchnois christou iēsou
kai touto proseuchomai ina ē agapē umōn eti mallon kai mallon perisseuē en epignōsei kai pasē aisthēsei
eis to dokimazein umas ta diapheronta ina ēte eilikrineis kai aproskopoi eis ēmeran christou
peplērōmenoi karpon dikaiosunēs ton dia iēsou christou eis doxan kai epainon theou
ginōskein de umas boulomai adelphoi oti ta kat eme mallon eis prokopēn tou euangeliou elēluthen
ōste tous desmous mou phanerous en christō genesthai en olō tō praitōriō kai tois loipois pasin
kai tous pleionas tōn adelphōn en kuriō pepoithotas tois desmois mou perissoterōs tolman aphobōs ton logon tou theou lalein
tines men kai dia phthonon kai erin tines de kai di eudokian ton christon kērussousin
oi men ex agapēs eidotes oti eis apologian tou euangeliou keimai
oi de ex eritheias ton christon katangellousin ouch agnōs oiomenoi thlipsin egeirein tois desmois mou
ti gar plēn oti panti tropō eite prophasei eite alētheia christos katangelletai kai en toutō chairō alla kai charēsomai
oida gar oti touto moi apobēsetai eis sōtērian dia tēs umōn deēseōs kai epichorēgias tou pneumatos iēsou christou
kata tēn apokaradokian kai elpida mou oti en oudeni aischunthēsomai all en pasē parrēsia ōs pantote kai nun megalunthēsetai christos en tō sōmati mou eite dia zōēs eite dia thanatou
emoi gar to zēn christos kai to apothanein kerdos
ei de to zēn en sarki touto moi karpos ergou kai ti airēsomai ou gnōrizō
sunechomai de ek tōn duo tēn epithumian echōn eis to analusai kai sun christō einai pollō gar mallon kreisson
to de epimenein tē sarki anankaioteron di umas
kai touto pepoithōs oida oti menō kai paramenō pasin umin eis tēn umōn prokopēn kai charan tēs pisteōs
ina to kauchēma umōn perisseuē en christō iēsou en emoi dia tēs emēs parousias palin pros umas
monon axiōs tou euangeliou tou christou politeuesthe ina eite elthōn kai idōn umas eite apōn akouō ta peri umōn oti stēkete en eni pneumati mia psuchē sunathlountes tē pistei tou euangeliou
kai mē pturomenoi en mēdeni upo tōn antikeimenōn ētis estin autois endeixis apōleias umōn de sōtērias kai touto apo theou
oti umin echaristhē to uper christou ou monon to eis auton pisteuein alla kai to uper autou paschein
ton auton agōna echontes oion eidete en emoi kai nun akouete en emoi
ei tis oun paraklēsis en christō ei ti paramuthion agapēs ei tis koinōnia pneumatos ei tis splanchna kai oiktirmoi
plērōsate mou tēn charan ina to auto phronēte tēn autēn agapēn echontes sunpsuchoi to en phronountes
mēden kat eritheian mēde kata kenodoxian alla tē tapeinophrosunē allēlous ēgoumenoi uperechontas eautōn
mē ta eautōn ekastos skopountes alla kai ta eterōn ekastoi
touto phroneite en umin o kai en christō iēsou
os en morphē theou uparchōn ouch arpagmon ēgēsato to einai isa theō
alla eauton ekenōsen morphēn doulou labōn en omoiōmati anthrōpōn genomenos kai schēmati euretheis ōs anthrōpos
etapeinōsen eauton genomenos upēkoos mechri thanatou thanatou de staurou
dio kai o theos auton uperupsōsen kai echarisato autō to onoma to uper pan onoma
ina en tō onomati iēsou pan gonu kampsē epouraniōn kai epigeiōn kai katachthoniōn
kai pasa glōssa exomologēsētai oti kurios iēsous christos eis doxan theou patros
ōste agapētoi mou kathōs pantote upēkousate mē ōs en tē parousia mou monon alla nun pollō mallon en tē apousia mou meta phobou kai tromou tēn eautōn sōtērian katergazesthe
theos gar estin o energōn en umin kai to thelein kai to energein uper tēs eudokias
panta poieite chōris gongusmōn kai dialogismōn
ina genēsthe amemptoi kai akeraioi tekna theou amōma meson geneas skolias kai diestrammenēs en ois phainesthe ōs phōstēres en kosmō
logon zōēs epechontes eis kauchēma emoi eis ēmeran christou oti ouk eis kenon edramon oude eis kenon ekopiasa
alla ei kai spendomai epi tē thusia kai leitourgia tēs pisteōs umōn chairō kai sunchairō pasin umin
to de auto kai umeis chairete kai sunchairete moi
elpizō de en kuriō iēsou timotheon tacheōs pempsai umin ina kagō eupsuchō gnous ta peri umōn
oudena gar echō isopsuchon ostis gnēsiōs ta peri umōn merimnēsei
oi pantes gar ta eautōn zētousin ou ta christou iēsou
tēn de dokimēn autou ginōskete oti ōs patri teknon sun emoi edouleusen eis to euangelion
touton men oun elpizō pempsai ōs an aphidō ta peri eme exautēs
pepoitha de en kuriō oti kai autos tacheōs eleusomai
anankaion de ēgēsamēn epaphroditon ton adelphon kai sunergon kai sunstratiōtēn mou umōn de apostolon kai leitourgon tēs chreias mou pempsai pros umas
epeidē epipothōn ēn pantas umas kai adēmonōn dioti ēkousate oti ēsthenēsen
kai gar ēsthenēsen paraplēsion thanatō alla o theos ēleēsen auton ouk auton de monon alla kai eme ina mē lupēn epi lupēn schō
spoudaioterōs oun epempsa auton ina idontes auton palin charēte kagō alupoteros ō
prosdechesthe oun auton en kuriō meta pasēs charas kai tous toioutous entimous echete
oti dia to ergon christou mechri thanatou ēngisen paraboleusamenos tē psuchē ina anaplērōsē to umōn usterēma tēs pros me leitourgias
to loipon adelphoi mou chairete en kuriō ta auta graphein umin emoi men ouk oknēron umin de asphales
blepete tous kunas blepete tous kakous ergatas blepete tēn katatomēn
ēmeis gar esmen ē peritomē oi pneumati theou latreuontes kai kauchōmenoi en christō iēsou kai ouk en sarki pepoithotes
kaiper egō echōn pepoithēsin kai en sarki ei tis dokei allos pepoithenai en sarki egō mallon
peritomē oktaēmeros ek genous israēl phulēs beniamein ebraios ex ebraiōn kata nomon pharisaios
kata zēlos diōkōn tēn ekklēsian kata dikaiosunēn tēn en nomō genomenos amemptos
atina ēn moi kerdē tauta ēgēmai dia ton christon zēmian
alla menounge kai ēgoumai panta zēmian einai dia to uperechon tēs gnōseōs christou iēsou tou kuriou mou di on ta panta ezēmiōthēn kai ēgoumai skubala ina christon kerdēsō
kai eurethō en autō mē echōn emēn dikaiosunēn tēn ek nomou alla tēn dia pisteōs christou tēn ek theou dikaiosunēn epi tē pistei
tou gnōnai auton kai tēn dunamin tēs anastaseōs autou kai koinōnian pathēmatōn autou sunmorphizomenos tō thanatō autou
eipōs katantēsō eis tēn exanastasin tēn ek nekrōn
ouch oti ēdē elabon ē ēdē teteleiōmai diōkō de ei katalabō eph ō kai katelēmphthēn upo christou iēsou
adelphoi egō emauton oupō logizomai kateilēphenai
en de ta men opisō epilanthanomenos tois de emprosthen epekteinomenos kata skopon diōkō eis to brabeion tēs anō klēseōs tou theou en christō iēsou
osoi oun teleioi touto phronōmen kai ei ti eterōs phroneite kai touto o theos umin apokalupsei
plēn eis o ephthasamen tō autō stoichein
sunmimētai mou ginesthe adelphoi kai skopeite tous outōs peripatountas kathōs echete tupon ēmas
polloi gar peripatousin ous pollakis elegon umin nun de kai klaiōn legō tous echthrous tou staurou tou christou
ōn to telos apōleia ōn o theos ē koilia kai ē doxa en tē aischunē autōn oi ta epigeia phronountes
ēmōn gar to politeuma en ouranois uparchei ex ou kai sōtēra apekdechometha kurion iēsoun christon
os metaschēmatisei to sōma tēs tapeinōseōs ēmōn sunmorphon tō sōmati tēs doxēs autou kata tēn energeian tou dunasthai auton kai upotaxai autō ta panta
ōste adelphoi mou agapētoi kai epipothētoi chara kai stephanos mou outōs stēkete en kuriō agapētoi
euodian parakalō kai suntuchēn parakalō to auto phronein en kuriō
nai erōtō kai se gnēsie sunzuge sunlambanou autais aitines en tō euangeliō sunēthlēsan moi meta kai klēmentos kai tōn loipōn sunergōn mou ōn ta onomata en biblō zōēs
chairete en kuriō pantote palin erō chairete
to epieikes umōn gnōsthētō pasin anthrōpois o kurios engus
mēden merimnate all en panti tē proseuchē kai tē deēsei meta eucharistias ta aitēmata umōn gnōrizesthō pros ton theon
kai ē eirēnē tou theou ē uperechousa panta noun phrourēsei tas kardias umōn kai ta noēmata umōn en christō iēsou
to loipon adelphoi osa estin alēthē osa semna osa dikaia osa agna osa prosphilē osa euphēma ei tis aretē kai ei tis epainos tauta logizesthe
a kai emathete kai parelabete kai ēkousate kai eidete en emoi tauta prassete kai o theos tēs eirēnēs estai meth umōn
echarēn de en kuriō megalōs oti ēdē pote anethalete to uper emou phronein eph ō kai ephroneite ēkaireisthe de
ouch oti kath usterēsin legō egō gar emathon en ois eimi autarkēs einai
oida kai tapeinousthai oida kai perisseuein en panti kai en pasin memuēmai kai chortazesthai kai peinan kai perisseuein kai ustereisthai
panta ischuō en tō endunamounti me
plēn kalōs epoiēsate sunkoinōnēsantes mou tē thlipsei
oidate de kai umeis philippēsioi oti en archē tou euangeliou ote exēlthon apo makedonias oudemia moi ekklēsia ekoinōnēsen eis logon doseōs kai lēmpseōs ei mē umeis monoi
oti kai en thessalonikē kai apax kai dis eis tēn chreian moi epempsate
ouch oti epizētō to doma alla epizētō ton karpon ton pleonazonta eis logon umōn
apechō de panta kai perisseuō peplērōmai dexamenos para epaphroditou ta par umōn osmēn euōdias thusian dektēn euareston tō theō
o de theos mou plērōsei pasan chreian umōn kata to ploutos autou en doxē en christō iēsou
tō de theō kai patri ēmōn ē doxa eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn amēn
aspasasthe panta agion en christō iēsou aspazontai umas oi sun emoi adelphoi
aspazontai umas pantes oi agioi malista de oi ek tēs kaisaros oikias

ē charis tou kuriou iēsou christou meta tou pneumatos umōnos metaschēmatisei to sōma tēs tapeinōseōs ēmōn sunmorphon tō sōmati tēs doxēs autou kata tēn energeian tou dunasthai auton kai upotaxai autō ta panta

name: ΠΡΟΣ ΚΟΛΟΣΣΑΕΙΣ
chapters: paulos apostolos christou iēsou dia thelēmatos theou kai timotheos o adelphos
tois en kolossais agiois kai pistois adelphois en christō charis umin kai eirēnē apo theou patros ēmōn
eucharistoumen tō theō kai patri tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou pantote peri umōn proseuchomenoi
akousantes tēn pistin umōn en christō iēsou kai tēn agapēn ēn echete eis pantas tous agious
dia tēn elpida tēn apokeimenēn umin en tois ouranois ēn proēkousate en tō logō tēs alētheias tou euangeliou
tou parontos eis umas kathōs kai en panti tō kosmō estin karpophoroumenon kai auxanomenon kathōs kai en umin aph ēs ēmeras ēkousate kai epegnōte tēn charin tou theou en alētheia
kathōs emathete apo epaphra tou agapētou sundoulou ēmōn os estin pistos uper umōn diakonos tou christou
o kai dēlōsas ēmin tēn umōn agapēn en pneumati
dia touto kai ēmeis aph ēs ēmeras ēkousamen ou pauometha uper umōn proseuchomenoi kai aitoumenoi ina plērōthēte tēn epignōsin tou thelēmatos autou en pasē sophia kai sunesei pneumatikē
peripatēsai axiōs tou kuriou eis pasan areskeian en panti ergō agathō karpophorountes kai auxanomenoi tē epignōsei tou theou
en pasē dunamei dunamoumenoi kata to kratos tēs doxēs autou eis pasan upomonēn kai makrothumian meta charas
eucharistountes tō patri tō ikanōsanti umas eis tēn merida tou klērou tōn agiōn en tō phōti
os erusato ēmas ek tēs exousias tou skotous kai metestēsen eis tēn basileian tou uiou tēs agapēs autou
en ō echomen tēn apolutrōsin tēn aphesin tōn amartiōn
os estin eikōn tou theou tou aoratou prōtotokos pasēs ktiseōs
oti en autō ektisthē ta panta en tois ouranois kai epi tēs gēs ta orata kai ta aorata eite thronoi eite kuriotētes eite archai eite exousiai ta panta di autou kai eis auton ektistai
kai autos estin pro pantōn kai ta panta en autō sunestēken
kai autos estin ē kephalē tou sōmatos tēs ekklēsias os estin ē archē prōtotokos ek tōn nekrōn ina genētai en pasin autos prōteuōn
thelō gar umas eidenai ēlikon agōna echō uper umōn kai tōn en laodikia kai osoi ouch eorakan to prosōpon mou en sarki
ina paraklēthōsin ai kardiai autōn sumbibasthentes en agapē kai eis pan ploutos tēs plērophorias tēs suneseōs eis epignōsin tou mustēriou tou theou christou
en ō eisin pantes oi thēsauroi tēs sophias kai gnōseōs apokruphoi
touto legō ina mēdeis umas paralogizētai en pithanologia
ei gar kai tē sarki apeimi alla tō pneumati sun umin eimi chairōn kai blepōn umōn tēn taxin kai to stereōma tēs eis christon pisteōs umōn
ōs oun parelabete ton christon iēsoun ton kurion en autō peripateite
errizōmenoi kai epoikodomoumenoi en autō kai bebaioumenoi tē pistei kathōs edidachthēte perisseuontes en eucharistia
blepete mē tis umas estai o sulagōgōn dia tēs philosophias kai kenēs apatēs kata tēn paradosin tōn anthrōpōn kata ta stoicheia tou kosmou kai ou kata christon
oti en autō katoikei pan to plērōma tēs theotētos sōmatikōs
kai este en autō peplērōmenoi os estin ē kephalē pasēs archēs kai exousias
en ō kai perietmēthēte peritomē acheiropoiētō en tē apekdusei tou sōmatos tēs sarkos en tē peritomē tou christou
suntaphentes autō en tō baptismati en ō kai sunēgerthēte dia tēs pisteōs tēs energeias tou theou tou egeirantos auton ek nekrōn
kai umas nekrous ontas tois paraptōmasin kai tē akrobustia tēs sarkos umōn sunezōopoiēsen umas sun autō charisamenos ēmin panta ta paraptōmata
exaleipsas to kath ēmōn cheirographon tois dogmasin o ēn upenantion ēmin kai auto ērken ek tou mesou prosēlōsas auto tō staurō
apekdusamenos tas archas kai tas exousias edeigmatisen en parrēsia thriambeusas autous en autō
mē oun tis umas krinetō en brōsei ē en posei ē en merei eortēs ē noumēnias ē sabbatōn
a estin skia tōn mellontōn to de sōma tou christou
mēdeis umas katabrabeuetō thelōn en tapeinophrosunē kai thrēskia tōn angelōn a eoraken embateuōn eikē phusioumenos upo tou noos tēs sarkos autou
kai ou kratōn tēn kephalēn ex ou pan to sōma dia tōn aphōn kai sundesmōn epichorēgoumenon kai sunbibazomenon auxei tēn auxēsin tou theou
ei apethanete sun christō apo tōn stoicheiōn tou kosmou ti ōs zōntes en kosmō dogmatizesthe
mē apsē mēde geusē mēde thigēs
a estin panta eis phthoran tē apochrēsei kata ta entalmata kai didaskalias tōn anthrōpōn
atina estin logon men echonta sophias en ethelothrēskia kai tapeinophrosunē kai apheidia sōmatos ouk en timē tini pros plēsmonēn tēs sarkos
ei oun sunēgerthēte tō christō ta anō zēteite ou o christos estin en dexia tou theou kathēmenos
ta anō phroneite mē ta epi tēs gēs
apethanete gar kai ē zōē umōn kekruptai sun tō christō en tō theō
otan o christos phanerōthē ē zōē umōn tote kai umeis sun autō phanerōthēsesthe en doxē
nekrōsate oun ta melē ta epi tēs gēs porneian akatharsian pathos epithumian kakēn kai tēn pleonexian ētis estin eidōlolatreia
di a erchetai ē orgē tou theou
en ois kai umeis periepatēsate pote ote ezēte en toutois
nuni de apothesthe kai umeis ta panta orgēn thumon kakian blasphēmian aischrologian ek tou stomatos umōn
mē pseudesthe eis allēlous apekdusamenoi ton palaion anthrōpon sun tais praxesin autou
kai endusamenoi ton neon ton anakainoumenon eis epignōsin kat eikona tou ktisantos auton
opou ouk eni ellēn kai ioudaios peritomē kai akrobustia barbaros skuthēs doulos eleutheros alla ta panta kai en pasin christos
endusasthe oun ōs eklektoi tou theou agioi kai ēgapēmenoi splanchna oiktirmou chrēstotēta tapeinophrosunēn prautēta makrothumian
anechomenoi allēlōn kai charizomenoi eautois ean tis pros tina echē momphēn kathōs kai o christos echarisato umin outōs kai umeis
epi pasin de toutois tēn agapēn o estin sundesmos tēs teleiotētos
kai ē eirēnē tou christou brabeuetō en tais kardiais umōn eis ēn kai eklēthēte en eni sōmati kai eucharistoi ginesthe
o logos tou christou enoikeitō en umin plousiōs en pasē sophia didaskontes kai nouthetountes eautous psalmois umnois ōdais pneumatikais en chariti adontes en tais kardiais umōn tō theō
kai pan o ti an poiēte en logō ē en ergō panta en onomati kuriou iēsou eucharistountes tō theō patri di autou
ai gunaikes upotassesthe tois andrasin ōs anēken en kuriō
oi andres agapate tas gunaikas kai mē pikrainesthe pros autas
ta tekna upakouete tois goneusin kata panta touto gar euareston estin en kuriō
oi pateres mē erethizete ta tekna umōn ina mē athumōsin
oi douloi upakouete kata panta tois kata sarka kuriois mē en ophthalmodouliais ōs anthrōpareskoi all en aplotēti kardias phoboumenoi ton kurion
o ean poiēte ek psuchēs ergazesthe ōs tō kuriō kai ouk anthrōpois
eidotes oti apo kuriou apolēmpsesthe tēn antapodosin tēs klēronomias tō kuriō christō douleuete
o gar adikōn komieitai o ēdikēsen kai ouk estin prosōpolēmpsia
oi kurioi to dikaion kai tēn isotēta tois doulois parechesthe eidotes oti kai umeis echete kurion en ouranō
tē proseuchē proskartereite grēgorountes en autē en eucharistia
proseuchomenoi ama kai peri ēmōn ina o theos anoixē ēmin thuran tou logou lalēsai to mustērion tou christou di o kai dedemai
ina phanerōsō auto ōs dei me lalēsai
en sophia peripateite pros tous exō ton kairon exagorazomenoi
o logos umōn pantote en chariti alati ērtumenos eidenai pōs dei umas eni ekastō apokrinesthai
ta kat eme panta gnōrisei umin tuchikos o agapētos adelphos kai pistos diakonos kai sundoulos en kuriō
on epempsa pros umas eis auto touto ina gnōte ta peri ēmōn kai parakalesē tas kardias umōn
sun onēsimō tō pistō kai agapētō adelphō os estin ex umōn panta umin gnōrisousin ta ōde
aspazetai umas aristarchos o sunaichmalōtos mou kai markos o anepsios barnaba peri ou elabete entolas ean elthē pros umas dexasthe auton
kai iēsous o legomenos ioustos oi ontes ek peritomēs outoi monoi sunergoi eis tēn basileian tou theou oitines egenēthēsan moi parēgoria
aspazetai umas epaphras o ex umōn doulos christou iēsou pantote agōnizomenos uper umōn en tais proseuchais ina stathēte teleioi kai peplērophorēmenoi en panti thelēmati tou theou
marturō gar autō oti echei polun ponon uper umōn kai tōn en laodikia kai tōn en ierapolei
aspazetai umas loukas o iatros o agapētos kai dēmas
aspasasthe tous en laodikia adelphous kai numphan kai tēn kat oikon autōn ekklēsian
kai otan anagnōsthē par umin ē epistolē poiēsate ina kai en tē laodikeōn ekklēsia anagnōsthē kai tēn ek laodikias ina kai umeis anagnōte
kai eipate archippō blepe tēn diakonian ēn parelabes en kuriō ina autēn plērois
o aspasmos tē emē cheiri paulou mnēmoneuete mou tōn desmōn ē charis meth umōno gar adikōn komieitai o ēdikēsen kai ouk estin prosōpolēmpsia

name: ΠΡΟΣ ΘΕΣΣΑΛΟΝΙΚΕΙΣ Α΄
chapters: paulos kai silouanos kai timotheos tē ekklēsia thessalonikeōn en theō patri kai kuriō iēsou christō charis umin kai eirēnē
eucharistoumen tō theō pantote peri pantōn umōn mneian poioumenoi epi tōn proseuchōn ēmōn
adialeiptōs mnēmoneuontes umōn tou ergou tēs pisteōs kai tou kopou tēs agapēs kai tēs upomonēs tēs elpidos tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou emprosthen tou theou kai patros ēmōn
eidotes adelphoi ēgapēmenoi upo tou theou tēn eklogēn umōn
oti to euangelion ēmōn ouk egenēthē eis umas en logō monon alla kai en dunamei kai en pneumati agiō kai plērophoria pollē kathōs oidate oioi egenēthēmen en umin di umas
kai umeis mimētai ēmōn egenēthēte kai tou kuriou dexamenoi ton logon en thlipsei pollē meta charas pneumatos agiou
ōste genesthai umas tupon pasin tois pisteuousin en tē makedonia kai en tē achaia
aph umōn gar exēchētai o logos tou kuriou ou monon en tē makedonia kai en tē achaia all en panti topō ē pistis umōn ē pros ton theon exelēluthen ōste mē chreian echein ēmas lalein ti
autoi gar peri ēmōn apangellousin opoian eisodon eschomen pros umas kai pōs epestrepsate pros ton theon apo tōn eidōlōn douleuein theō zōnti kai alēthinō
kai anamenein ton uion autou ek tōn ouranōn on ēgeiren ek tōn nekrōn iēsoun ton ruomenon ēmas ek tēs orgēs tēs erchomenēs
autoi gar oidate adelphoi tēn eisodon ēmōn tēn pros umas oti ou kenē gegonen
alla propathontes kai ubristhentes kathōs oidate en philippois eparrēsiasametha en tō theō ēmōn lalēsai pros umas to euangelion tou theou en pollō agōni
ē gar paraklēsis ēmōn ouk ek planēs oude ex akatharsias oude en dolō
alla kathōs dedokimasmetha upo tou theou pisteuthēnai to euangelion outōs laloumen ouch ōs anthrōpois areskontes alla theō tō dokimazonti tas kardias ēmōn
oute gar pote en logō kolakias egenēthēmen kathōs oidate oute en prophasei pleonexias theos martus
oute zētountes ex anthrōpōn doxan oute aph umōn oute ap allōn dunamenoi en barei einai ōs christou apostoloi
alla egenēthēmen nēpioi en mesō umōn ōs ean trophos thalpē ta eautēs tekna
outōs omeiromenoi umōn eudokoumen metadounai umin ou monon to euangelion tou theou alla kai tas eautōn psuchas dioti agapētoi ēmin egenēthēte
mnēmoneuete gar adelphoi ton kopon ēmōn kai ton mochthon nuktos kai ēmeras ergazomenoi pros to mē epibarēsai tina umōn ekēruxamen eis umas to euangelion tou theou
umeis martures kai o theos ōs osiōs kai dikaiōs kai amemptōs umin tois pisteuousin egenēthēmen
kathaper oidate ōs ena ekaston umōn ōs patēr tekna eautou parakalountes umas kai paramuthoumenoi
kai marturomenoi eis to peripatein umas axiōs tou theou tou kalountos umas eis tēn eautou basileian kai doxan

kai dia touto kai ēmeis eucharistoumen tō theō adialeiptōs oti paralabontes logon akoēs par ēmōn tou theou edexasthe ou logon anthrōpōn alla kathōs estin alēthōs logon theou os kai energeitai en umin tois pisteuousin
umeis gar mimētai egenēthēte adelphoi tōn ekklēsiōn tou theou tōn ousōn en tē ioudaia en christō iēsou oti ta auta epathete kai umeis upo tōn idiōn sumphuletōn kathōs kai autoi upo tōn ioudaiōn
tōn kai ton kurion apokteinantōn iēsoun kai tous prophētas kai ēmas ekdiōxantōn kai theō mē areskontōn kai pasin anthrōpois enantiōn
kōluontōn ēmas tois ethnesin lalēsai ina sōthōsin eis to anaplērōsai autōn tas amartias pantote ephthasen de ep autous ē orgē eis telos
ēmeis de adelphoi aporphanisthentes aph umōn pros kairon ōras prosōpō ou kardia perissoterōs espoudasamen to prosōpon umōn idein en pollē epithumia
dioti ēthelēsamen elthein pros umas egō men paulos kai apax kai dis kai enekopsen ēmas o satanas
tis gar ēmōn elpis ē chara ē stephanos kauchēseōs ē ouchi kai umeis emprosthen tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou en tē autou parousia
umeis gar este ē doxa ēmōn kai ē chara
dio mēketi stegontes eudokēsamen kataleiphthēnai en athēnais monoi
kai epempsamen timotheon ton adelphon ēmōn kai diakonon sunergon tou theou en tō euangeliō tou christou eis to stērixai umas kai parakalesai uper tēs pisteōs umōn
to mēdena sainesthai en tais thlipsesin tautais autoi gar oidate oti eis touto keimetha
kai gar ote pros umas ēmen proelegomen umin oti mellomen thlibesthai kathōs kai egeneto kai oidate
dia touto kagō mēketi stegōn epempsa eis to gnōnai tēn pistin umōn mēpōs epeirasen umas o peirazōn kai eis kenon genētai o kopos ēmōn
arti de elthontos timotheou pros ēmas aph umōn kai euangelisamenou ēmin tēn pistin kai tēn agapēn umōn kai oti echete mneian ēmōn agathēn pantote epipothountes ēmas idein kathaper kai ēmeis umas
dia touto pareklēthēmen adelphoi eph umin epi pasē tē anankē kai thlipsei ēmōn dia tēs umōn pisteōs
oti nun zōmen ean umeis stēkete en kuriō
tina gar eucharistian dunametha tō theō antapodounai peri umōn epi pasē tē chara ē chairomen di umas emprosthen tou theou ēmōn
nuktos kai ēmeras uperekperissou deomenoi eis to idein umōn to prosōpon kai katartisai ta usterēmata tēs pisteōs umōn
autos de o theos kai patēr ēmōn kai o kurios ēmōn iēsous kateuthunai tēn odon ēmōn pros umas
umas de o kurios pleonasai kai perisseusai tē agapē eis allēlous kai eis pantas kathaper kai ēmeis eis umas
eis to stērixai umōn tas kardias amemptous en agiōsunē emprosthen tou theou kai patros ēmōn en tē parousia tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou meta pantōn tōn agiōn autou amēn
loipon oun adelphoi erōtōmen umas kai parakaloumen en kuriō iēsou ina kathōs parelabete par ēmōn to pōs dei umas peripatein kai areskein theō kathōs kai peripateite ina perisseuēte mallon
oidate gar tinas parangelias edōkamen umin dia tou kuriou iēsou
touto gar estin thelēma tou theou o agiasmos umōn apechesthai umas apo tēs porneias
eidenai ekaston umōn to eautou skeuos ktasthai en agiasmō kai timē
mē en pathei epithumias kathaper kai ta ethnē ta mē eidota ton theon
to mē uperbainein kai pleonektein en tō pragmati ton adelphon autou dioti ekdikos kurios peri pantōn toutōn kathōs kai proeipamen umin kai diemarturametha
ou gar ekalesen ēmas o theos epi akatharsia all en agiasmō
toigaroun o athetōn ouk anthrōpon athetei alla ton theon ton kai didonta to pneuma autou to agion eis umas
peri de tēs philadelphias ou chreian echete graphein umin autoi gar umeis theodidaktoi este eis to agapan allēlous
kai gar poieite auto eis pantas tous adelphous en olē tē makedonia parakaloumen de umas adelphoi perisseuein mallon
kai philotimeisthai ēsuchazein kai prassein ta idia kai ergazesthai tais chersin umōn kathōs umin parēngeilamen
ina peripatēte euschēmonōs pros tous exō kai mēdenos chreian echēte
ou thelomen de umas agnoein adelphoi peri tōn koimōmenōn ina mē lupēsthe kathōs kai oi loipoi oi mē echontes elpida
ei gar pisteuomen oti iēsous apethanen kai anestē outōs kai o theos tous koimēthentas dia tou iēsou axei sun autō
touto gar umin legomen en logō kuriou oti ēmeis oi zōntes oi perileipomenoi eis tēn parousian tou kuriou ou mē phthasōmen tous koimēthentas
oti autos o kurios en keleusmati en phōnē archangelou kai en salpingi theou katabēsetai ap ouranou kai oi nekroi en christō anastēsontai prōton
epeita ēmeis oi zōntes oi perileipomenoi ama sun autois arpagēsometha en nephelais eis apantēsin tou kuriou eis aera kai outōs pantote sun kuriō esometha
ōste parakaleite allēlous en tois logois toutois
peri de tōn chronōn kai tōn kairōn adelphoi ou chreian echete umin graphesthai
autoi gar akribōs oidate oti ēmera kuriou ōs kleptēs en nukti outōs erchetai
otan legōsin eirēnē kai asphaleia tote aiphnidios autois epistatai olethros ōsper ē ōdin tē en gastri echousē kai ou mē ekphugōsin
umeis de adelphoi ouk este en skotei ina ē ēmera umas ōs kleptēs katalabē
pantes gar umeis uioi phōtos este kai uioi ēmeras ouk esmen nuktos oude skotous
ara oun mē katheudōmen ōs oi loipoi alla grēgorōmen kai nēphōmen
oi gar katheudontes nuktos katheudousin kai oi methuskomenoi nuktos methuousin
ēmeis de ēmeras ontes nēphōmen endusamenoi thōraka pisteōs kai agapēs kai perikephalaian elpida sōtērias
oti ouk etheto ēmas o theos eis orgēn alla eis peripoiēsin sōtērias dia tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou
tou apothanontos peri ēmōn ina eite grēgorōmen eite katheudōmen ama sun autō zēsōmen
dio parakaleite allēlous kai oikodomeite eis ton ena kathōs kai poieite
erōtōmen de umas adelphoi eidenai tous kopiōntas en umin kai proistamenous umōn en kuriō kai nouthetountas umas
kai ēgeisthai autous uperekperissou en agapē dia to ergon autōn eirēneuete en eautois
parakaloumen de umas adelphoi noutheteite tous ataktous paramutheisthe tous oligopsuchous antechesthe tōn asthenōn makrothumeite pros pantas
orate mē tis kakon anti kakou tini apodoi alla pantote to agathon diōkete eis allēlous kai eis pantas
en panti eucharisteite touto gar thelēma theou en christō iēsou eis umas
panta de dokimazete to kalon katechete
autos de o theos tēs eirēnēs agiasai umas oloteleis kai oloklēron umōn to pneuma kai ē psuchē kai to sōma amemptōs en tē parousia tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou tērētheiē
pistos o kalōn umas os kai poiēsei
aspasasthe tous adelphous pantas en philēmati agiō

name: ΠΡΟΣ ΘΕΣΣΑΛΟΝΙΚΕΙΣ Β΄
chapters: paulos kai silouanos kai timotheos tē ekklēsia thessalonikeōn en theō patri ēmōn kai kuriō iēsou christō
charis umin kai eirēnē apo theou patros ēmōn kai kuriou iēsou christou
eucharistein opheilomen tō theō pantote peri umōn adelphoi kathōs axion estin oti uperauxanei ē pistis umōn kai pleonazei ē agapē enos ekastou pantōn umōn eis allēlous
ōste autous ēmas en umin enkauchasthai en tais ekklēsiais tou theou uper tēs upomonēs umōn kai pisteōs en pasin tois diōgmois umōn kai tais thlipsesin ais anechesthe
endeigma tēs dikaias kriseōs tou theou eis to kataxiōthēnai umas tēs basileias tou theou uper ēs kai paschete
eiper dikaion para theō antapodounai tois thlibousin umas thlipsin
kai umin tois thlibomenois anesin meth ēmōn en tē apokalupsei tou kuriou iēsou ap ouranou met angelōn dunameōs autou
en puri phlogos didontos ekdikēsin tois mē eidosin theon kai tois mē upakouousin tō euangeliō tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou
oitines dikēn tisousin olethron aiōnion apo prosōpou tou kuriou kai apo tēs doxēs tēs ischuos autou
otan elthē endoxasthēnai en tois agiois autou kai thaumasthēnai en pasin tois pisteusasin oti episteuthē to marturion ēmōn eph umas en tē ēmera ekeinē
eis o kai proseuchometha pantote peri umōn ina umas axiōsē tēs klēseōs o theos ēmōn kai plērōsē pasan eudokian agathōsunēs kai ergon pisteōs en dunamei
opōs endoxasthē to onoma tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou en umin kai umeis en autō kata tēn charin tou theou ēmōn kai kuriou iēsou christou
erōtōmen de umas adelphoi uper tēs parousias tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou kai ēmōn episunagōgēs ep auton
eis to mē tacheōs saleuthēnai umas apo tou noos mēde throeisthai mēte dia pneumatos mēte dia logou mēte di epistolēs ōs di ēmōn ōs oti enestēken ē ēmera tou kuriou
mē tis umas exapatēsē kata mēdena tropon oti ean mē elthē ē apostasia prōton kai apokaluphthē o anthrōpos tēs anomias o uios tēs apōleias
o antikeimenos kai uperairomenos epi panta legomenon theon ē sebasma ōste auton eis ton naon tou theou kathisai apodeiknunta eauton oti estin theos
ou mnēmoneuete oti eti ōn pros umas tauta elegon umin
kai nun to katechon oidate eis to apokaluphthēnai auton en tō autou kairō
to gar mustērion ēdē energeitai tēs anomias monon o katechōn arti eōs ek mesou genētai
kai tote apokaluphthēsetai o anomos on o kurios iēsous anelei tō pneumati tou stomatos autou kai katargēsei tē epiphaneia tēs parousias autou
ou estin ē parousia kat energeian tou satana en pasē dunamei kai sēmeiois kai terasin pseudous
kai en pasē apatē adikias tois apollumenois anth ōn tēn agapēn tēs alētheias ouk edexanto eis to sōthēnai autous
kai dia touto pempei autois o theos energeian planēs eis to pisteusai autous tō pseudei
ina krithōsin apantes oi mē pisteusantes tē alētheia alla eudokēsantes tē adikia
ēmeis de opheilomen eucharistein tō theō pantote peri umōn adelphoi ēgapēmenoi upo kuriou oti eilato umas o theos ap archēs eis sōtērian en agiasmō pneumatos kai pistei alētheias
eis o kai ekalesen umas dia tou euangeliou ēmōn eis peripoiēsin doxēs tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou
ara oun adelphoi stēkete kai krateite tas paradoseis as edidachthēte eite dia logou eite di epistolēs ēmōn
autos de o kurios ēmōn iēsous christos kai o theos o patēr ēmōn o agapēsas ēmas kai dous paraklēsin aiōnian kai elpida agathēn en chariti
parakalesai umōn tas kardias kai stērixai en panti ergō kai logō agathō
to loipon proseuchesthe adelphoi peri ēmōn ina o logos tou kuriou trechē kai doxazētai kathōs kai pros umas
kai ina rusthōmen apo tōn atopōn kai ponērōn anthrōpōn ou gar pantōn ē pistis
pistos de estin o kurios os stērixei umas kai phulaxei apo tou ponērou
pepoithamen de en kuriō eph umas oti a parangellomen poieite kai poiēsete
o de kurios kateuthunai umōn tas kardias eis tēn agapēn tou theou kai eis tēn upomonēn tou christou
parangellomen de umin adelphoi en onomati tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou stellesthai umas apo pantos adelphou ataktōs peripatountos kai mē kata tēn paradosin ēn parelabosan par ēmōn
autoi gar oidate pōs dei mimeisthai ēmas oti ouk ētaktēsamen en umin
oude dōrean arton ephagomen para tinos all en kopō kai mochthō nuktos kai ēmeras ergazomenoi pros to mē epibarēsai tina umōn
ouch oti ouk echomen exousian all ina eautous tupon dōmen umin eis to mimeisthai ēmas
kai gar ote ēmen pros umas touto parēngellomen umin oti ei tis ou thelei ergazesthai mēde esthietō
akouomen gar tinas peripatountas en umin ataktōs mēden ergazomenous alla periergazomenous
tois de toioutois parangellomen kai parakaloumen en kuriō iēsou christō ina meta ēsuchias ergazomenoi ton eautōn arton esthiōsin
umeis de adelphoi mē enkakēsēte kalopoiountes
ei de tis ouch upakouei tō logō ēmōn dia tēs epistolēs touton sēmeiousthe mē sunanamignusthe autō ina entrapē
kai mē ōs echthron ēgeisthe alla noutheteite ōs adelphon
autos de o kurios tēs eirēnēs dōē umin tēn eirēnēn diapantos en panti tropō o kurios meta pantōn umōn
o aspasmos tē emē cheiri paulou o estin sēmeion en pasē epistolē outōs graphō

name: ΠΡΟΣ ΤΙΜΟΘΕΟΝ Α΄
chapters: paulos apostolos christou iēsou kat epitagēn theou sōtēros ēmōn kai christou iēsou tēs elpidos ēmōn
timotheō gnēsiō teknō en pistei charis eleos eirēnē apo theou patros kai christou iēsou tou kuriou ēmōn
kathōs parekalesa se prosmeinai en ephesō poreuomenos eis makedonian ina parangeilēs tisin mē eterodidaskalein
mēde prosechein muthois kai genealogiais aperantois aitines ekzētēseis parechousin mallon ē oikonomian theou tēn en pistei
to de telos tēs parangelias estin agapē ek katharas kardias kai suneidēseōs agathēs kai pisteōs anupokritou
ōn tines astochēsantes exetrapēsan eis mataiologian
thelontes einai nomodidaskaloi mē noountes mēte a legousin mēte peri tinōn diabebaiountai
oidamen de oti kalos o nomos ean tis autō nomimōs chrētai
eidōs touto oti dikaiō nomos ou keitai anomois de kai anupotaktois asebesi kai amartōlois anosiois kai bebēlois patrolōais kai mētrolōais androphonois
pornois arsenokoitais andrapodistais pseustais epiorkois kai ei ti eteron tē ugiainousē didaskalia antikeitai
kata to euangelion tēs doxēs tou makariou theou o episteuthēn egō
parakalō oun prōton pantōn poieisthai deēseis proseuchas enteuxeis eucharistias uper pantōn anthrōpōn
uper basileōn kai pantōn tōn en uperochē ontōn ina ēremon kai ēsuchion bion diagōmen en pasē eusebeia kai semnotēti
touto kalon kai apodekton enōpion tou sōtēros ēmōn theou
os pantas anthrōpous thelei sōthēnai kai eis epignōsin alētheias elthein
eis gar theos eis kai mesitēs theou kai anthrōpōn anthrōpos christos iēsous
o dous eauton antilutron uper pantōn to marturion kairois idiois
eis o etethēn egō kērux kai apostolos alētheian legō ou pseudomai didaskalos ethnōn en pistei kai alētheia
boulomai oun proseuchesthai tous andras en panti topō epairontas osious cheiras chōris orgēs kai dialogismou
ōsautōs kai gunaikas en katastolē kosmiō meta aidous kai sōphrosunēs kosmein eautas mē en plegmasin kai chrusō ē margaritais ē imatismō polutelei
all o prepei gunaixin epangellomenais theosebeian di ergōn agathōn
gunē en ēsuchia manthanetō en pasē upotagē
didaskein de gunaiki ouk epitrepō oude authentein andros all einai en ēsuchia
adam gar prōtos eplasthē eita eua
kai adam ouk ēpatēthē ē de gunē exapatētheisa en parabasei gegonen
sōthēsetai de dia tēs teknogonias ean meinōsin en pistei kai agapē kai agiasmō meta sōphrosunēs
pistos o logos ei tis episkopēs oregetai kalou ergou epithumei
dei oun ton episkopon anepilēmpton einai mias gunaikos andra nēphalion sōphrona kosmion philoxenon didaktikon
mē paroinon mē plēktēn alla epieikē amachon aphilarguron
tou idiou oikou kalōs proistamenon tekna echonta en upotagē meta pasēs semnotētos
ei de tis tou idiou oikou prostēnai ouk oiden pōs ekklēsias theou epimelēsetai
mē neophuton ina mē tuphōtheis eis krima empesē tou diabolou
dei de kai marturian kalēn echein apo tōn exōthen ina mē eis oneidismon empesē kai pagida tou diabolou
diakonous ōsautōs semnous mē dilogous mē oinō pollō prosechontas mē aischrokerdeis
echontas to mustērion tēs pisteōs en kathara suneidēsei
kai outoi de dokimazesthōsan prōton eita diakoneitōsan anenklētoi ontes
gunaikas ōsautōs semnas mē diabolous nēphalious pistas en pasin
diakonoi estōsan mias gunaikos andres teknōn kalōs proistamenoi kai tōn idiōn oikōn
oi gar kalōs diakonēsantes bathmon eautois kalon peripoiountai kai pollēn parrēsian en pistei tē en christō iēsou
to de pneuma rētōs legei oti en usterois kairois apostēsontai tines tēs pisteōs prosechontes pneumasin planois kai didaskaliais daimoniōn
en upokrisei pseudologōn kekaustēriasmenōn tēn idian suneidēsin
kōluontōn gamein apechesthai brōmatōn a o theos ektisen eis metalēmpsin meta eucharistias tois pistois kai epegnōkosin tēn alētheian
oti pan ktisma theou kalon kai ouden apoblēton meta eucharistias lambanomenon
agiazetai gar dia logou theou kai enteuxeōs
tauta upotithemenos tois adelphois kalos esē diakonos christou iēsou entrephomenos tois logois tēs pisteōs kai tēs kalēs didaskalias ē parēkolouthēkas
tous de bebēlous kai graōdeis muthous paraitou gumnaze de seauton pros eusebeian
ē gar sōmatikē gumnasia pros oligon estin ōphelimos ē de eusebeia pros panta ōphelimos estin epangelian echousa zōēs tēs nun kai tēs mellousēs
pistos o logos kai pasēs apodochēs axios
eis touto gar kopiōmen kai agōnizometha oti ēlpikamen epi theō zōnti os estin sōtēr pantōn anthrōpōn malista pistōn
mēdeis sou tēs neotētos kataphroneitō alla tupos ginou tōn pistōn en logō en anastrophē en agapē en pistei en agneia
eōs erchomai proseche tē anagnōsei tē paraklēsei tē didaskalia
mē amelei tou en soi charismatos o edothē soi dia prophēteias meta epitheseōs tōn cheirōn tou presbuteriou
tauta meleta en toutois isthi ina sou ē prokopē phanera ē pasin
epeche seautō kai tē didaskalia epimene autois touto gar poiōn kai seauton sōseis kai tous akouontas sou
presbuterō mē epiplēxēs alla parakalei ōs patera neōterous ōs adelphous
presbuteras ōs mēteras neōteras ōs adelphas en pasē agneia
ei de tis chēra tekna ē ekgona echei manthanetōsan prōton ton idion oikon eusebein kai amoibas apodidonai tois progonois touto gar estin apodekton enōpion tou theou
ē de ontōs chēra kai memonōmenē ēlpiken epi theon kai prosmenei tais deēsesin kai tais proseuchais nuktos kai ēmeras
kai tauta parangelle ina anepilēmptoi ōsin
ei de tis tōn idiōn kai malista oikeiōn ou pronoeitai tēn pistin ērnētai kai estin apistou cheirōn
chēra katalegesthō mē elatton etōn exēkonta gegonuia enos andros gunē
en ergois kalois marturoumenē ei eteknotrophēsen ei exenodochēsen ei agiōn podas enipsen ei thlibomenois epērkesen ei panti ergō agathō epēkolouthēsen
neōteras de chēras paraitou otan gar katastrēniasōsin tou christou gamein thelousin
echousai krima oti tēn prōtēn pistin ēthetēsan
ama de kai argai manthanousin perierchomenai tas oikias ou monon de argai alla kai phluaroi kai periergoi lalousai ta mē deonta
boulomai oun neōteras gamein teknogonein oikodespotein mēdemian aphormēn didonai tō antikeimenō loidorias charin
ēdē gar tines exetrapēsan opisō tou satana
ei tis pistē echei chēras eparkeisthō autais kai mē bareisthō ē ekklēsia ina tais ontōs chērais eparkesē
oi kalōs proestōtes presbuteroi diplēs timēs axiousthōsan malista oi kopiōntes en logō kai didaskalia
osoi eisin upo zugon douloi tous idious despotas pasēs timēs axious ēgeisthōsan ina mē to onoma tou theou kai ē didaskalia blasphēmētai
oi de pistous echontes despotas mē kataphroneitōsan oti adelphoi eisin alla mallon douleuetōsan oti pistoi eisin kai agapētoi oi tēs euergesias antilambanomenoi tauta didaske kai parakalei
ei tis eterodidaskalei kai mē proserchetai ugiainousin logois tois tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou kai tē kat eusebeian didaskalia
tetuphōtai mēden epistamenos alla nosōn peri zētēseis kai logomachias ex ōn ginetai phthonos eris blasphēmiai uponoiai ponērai
diaparatribai diephtharmenōn anthrōpōn ton noun kai apesterēmenōn tēs alētheias nomizontōn porismon einai tēn eusebeian
estin de porismos megas ē eusebeia meta autarkeias
ouden gar eisēnenkamen eis ton kosmon oti oude exenenkein ti dunametha
echontes de diatrophas kai skepasmata toutois arkesthēsometha
oi de boulomenoi ploutein empiptousin eis peirasmon kai pagida kai epithumias pollas anoētous kai blaberas aitines buthizousin tous anthrōpous eis olethron kai apōleian
riza gar pantōn tōn kakōn estin ē philarguria ēs tines oregomenoi apeplanēthēsan apo tēs pisteōs kai eautous periepeiran odunais pollais
su de ō anthrōpe theou tauta pheuge diōke de dikaiosunēn eusebeian pistin agapēn upomonēn praupathian
agōnizou ton kalon agōna tēs pisteōs epilabou tēs aiōniou zōēs eis ēn eklēthēs kai ōmologēsas tēn kalēn omologian enōpion pollōn marturōn
parangellō enōpion theou tou zōogonountos ta panta kai christou iēsou tou marturēsantos epi pontiou peilatou tēn kalēn omologian
tērēsai se tēn entolēn aspilon anepilēmpton mechri tēs epiphaneias tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou
ēn kairois idiois deixei o makarios kai monos dunastēs o basileus tōn basileuontōn kai kurios tōn kurieuontōn
o monos echōn athanasian phōs oikōn aprositon on eiden oudeis anthrōpōn oude idein dunatai ō timē kai kratos aiōnion amēn
tois plousiois en tō nun aiōni parangelle mē upsēla phronein mēde ēlpikenai epi ploutou adēlotēti all epi theō tō parechonti ēmin panta plousiōs eis apolausin
agathoergein ploutein en ergois kalois eumetadotous einai koinōnikous
apothēsaurizontas eautois themelion kalon eis to mellon ina epilabōntai tēs ontōs zōēs
ō timothee tēn parathēkēn phulaxon ektrepomenos tas bebēlous kenophōnias kai antitheseis tēs pseudōnumou gnōseōs
ēn tines epangellomenoi peri tēn pistin ēstochēsan ē charis meth umōnōsautōs kai ta erga ta kala prodēla kai ta allōs echonta krubēnai ou dunantai

name: ΠΡΟΣ ΤΙΜΟΘΕΟΝ Β΄
chapters: paulos apostolos christou iēsou dia thelēmatos theou kat epangelian zōēs tēs en christō iēsou
timotheō agapētō teknō charis eleos eirēnē apo theou patros kai christou iēsou tou kuriou ēmōn
charin echō tō theō ō latreuō apo progonōn en kathara suneidēsei ōs adialeipton echō tēn peri sou mneian en tais deēsesin mou nuktos kai ēmeras
epipothōn se idein memnēmenos sou tōn dakruōn ina charas plērōthō
upomnēsin labōn tēs en soi anupokritou pisteōs ētis enōkēsen prōton en tē mammē sou lōidi kai tē mētri sou eunikē pepeismai de oti kai en soi
di ēn aitian anamimnēskō se anazōpurein to charisma tou theou o estin en soi dia tēs epitheseōs tōn cheirōn mou
ou gar edōken ēmin o theos pneuma deilias alla dunameōs kai agapēs kai sōphronismou
mē oun epaischunthēs to marturion tou kuriou ēmōn mēde eme ton desmion autou alla sunkakopathēson tō euangeliō kata dunamin theou
tou sōsantos ēmas kai kalesantos klēsei agia ou kata ta erga ēmōn alla kata idian prothesin kai charin tēn dotheisan ēmin en christō iēsou pro chronōn aiōniōn
phanerōtheisan de nun dia tēs epiphaneias tou sōtēros ēmōn christou iēsou katargēsantos men ton thanaton phōtisantos de zōēn kai aphtharsian dia tou euangeliou
eis o etethēn egō kērux kai apostolos kai didaskalos
su oun teknon mou endunamou en tē chariti tē en christō iēsou
kai a ēkousas par emou dia pollōn marturōn tauta parathou pistois anthrōpois oitines ikanoi esontai kai eterous didaxai
sunkakopathēson ōs kalos stratiōtēs christou iēsou
oudeis strateuomenos empleketai tais tou biou pragmateiais ina tō stratologēsanti aresē
ean de kai athlē tis ou stephanoutai ean mē nomimōs athlēsē
ton kopiōnta geōrgon dei prōton tōn karpōn metalambanein
noei o legō dōsei gar soi o kurios sunesin en pasin
mnēmoneue iēsoun christon egēgermenon ek nekrōn ek spermatos daueid kata to euangelion mou
en ō kakopathō mechri desmōn ōs kakourgos alla o logos tou theou ou dedetai
dia touto panta upomenō dia tous eklektous ina kai autoi sōtērias tuchōsin tēs en christō iēsou meta doxēs aiōniou
pistos o logos ei gar sunapethanomen kai suzēsomen
ei upomenomen kai sumbasileusomen ei arnēsometha kakeinos arnēsetai ēmas
ei apistoumen ekeinos pistos menei arnēsasthai gar eauton ou dunatai
tauta upomimnēske diamarturomenos enōpion tou theou mē logomachein ep ouden chrēsimon epi katastrophē tōn akouontōn
spoudason seauton dokimon parastēsai tō theō ergatēn anepaischunton orthotomounta ton logon tēs alētheias
tas de bebēlous kenophōnias periistaso epi pleion gar prokopsousin asebeias
kai o logos autōn ōs gangraina nomēn exei ōn estin umenaios kai philētos
oitines peri tēn alētheian ēstochēsan legontes anastasin ēdē gegonenai kai anatrepousin tēn tinōn pistin
o mentoi stereos themelios tou theou estēken echōn tēn sphragida tautēn egnō kurios tous ontas autou kai apostētō apo adikias pas o onomazōn to onoma kuriou
en megalē de oikia ouk estin monon skeuē chrusa kai argura alla kai xulina kai ostrakina kai a men eis timēn a de eis atimian
touto de ginōske oti en eschatais ēmerais enstēsontai kairoi chalepoi
esontai gar oi anthrōpoi philautoi philarguroi alazones uperēphanoi blasphēmoi goneusin apeitheis acharistoi anosioi
astorgoi aspondoi diaboloi akrateis anēmeroi aphilagathoi
prodotai propeteis tetuphōmenoi philēdonoi mallon ē philotheoi
echontes morphōsin eusebeias tēn de dunamin autēs ērnēmenoi kai toutous apotrepou
ek toutōn gar eisin oi endunontes eis tas oikias kai aichmalōtizontes gunaikaria sesōreumena amartiais agomena epithumiais poikilais
pantote manthanonta kai mēdepote eis epignōsin alētheias elthein dunamena
on tropon de iannēs kai iambrēs antestēsan mōusei outōs kai outoi anthistantai tē alētheia anthrōpoi katephtharmenoi ton noun adokimoi peri tēn pistin
all ou prokopsousin epi pleion ē gar anoia autōn ekdēlos estai pasin ōs kai ē ekeinōn egeneto
su de parēkolouthēsas mou tē didaskalia tē agōgē tē prothesei tē pistei tē makrothumia tē agapē tē upomonē
