tois diōgmois tois pathēmasin oia moi egeneto en antiocheia en ikoniō en lustrois oious diōgmous upēnenka kai ek pantōn me erusato o kurios
kai pantes de oi thelontes zēn eusebōs en christō iēsou diōchthēsontai
ponēroi de anthrōpoi kai goētes prokopsousin epi to cheiron planōntes kai planōmenoi
su de mene en ois emathes kai epistōthēs eidōs para tinōn emathes
kai oti apo brephous iera grammata oidas ta dunamena se sophisai eis sōtērian dia pisteōs tēs en christō iēsou
pasa graphē theopneustos kai ōphelimos pros didaskalian pros elegmon pros epanorthōsin pros paideian tēn en dikaiosunē
ina artios ē o tou theou anthrōpos pros pan ergon agathon exērtismenos
diamarturomai enōpion tou theou kai christou iēsou tou mellontos krinein zōntas kai nekrous kai tēn epiphaneian autou kai tēn basileian autou
kēruxon ton logon epistēthi eukairōs akairōs elegxon parakaleson epitimēson en pasē makrothumia kai didachē
estai gar kairos ote tēs ugiainousēs didaskalias ouk anexontai alla kata tas idias epithumias eautois episōreusousin didaskalous knēthomenoi tēn akoēn
kai apo men tēs alētheias tēn akoēn apostrepsousin epi de tous muthous ektrapēsontai
su de nēphe en pasin kakopathēson ergon poiēson euangelistou tēn diakonian sou plērophorēson
egō gar ēdē spendomai kai o kairos tēs analuseōs mou ephestēken
ton kalon agōna ēgōnismai ton dromon teteleka tēn pistin tetērēka
loipon apokeitai moi o tēs dikaiosunēs stephanos on apodōsei moi o kurios en ekeinē tē ēmera o dikaios kritēs ou monon de emoi alla kai pasi tois ēgapēkosin tēn epiphaneian autou
dēmas gar me enkatelipen agapēsas ton nun aiōna kai eporeuthē eis thessalonikēn krēskēs eis gallian titos eis dalmatian
loukas estin monos met emou markon analabōn age meta seautou estin gar moi euchrēstos eis diakonian
ton phailonēn on apelipon en trōadi para karpō erchomenos phere kai ta biblia malista tas membranas
alexandros o chalkeus polla moi kaka enedeixato apodōsei autō o kurios kata ta erga autou
on kai su phulassou lian gar antestē tois ēmeterois logois
en tē prōtē mou apologia oudeis moi paregeneto alla pantes me enkatelipon mē autois logistheiē
o de kurios moi parestē kai enedunamōsen me ina di emou to kērugma plērophorēthē kai akousōsin panta ta ethnē kai erusthēn ek stomatos leontos
rusetai me o kurios apo pantos ergou ponērou kai sōsei eis tēn basileian autou tēn epouranion ō ē doxa eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn amēn
aspasai priskan kai akulan kai ton onēsiphorou oikon
erastos emeinen en korinthō trophimon de apelipon en milētō asthenounta
spoudason pro cheimōnos elthein aspazetai se euboulos kai poudēs kai linos kai klaudia kai oi adelphoi pantes
o kurios meta tou pneumatos sou ē charis meth umōnina artios ē o tou theou anthrōpos pros pan ergon agathon exērtismenos

name: ΠΡΟΣ ΤΙΤΟΝ
chapters: paulos doulos theou apostolos de iēsou christou kata pistin eklektōn theou kai epignōsin alētheias tēs kat eusebeian
ep elpidi zōēs aiōniou ēn epēngeilato o apseudēs theos pro chronōn aiōniōn
ephanerōsen de kairois idiois ton logon autou en kērugmati o episteuthēn egō kat epitagēn tou sōtēros ēmōn theou
titō gnēsiō teknō kata koinēn pistin charis kai eirēnē apo theou patros kai christou iēsou tou sōtēros ēmōn
toutou charin apelipon se en krētē ina ta leiponta epidiorthōsē kai katastēsēs kata polin presbuterous ōs egō soi dietaxamēn
ei tis estin anenklētos mias gunaikos anēr tekna echōn pista mē en katēgoria asōtias ē anupotakta
dei gar ton episkopon anenklēton einai ōs theou oikonomon mē authadē mē orgilon mē paroinon mē plēktēn mē aischrokerdē
alla philoxenon philagathon sōphrona dikaion osion enkratē
antechomenon tou kata tēn didachēn pistou logou ina dunatos ē kai parakalein en tē didaskalia tē ugiainousē kai tous antilegontas elenchein
eisin gar polloi anupotaktoi mataiologoi kai phrenapatai malista oi ek tēs peritomēs
ous dei epistomizein oitines olous oikous anatrepousin didaskontes a mē dei aischrou kerdous charin
eipen tis ex autōn idios autōn prophētēs krētes aei pseustai kaka thēria gasteres argai
ē marturia autē estin alēthēs di ēn aitian elenche autous apotomōs ina ugiainōsin en tē pistei
mē prosechontes ioudaikois muthois kai entolais anthrōpōn apostrephomenōn tēn alētheian
panta kathara tois katharois tois de memiammenois kai apistois ouden katharon alla memiantai autōn kai o nous kai ē suneidēsis
theon omologousin eidenai tois de ergois arnountai bdeluktoi ontes kai apeitheis kai pros pan ergon agathon adokimoi
su de lalei a prepei tē ugiainousē didaskalia
presbutas nēphalious einai semnous sōphronas ugiainontas tē pistei tē agapē tē upomonē
presbutidas ōsautōs en katastēmati ieroprepeis mē diabolous mē oinō pollō dedoulōmenas kalodidaskalous
ina sōphronizōsin tas neas philandrous einai philoteknous
sōphronas agnas oikourgous agathas upotassomenas tois idiois andrasin ina mē o logos tou theou blasphēmētai
peri panta seauton parechomenos tupon kalōn ergōn en tē didaskalia aphthorian semnotēta
logon ugiē akatagnōston ina o ex enantias entrapē mēden echōn legein peri ēmōn phaulon
doulous idiois despotais upotassesthai en pasin euarestous einai mē antilegontas
mē nosphizomenous alla pasan pistin endeiknumenous agathēn ina tēn didaskalian tēn tou sōtēros ēmōn theou kosmōsin en pasin
epephanē gar ē charis tou theou sōtērios pasin anthrōpois
paideuousa ēmas ina arnēsamenoi tēn asebeian kai tas kosmikas epithumias sōphronōs kai dikaiōs kai eusebōs zēsōmen en tō nun aiōni
prosdechomenoi tēn makarian elpida kai epiphaneian tēs doxēs tou megalou theou kai sōtēros ēmōn christou iēsou
os edōken eauton uper ēmōn ina lutrōsētai ēmas apo pasēs anomias kai katharisē eautō laon periousion zēlōtēn kalōn ergōn
tauta lalei kai parakalei kai elenche meta pasēs epitagēs mēdeis sou periphroneitō
upomimnēske autous archais exousiais upotassesthai peitharchein pros pan ergon agathon etoimous einai
mēdena blasphēmein amachous einai epieikeis pasan endeiknumenous prautēta pros pantas anthrōpous
ēmen gar pote kai ēmeis anoētoi apeitheis planōmenoi douleuontes epithumiais kai ēdonais poikilais en kakia kai phthonō diagontes stugētoi misountes allēlous
ote de ē chrēstotēs kai ē philanthrōpia epephanē tou sōtēros ēmōn theou
ouk ex ergōn tōn en dikaiosunē a epoiēsamen ēmeis alla kata to autou eleos esōsen ēmas dia loutrou palingenesias kai anakainōseōs pneumatos agiou
ou execheen eph ēmas plousiōs dia iēsou christou tou sōtēros ēmōn
ina dikaiōthentes tē ekeinou chariti klēronomoi genēthōmen kat elpida zōēs aiōniou
pistos o logos kai peri toutōn boulomai se diabebaiousthai ina phrontizōsin kalōn ergōn proistasthai oi pepisteukotes theō tauta estin kala kai ōphelima tois anthrōpois
mōras de zētēseis kai genealogias kai erin kai machas nomikas periistaso eisin gar anōpheleis kai mataioi
airetikon anthrōpon meta mian kai deuteran nouthesian paraitou
eidōs oti exestraptai o toioutos kai amartanei ōn autokatakritos
otan pempsō arteman pros se ē tuchikon spoudason elthein pros me eis nikopolin ekei gar kekrika paracheimasai
zēnan ton nomikon kai apollōn spoudaiōs propempson ina mēden autois leipē
manthanetōsan de kai oi ēmeteroi kalōn ergōn proistasthai eis tas anankaias chreias ina mē ōsin akarpoi
aspazontai se oi met emou pantes aspasai tous philountas ēmas en pistei ē charis meta pantōn umōntauta lalei kai parakalei kai elenche meta pasēs epitagēs mēdeis sou periphroneitō

name: ΠΡΟΣ ΦΙΛΗΜΟΝΑ
chapters: paulos desmios christou iēsou kai timotheos o adelphos philēmoni tō agapētō kai sunergō ēmōn
kai apphia tē adelphē kai archippō tō sustratiōtē ēmōn kai tē kat oikon sou ekklēsia
charis umin kai eirēnē apo theou patros ēmōn kai kuriou iēsou christou
eucharistō tō theō mou pantote mneian sou poioumenos epi tōn proseuchōn mou
akouōn sou tēn agapēn kai tēn pistin ēn echeis pros ton kurion iēsoun kai eis pantas tous agious
opōs ē koinōnia tēs pisteōs sou energēs genētai en epignōsei pantos agathou tou en ēmin eis christon
charan gar pollēn eschon kai paraklēsin epi tē agapē sou oti ta splanchna tōn agiōn anapepautai dia sou adelphe
dio pollēn en christō parrēsian echōn epitassein soi to anēkon
dia tēn agapēn mallon parakalō toioutos ōn ōs paulos presbutēs nuni de kai desmios christou iēsou
parakalō se peri tou emou teknou on egennēsa en tois desmois onēsimon
ton pote soi achrēston nuni de kai soi kai emoi euchrēston
auton tout estin ta ema splanchna
on egō eboulomēn pros emauton katechein ina uper sou moi diakonē en tois desmois tou euangeliou
chōris de tēs sēs gnōmēs ouden ēthelēsa poiēsai ina mē ōs kata anankēn to agathon sou ē alla kata ekousion
tacha gar dia touto echōristhē pros ōran ina aiōnion auton apechēs
ouk eti ōs doulon alla uper doulon adelphon agapēton malista emoi posō de mallon soi kai en sarki kai en kuriō
ei oun me echeis koinōnon proslabou auton ōs eme
ei de ti ēdikēsen se ē opheilei touto emoi elloga
egō paulos egrapsa tē emē cheiri egō apotisō ina mē legō soi oti kai seauton moi prosopheileis
nai adelphe egō sou onaimēn en kuriō anapauson mou ta splanchna en christō
pepoithōs tē upakoē sou egrapsa soi eidōs oti kai uper a legō poiēseis
ama de kai etoimaze moi xenian elpizō gar oti dia tōn proseuchōn umōn charisthēsomai umin

name: ΠΡΟΣ ΕΒΡΑΙΟΥΣ
chapters: polumerōs kai polutropōs palai o theos lalēsas tois patrasin en tois prophētais ep eschatou tōn ēmerōn toutōn elalēsen ēmin en uiō
on ethēken klēronomon pantōn di ou kai epoiēsen tous aiōnas
os ōn apaugasma tēs doxēs kai charaktēr tēs upostaseōs autou pherōn te ta panta tō rēmati tēs dunameōs autou katharismon tōn amartiōn poiēsamenos ekathisen en dexia tēs megalōsunēs en upsēlois
tosoutō kreittōn genomenos tōn angelōn osō diaphorōteron par autous keklēronomēken onoma
tini gar eipen pote tōn angelōn uios mou ei su egō sēmeron gegennēka se kai palin egō esomai autō eis patera kai autos estai moi eis uion
otan de palin eisagagē ton prōtotokon eis tēn oikoumenēn legei kai proskunēsatōsan autō pantes angeloi theou
dia touto dei perissoterōs prosechein ēmas tois akoustheisin mēpote pararuōmen
ei gar o di angelōn lalētheis logos egeneto bebaios kai pasa parabasis kai parakoē elaben endikon misthapodosian
pōs ēmeis ekpheuxometha tēlikautēs amelēsantes sōtērias ētis archēn labousa laleisthai dia tou kuriou upo tōn akousantōn eis ēmas ebebaiōthē
sunepimarturountos tou theou sēmeiois te kai terasin kai poikilais dunamesin kai pneumatos agiou merismois kata tēn autou thelēsin
ou gar angelois upetaxen tēn oikoumenēn tēn mellousan peri ēs laloumen
diemarturato de pou tis legōn ti estin anthrōpos oti mimnēskē autou ē uios anthrōpou oti episkeptē auton
ēlattōsas auton brachu ti par angelous doxē kai timē estephanōsas auton
panta upetaxas upokatō tōn podōn autou en tō gar upotaxai autō ta panta ouden aphēken autō anupotakton nun de oupō orōmen autō ta panta upotetagmena
ton de brachu ti par angelous ēlattōmenon blepomen iēsoun dia to pathēma tou thanatou doxē kai timē estephanōmenon opōs chariti theou uper pantos geusētai thanatou
eprepen gar autō di on ta panta kai di ou ta panta pollous uious eis doxan agagonta ton archēgon tēs sōtērias autōn dia pathēmatōn teleiōsai
o te gar agiazōn kai oi agiazomenoi ex enos pantes di ēn aitian ouk epaischunetai adelphous autous kalein
legōn apangelō to onoma sou tois adelphois mou en mesō ekklēsias umnēsō se
othen adelphoi agioi klēseōs epouraniou metochoi katanoēsate ton apostolon kai archierea tēs omologias ēmōn iēsoun
piston onta tō poiēsanti auton ōs kai mōusēs en olō tō oikō autou
pleionos gar outos doxēs para mōusēn ēxiōtai kath oson pleiona timēn echei tou oikou o kataskeuasas auton
pas gar oikos kataskeuazetai upo tinos o de panta kataskeuasas theos
kai mōusēs men pistos en olō tō oikō autou ōs therapōn eis marturion tōn lalēthēsomenōn
christos de ōs uios epi ton oikon autou ou oikos esmen ēmeis ean tēn parrēsian kai to kauchēma tēs elpidos mechri telous bebaian kataschōmen
dio kathōs legei to pneuma to agion sēmeron ean tēs phōnēs autou akousēte
mē sklērunēte tas kardias umōn ōs en tō parapikrasmō kata tēn ēmeran tou peirasmou en tē erēmō
phobēthōmen oun mēpote kataleipomenēs epangelias eiselthein eis tēn katapausin autou dokē tis ex umōn usterēkenai
kai gar esmen euēngelismenoi kathaper kakeinoi all ouk ōphelēsen o logos tēs akoēs ekeinous mē sunkekerasmenos tē pistei tois akousasin
eiserchometha gar eis tēn katapausin oi pisteusantes kathōs eirēken ōs ōmosa en tē orgē mou ei eiseleusontai eis tēn katapausin mou kaitoi tōn ergōn apo katabolēs kosmou genēthentōn
eirēken gar pou peri tēs ebdomēs outōs kai katepausen o theos en tē ēmera tē ebdomē apo pantōn tōn ergōn autou
kai en toutō palin ei eiseleusontai eis tēn katapausin mou
epei oun apoleipetai tinas eiselthein eis autēn kai oi proteron euangelisthentes ouk eisēlthon di apeitheian
palin tina orizei ēmeran sēmeron en daueid legōn meta tosouton chronon kathōs proeirētai sēmeron ean tēs phōnēs autou akousēte mē sklērunēte tas kardias umōn
ei gar autous iēsous katepausen ouk an peri allēs elalei meta tauta ēmeras
pas gar archiereus ex anthrōpōn lambanomenos uper anthrōpōn kathistatai ta pros ton theon ina prospherē dōra te kai thusias uper amartiōn
metriopathein dunamenos tois agnoousin kai planōmenois epei kai autos perikeitai astheneian
kai di autēn opheilei kathōs peri tou laou outōs kai peri eautou prospherein peri amartiōn
kai ouch eautō tis lambanei tēn timēn alla kaloumenos upo tou theou kathōsper kai aarōn
outōs kai o christos ouch eauton edoxasen genēthēnai archierea all o lalēsas pros auton uios mou ei su egō sēmeron gegennēka se
kathōs kai en eterō legei su iereus eis ton aiōna kata tēn taxin melchisedek
os en tais ēmerais tēs sarkos autou deēseis te kai iketērias pros ton dunamenon sōzein auton ek thanatou meta kraugēs ischuras kai dakruōn prosenenkas kai eisakoustheis apo tēs eulabeias
kaiper ōn uios emathen aph ōn epathen tēn upakoēn
kai teleiōtheis egeneto pasin tois upakouousin autō aitios sōtērias aiōniou
prosagoreutheis upo tou theou archiereus kata tēn taxin melchisedek
peri ou polus ēmin o logos kai dusermēneutos legein epei nōthroi gegonate tais akoais

kai gar opheilontes einai didaskaloi dia ton chronon palin chreian echete tou didaskein umas tina ta stoicheia tēs archēs tōn logiōn tou theou kai gegonate chreian echontes galaktos ou stereas trophēs
dio aphentes ton tēs archēs tou christou logon epi tēn teleiotēta pherōmetha mē palin themelion kataballomenoi metanoias apo nekrōn ergōn kai pisteōs epi theon
baptismōn didachēs epitheseōs te cheirōn anastaseōs te nekrōn kai krimatos aiōniou
kai touto poiēsomen eanper epitrepē o theos
adunaton gar tous apax phōtisthentas geusamenous te tēs dōreas tēs epouraniou kai metochous genēthentas pneumatos agiou
kai kalon geusamenous theou rēma dunameis te mellontos aiōnos
kai parapesontas palin anakainizein eis metanoian anastaurountas eautois ton uion tou theou kai paradeigmatizontas
gē gar ē piousa ton ep autēs erchomenon pollakis ueton kai tiktousa botanēn eutheton ekeinois di ous kai geōrgeitai metalambanei eulogias apo tou theou
ekpherousa de akanthas kai tribolous adokimos kai kataras engus ēs to telos eis kausin
pepeismetha de peri umōn agapētoi ta kreissona kai echomena sōtērias ei kai outōs laloumen
ou gar adikos o theos epilathesthai tou ergou umōn kai tēs agapēs ēs enedeixasthe eis to onoma autou diakonēsantes tois agiois kai diakonountes
outos gar o melchisedek basileus salēm iereus tou theou tou upsistou o sunantēsas abraam upostrephonti apo tēs kopēs tōn basileōn kai eulogēsas auton
ō kai dekatēn apo pantōn emerisen abraam prōton men ermēneuomenos basileus dikaiosunēs epeita de kai basileus salēm o estin basileus eirēnēs
apatōr amētōr agenealogētos mēte archēn ēmerōn mēte zōēs telos echōn aphōmoiōmenos de tō uiō tou theou menei iereus eis to diēnekes
theōreite de pēlikos outos ō kai dekatēn abraam edōken ek tōn akrothiniōn o patriarchēs
kai oi men ek tōn uiōn leuei tēn ierateian lambanontes entolēn echousin apodekatoun ton laon kata ton nomon tout estin tous adelphous autōn kaiper exelēluthotas ek tēs osphuos abraam
o de mē genealogoumenos ex autōn dedekatōken abraam kai ton echonta tas epangelias eulogēken
chōris de pasēs antilogias to elatton upo tou kreittonos eulogeitai
kai ōde men dekatas apothnēskontes anthrōpoi lambanousin ekei de marturoumenos oti zē
kai ōs epos eipein di abraam kai leueis o dekatas lambanōn dedekatōtai
eti gar en tē osphui tou patros ēn ote sunēntēsen autō melchisedek
ei men oun teleiōsis dia tēs leueitikēs ierōsunēs ēn o laos gar ep autēs nenomothetētai tis eti chreia kata tēn taxin melchisedek eteron anistasthai ierea kai ou kata tēn taxin aarōn legesthai
metatithemenēs gar tēs ierōsunēs ex anankēs kai nomou metathesis ginetai
eph on gar legetai tauta phulēs eteras meteschēken aph ēs oudeis proseschēken tō thusiastēriō
prodēlon gar oti ex iouda anatetalken o kurios ēmōn eis ēn phulēn peri iereōn ouden mōusēs elalēsen
kai perissoteron eti katadēlon estin ei kata tēn omoiotēta melchisedek anistatai iereus eteros
os ou kata nomon entolēs sarkinēs gegonen alla kata dunamin zōēs akatalutou
martureitai gar oti su iereus eis ton aiōna kata tēn taxin melchisedek
kephalaion de epi tois legomenois toiouton echomen archierea os ekathisen en dexia tou thronou tēs megalōsunēs en tois ouranois
tōn agiōn leitourgos kai tēs skēnēs tēs alēthinēs ēn epēxen o kurios ouk anthrōpos
pas gar archiereus eis to prospherein dōra te kai thusias kathistatai othen anankaion echein ti kai touton o prosenenkē
ei men oun ēn epi gēs oud an ēn iereus ontōn tōn prospherontōn kata nomon ta dōra
oitines upodeigmati kai skia latreuousin tōn epouraniōn kathōs kechrēmatistai mōusēs mellōn epitelein tēn skēnēn ora gar phēsin poiēseis panta kata ton tupon ton deichthenta soi en tō orei
nuni de diaphorōteras tetuchen leitourgias osō kai kreittonos estin diathēkēs mesitēs ētis epi kreittosin epangeliais nenomothetētai
ei gar ē prōtē ekeinē ēn amemptos ouk an deuteras ezēteito topos
memphomenos gar autous legei idou ēmerai erchontai legei kurios kai suntelesō epi ton oikon israēl kai epi ton oikon iouda diathēkēn kainēn

ou kata tēn diathēkēn ēn epoiēsa tois patrasin autōn en ēmera epilabomenou mou tēs cheiros autōn exagagein autous ek gēs aiguptou oti autoi ouk enemeinan en tē diathēkē mou kagō ēmelēsa autōn legei kurios
eichen men oun kai ē prōtē dikaiōmata latreias to te agion kosmikon
skēnē gar kateskeuasthē ē prōtē en ē ē te luchnia kai ē trapeza kai ē prothesis tōn artōn ētis legetai agia
meta de to deuteron katapetasma skēnē ē legomenē agia agiōn
chrusoun echousa thumiatērion kai tēn kibōton tēs diathēkēs perikekalummenēn pantothen chrusiō en ē stamnos chrusē echousa to manna kai ē rabdos aarōn ē blastēsasa kai ai plakes tēs diathēkēs
uperanō de autēs cheroubein doxēs kataskiazonta to ilastērion peri ōn ouk estin nun legein kata meros
toutōn de outōs kateskeuasmenōn eis men tēn prōtēn skēnēn diapantos eisiasin oi iereis tas latreias epitelountes
eis de tēn deuteran apax tou eniautou monos o archiereus ou chōris aimatos o prospherei uper eautou kai tōn tou laou agnoēmatōn
touto dēlountos tou pneumatos tou agiou mēpō pephanerōsthai tēn tōn agiōn odon eti tēs prōtēs skēnēs echousēs stasin
ētis parabolē eis ton kairon ton enestēkota kath ēn dōra te kai thusiai prospherontai mē dunamenai kata suneidēsin teleiōsai ton latreuonta
monon epi brōmasin kai pomasin kai diaphorois baptismois dikaiōmata sarkos mechri kairou diorthōseōs epikeimena
christos de paragenomenos archiereus tōn mellontōn agathōn dia tēs meizonos kai teleioteras skēnēs ou cheiropoiētou tout estin ou tautēs tēs ktiseōs
oude di aimatos tragōn kai moschōn dia de tou idiou aimatos eisēlthen ephapax eis ta agia aiōnian lutrōsin euramenos
ei gar to aima tragōn kai taurōn kai spodos damaleōs rantizousa tous kekoinōmenous agiazei pros tēn tēs sarkos katharotēta
posō mallon to aima tou christou os dia pneumatos aiōniou eauton prosēnenken amōmon tō theō kathariei tēn suneidēsin umōn apo nekrōn ergōn eis to latreuein theō zōnti
kai dia touto diathēkēs kainēs mesitēs estin opōs thanatou genomenou eis apolutrōsin tōn epi tē prōtē diathēkē parabaseōn tēn epangelian labōsin oi keklēmenoi tēs aiōniou klēronomias
opou gar diathēkē thanaton anankē pheresthai tou diathemenou
diathēkē gar epi nekrois bebaia epei mēpote ischuei ote zē o diathemenos
othen oud ē prōtē chōris aimatos enkekainistai
lalētheisēs gar pasēs entolēs kata nomon upo mōuseōs panti tō laō labōn to aima tōn moschōn kai tōn tragōn meta udatos kai eriou kokkinou kai ussōpou auto te to biblion kai panta ton laon erantisen
legōn touto to aima tēs diathēkēs ēs eneteilato pros umas o theos
skian gar echōn o nomos tōn mellontōn agathōn ouk autēn tēn eikona tōn pragmatōn kat eniauton tais autais thusiais ais prospherousin eis to diēnekes oudepote dunatai tous proserchomenous teleiōsai
epei ouk an epausanto prospheromenai dia to mēdemian echein eti suneidēsin amartiōn tous latreuontas apax kekatharismenous
all en autais anamnēsis amartiōn kat eniauton
adunaton gar aima taurōn kai tragōn aphairein amartias
dio eiserchomenos eis ton kosmon legei thusian kai prosphoran ouk ēthelēsas sōma de katērtisō moi
olokautōmata kai peri amartias ouk ēudokēsas
tote eipon idou ēkō en kephalidi bibliou gegraptai peri emou tou poiēsai o theos to thelēma sou
anōteron legōn oti thusias kai prosphoras kai olokautōmata kai peri amartias ouk ēthelēsas oude ēudokēsas aitines kata nomon prospherontai
tote eirēken idou ēkō tou poiēsai to thelēma sou anairei to prōton ina to deuteron stēsē
en ō thelēmati ēgiasmenoi esmen dia tēs prosphoras tou sōmatos iēsou christou ephapax
kai pas men iereus estēken kath ēmeran leitourgōn kai tas autas pollakis prospherōn thusias aitines oudepote dunantai perielein amartias
outos de mian uper amartiōn prosenenkas thusian eis to diēnekes ekathisen en dexia tou theou
to loipon ekdechomenos eōs tethōsin oi echthroi autou upopodion tōn podōn autou
mia gar prosphora teteleiōken eis to diēnekes tous agiazomenous
marturei de ēmin kai to pneuma to agion meta gar to eirēkenai
autē ē diathēkē ēn diathēsomai pros autous meta tas ēmeras ekeinas legei kurios didous nomous mou epi kardias autōn kai epi tēn dianoian autōn epigrapsō autous
kai tōn amartiōn autōn kai tōn anomiōn autōn ou mē mnēsthēsomai eti
opou de aphesis toutōn ouketi prosphora peri amartias
estin de pistis elpizomenōn upostasis pragmatōn elenchos ou blepomenōn
en tautē gar emarturēthēsan oi presbuteroi
pistei nooumen katērtisthai tous aiōnas rēmati theou eis to mē ek phainomenōn to blepomenon gegonenai
pistei pleiona thusian abel para kain prosēnenken tō theō di ēs emarturēthē einai dikaios marturountos epi tois dōrois autou tou theou kai di autēs apothanōn eti lalei
pistei enōch metetethē tou mē idein thanaton kai ouch ēurisketo dioti metethēken auton o theos pro gar tēs metatheseōs memarturētai euarestēkenai tō theō
chōris de pisteōs adunaton euarestēsai pisteusai gar dei ton proserchomenon theō oti estin kai tois ekzētousin auton misthapodotēs ginetai
pistei chrēmatistheis nōe peri tōn mēdepō blepomenōn eulabētheis kateskeuasen kibōton eis sōtērian tou oikou autou di ēs katekrinen ton kosmon kai tēs kata pistin dikaiosunēs egeneto klēronomos
toigaroun kai ēmeis tosouton echontes perikeimenon ēmin nephos marturōn onkon apothemenoi panta kai tēn euperistaton amartian di upomonēs trechōmen ton prokeimenon ēmin agōna
aphorōntes eis ton tēs pisteōs archēgon kai teleiōtēn iēsoun os anti tēs prokeimenēs autō charas upemeinen stauron aischunēs kataphronēsas en dexia te tou thronou tou theou kekathiken
analogisasthe gar ton toiautēn upomemenēkota upo tōn amartōlōn eis eauton antilogian ina mē kamēte tais psuchais umōn ekluomenoi
oupō mechris aimatos antikatestēte pros tēn amartian antagōnizomenoi
kai eklelēsthe tēs paraklēseōs ētis umin ōs uiois dialegetai uie mou mē oligōrei paidias kuriou mēde ekluou up autou elenchomenos
on gar agapa kurios paideuei mastigoi de panta uion on paradechetai
eis paidian upomenete ōs uiois umin prospheretai o theos tis gar uios on ou paideuei patēr
ei de chōris este paidias ēs metochoi gegonasin pantes ara nothoi kai ouch uioi este
tēs philoxenias mē epilanthanesthe dia tautēs gar elathon tines xenisantes angelous
mimnēskesthe tōn desmiōn ōs sundedemenoi tōn kakouchoumenōn ōs kai autoi ontes en sōmati
timios o gamos en pasin kai ē koitē amiantos pornous gar kai moichous krinei o theos
aphilarguros o tropos arkoumenoi tois parousin autos gar eirēken ou mē se anō oud ou mē se enkataleipō
ōste tharrountas ēmas legein kurios emoi boēthos ou phobēthēsomai ti poiēsei moi anthrōpos

name: ΙΑΚΩΒΟΥ
chapters: iakōbos theou kai kuriou iēsou christou doulos tais dōdeka phulais tais en tē diaspora chairein
pasan charan ēgēsasthe adelphoi mou otan peirasmois peripesēte poikilois
ginōskontes oti to dokimion umōn tēs pisteōs katergazetai upomonēn
ē de upomonē ergon teleion echetō ina ēte teleioi kai oloklēroi en mēdeni leipomenoi
ei de tis umōn leipetai sophias aiteitō para tou didontos theou pasin aplōs kai mē oneidizontos kai dothēsetai autō
aiteitō de en pistei mēden diakrinomenos o gar diakrinomenos eoiken kludōni thalassēs anemizomenō kai ripizomenō
mē gar oiesthō o anthrōpos ekeinos oti lēmpsetai ti para tou kuriou
anēr dipsuchos akatastatos en pasais tais odois autou
kauchasthō de o adelphos o tapeinos en tō upsei autou
o de plousios en tē tapeinōsei autou oti ōs anthos chortou pareleusetai
aneteilen gar o ēlios sun tō kausōni kai exēranen ton chorton kai to anthos autou exepesen kai ē euprepeia tou prosōpou autou apōleto outōs kai o plousios en tais poreiais autou maranthēsetai
makarios anēr os upomenei peirasmon oti dokimos genomenos lēmpsetai ton stephanon tēs zōēs on epēngeilato tois agapōsin auton
mēdeis peirazomenos legetō oti apo theou peirazomai o gar theos apeirastos estin kakōn peirazei de autos oudena
ekastos de peirazetai upo tēs idias epithumias exelkomenos kai deleazomenos
eita ē epithumia sullabousa tiktei amartian ē de amartia apotelestheisa apokuei thanaton
pasa dosis agathē kai pan dōrēma teleion anōthen estin katabainon apo tou patros tōn phōtōn par ō ouk eni parallagē ē tropēs aposkiasma
boulētheis apekuēsen ēmas logō alētheias eis to einai ēmas aparchēn tina tōn autou ktismatōn
iste adelphoi mou agapētoi estō de pas anthrōpos tachus eis to akousai bradus eis to lalēsai bradus eis orgēn
orgē gar andros dikaiosunēn theou ouk ergazetai
dio apothemenoi pasan ruparian kai perisseian kakias en prautēti dexasthe ton emphuton logon ton dunamenon sōsai tas psuchas umōn
ginesthe de poiētai logou kai mē monon akroatai paralogizomenoi eautous
oti ei tis akroatēs logou estin kai ou poiētēs outos eoiken andri katanoounti to prosōpon tēs geneseōs autou en esoptrō
katenoēsen gar eauton kai apelēluthen kai eutheōs epelatheto opoios ēn
o de parakupsas eis nomon teleion ton tēs eleutherias kai parameinas ouk akroatēs epilēsmonēs genomenos alla poiētēs ergou outos makarios en tē poiēsei autou estai
ei tis dokei thrēskos einai mē chalinagōgōn glōssan autou alla apatōn kardian autou toutou mataios ē thrēskia
thrēskia kathara kai amiantos para theō kai patri autē estin episkeptesthai orphanous kai chēras en tē thlipsei autōn aspilon eauton tērein apo tou kosmou
adelphoi mou mē en prosōpolēmpsiais echete tēn pistin tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou tēs doxēs
ean gar eiselthē eis sunagōgēn umōn anēr chrusodaktulios en esthēti lampra eiselthē de kai ptōchos en rupara esthēti
kai epiblepsēte epi ton phorounta tēn esthēta tēn lampran kai eipēte su kathou ōde kalōs kai tō ptōchō eipēte su stēthi ekei ē kathou upo to upopodion mou
ou diekrithēte en eautois kai egenesthe kritai dialogismōn ponērōn
akousate adelphoi mou agapētoi ouch o theos exelexato tous ptōchous tō kosmō plousious en pistei kai klēronomous tēs basileias ēs epēngeilato tois agapōsin auton
umeis de ētimasate ton ptōchon ouch oi plousioi katadunasteuousin umas kai autoi elkousin umas eis kritēria
ouk autoi blasphēmousin to kalon onoma to epiklēthen eph umas
ei mentoi nomon teleite basilikon kata tēn graphēn agapēseis ton plēsion sou ōs seauton kalōs poieite
ei de prosōpolēmpteite amartian ergazesthe elenchomenoi upo tou nomou ōs parabatai
ostis gar olon ton nomon tērēsē ptaisē de en eni gegonen pantōn enochos
o gar eipōn mē moicheusēs eipen kai mē phoneusēs ei de ou moicheueis phoneueis de gegonas parabatēs nomou
outōs laleite kai outōs poieite ōs dia nomou eleutherias mellontes krinesthai
ē gar krisis aneleos tō mē poiēsanti eleos katakauchatai eleos kriseōs
ti to ophelos adelphoi mou ean pistin legē tis echein erga de mē echē mē dunatai ē pistis sōsai auton
ean adelphos ē adelphē gumnoi uparchōsin kai leipomenoi tēs ephēmerou trophēs
eipē de tis autois ex umōn upagete en eirēnē thermainesthe kai chortazesthe mē dōte de autois ta epitēdeia tou sōmatos ti to ophelos
outōs kai ē pistis ean mē echē erga nekra estin kath eautēn
all erei tis su pistin echeis kagō erga echō deixon moi tēn pistin sou chōris tōn ergōn kagō soi deixō ek tōn ergōn mou tēn pistin
su pisteueis oti eis estin o theos kalōs poieis kai ta daimonia pisteuousin kai phrissousin
theleis de gnōnai ō anthrōpe kene oti ē pistis chōris tōn ergōn argē estin
abraam o patēr ēmōn ouk ex ergōn edikaiōthē anenenkas isaak ton uion autou epi to thusiastērion
blepeis oti ē pistis sunērgei tois ergois autou kai ek tōn ergōn ē pistis eteleiōthē
mē polloi didaskaloi ginesthe adelphoi mou eidotes oti meizon krima lēmpsometha
polla gar ptaiomen apantes ei tis en logō ou ptaiei outos teleios anēr dunatos chalinagōgēsai kai olon to sōma
ei de tōn ippōn tous chalinous eis ta stomata ballomen eis to peithesthai autous ēmin kai olon to sōma autōn metagomen
idou kai ta ploia tēlikauta onta kai upo anemōn sklērōn elaunomena metagetai upo elachistou pēdaliou opou ē ormē tou euthunontos bouletai
outōs kai ē glōssa mikron melos estin kai megala auchei idou ēlikon pur ēlikēn ulēn anaptei
ē glōssa pur o kosmos tēs adikias ē glōssa kathistatai en tois melesin ēmōn ē spilousa olon to sōma kai phlogizousa ton trochon tēs geneseōs kai phlogizomenē upo tēs geennēs
pasa gar phusis thēriōn te kai peteinōn erpetōn te kai enaliōn damazetai kai dedamastai tē phusei tē anthrōpinē
tēn de glōssan oudeis dunatai anthrōpōn damasai akatastaton kakon mestē iou thanatēphorou
en autē eulogoumen ton kurion kai patera kai en autē katarōmetha tous anthrōpous tous kath omoiōsin theou gegonotas
ek tou autou stomatos exerchetai eulogia kai katara ou chrē adelphoi mou tauta outōs ginesthai
mēti ē pēgē ek tēs autēs opēs bruei to gluku kai to pikron
mē dunatai adelphoi mou sukē elaias poiēsai ē ampelos suka oute alukon gluku poiēsai udōr
tis sophos kai epistēmōn en umin deixatō ek tēs kalēs anastrophēs ta erga autou en prautēti sophias
ei de zēlon pikron echete kai eritheian en tē kardia umōn mē katakauchasthe tēs alētheias kai pseudesthe
ouk estin autē ē sophia anōthen katerchomenē alla epigeios psuchikē daimoniōdēs
opou gar zēlos kai eritheia ekei akatastasia kai pan phaulon pragma
ē de anōthen sophia prōton men agnē estin epeita eirēnikē epieikēs eupeithēs mestē eleous kai karpōn agathōn adiakritos anupokritos
karpos de dikaiosunēs en eirēnē speiretai tois poiousin eirēnēn
pothen polemoi kai pothen machai en umin ouk enteuthen ek tōn ēdonōn umōn tōn strateuomenōn en tois melesin umōn
epithumeite kai ouk echete phoneuete kai zēloute kai ou dunasthe epituchein machesthe kai polemeite ouk echete dia to mē aiteisthai umas
aiteite kai ou lambanete dioti kakōs aiteisthe ina en tais ēdonais umōn dapanēsēte
moichalides ouk oidate oti ē philia tou kosmou echthra estin tō theō os ean oun boulēthē philos einai tou kosmou echthros tou theou kathistatai
ē dokeite oti kenōs ē graphē legei pros phthonon epipothei to pneuma o katōkisen en ēmin
meizona de didōsin charin dio legei o theos uperēphanois antitassetai tapeinois de didōsin charin
upotagēte oun tō theō antistēte de tō diabolō kai pheuxetai aph umōn
engisate tō theō kai engiei umin katharisate cheiras amartōloi kai agnisate kardias dipsuchoi
talaipōrēsate kai penthēsate kai klausate o gelōs umōn eis penthos metatrapētō kai ē chara eis katēpheian
tapeinōthēte enōpion kuriou kai upsōsei umas
mē katalaleite allēlōn adelphoi o katalalōn adelphou ē krinōn ton adelphon autou katalalei nomou kai krinei nomon ei de nomon krineis ouk ei poiētēs nomou alla kritēs
eis estin o nomothetēs kai kritēs o dunamenos sōsai kai apolesai su de tis ei o krinōn ton plēsion
age nun oi legontes sēmeron ē aurion poreusometha eis tēnde tēn polin kai poiēsomen ekei eniauton kai emporeusometha kai kerdēsomen
oitines ouk epistasthe to tēs aurion poia gar ē zōē umōn atmis gar este ē pros oligon phainomenē epeita kai aphanizomenē
anti tou legein umas ean o kurios thelēsē kai zēsomen kai poiēsomen touto ē ekeino
nun de kauchasthe en tais alazoniais umōn pasa kauchēsis toiautē ponēra estin
eidoti oun kalon poiein kai mē poiounti amartia autō estin
age nun oi plousioi klausate ololuzontes epi tais talaipōriais umōn tais eperchomenais
o ploutos umōn sesēpen kai ta imatia umōn sētobrōta gegonen
o chrusos umōn kai o arguros katiōtai kai o ios autōn eis marturion umin estai kai phagetai tas sarkas umōn ōs pur ethēsaurisate en eschatais ēmerais
idou o misthos tōn ergatōn tōn amēsantōn tas chōras umōn o aphusterēmenos aph umōn krazei kai ai boai tōn therisantōn eis ta ōta kuriou sabaōth eiselēluthan
etruphēsate epi tēs gēs kai espatalēsate ethrepsate tas kardias umōn en ēmera sphagēs
katedikasate ephoneusate ton dikaion ouk antitassetai umin
makrothumēsate oun adelphoi eōs tēs parousias tou kuriou idou o geōrgos ekdechetai ton timion karpon tēs gēs makrothumōn ep autō eōs labē proimon kai opsimon
makrothumēsate kai umeis stērixate tas kardias umōn oti ē parousia tou kuriou ēngiken
mē stenazete kat allēlōn adelphoi ina mē krithēte idou o kritēs pro tōn thurōn estēken
upodeigma labete adelphoi tēs kakopatheias kai tēs makrothumias tous prophētas oi elalēsan en tō onomati kuriou
idou makarizomen tous upomeinantas tēn upomonēn iōb ēkousate kai to telos kuriou eidete oti polusplanchnos estin o kurios kai oiktirmōn
pro pantōn de adelphoi mou mē omnuete mēte ton ouranon mēte tēn gēn mēte allon tina orkon ētō de umōn to nai nai kai to ou ou ina mē upo krisin pesēte
kakopathei tis en umin proseuchesthō euthumei tis psalletō
asthenei tis en umin proskalesasthō tous presbuterous tēs ekklēsias kai proseuxasthōsan ep auton aleipsantes elaiō en tō onomati tou kuriou
kai ē euchē tēs pisteōs sōsei ton kamnonta kai egerei auton o kurios kan amartias ē pepoiēkōs aphethēsetai autō
exomologeisthe oun allēlois tas amartias kai euchesthe uper allēlōn opōs iathēte polu ischuei deēsis dikaiou energoumenē
ēleias anthrōpos ēn omoiopathēs ēmin kai proseuchē prosēuxato tou mē brexai kai ouk ebrexen epi tēs gēs eniautous treis kai mēnas ex
kai palin prosēuxato kai o ouranos edōken ueton kai ē gē eblastēsen ton karpon autēs
adelphoi mou ean tis en umin planēthē apo tēs alētheias kai epistrepsē tis auton
ginōsketō oti o epistrepsas amartōlon ek planēs odou autou sōsei psuchēn autou ek thanatou kai kalupsei plēthos amartiōneidoti oun kalon poiein kai mē poiounti amartia autō estin

name: ΠΕΤΡΟΥ Α΄
chapters: petros apostolos iēsou christou eklektois parepidēmois diasporas pontou galatias kappadokias asias kai bithunias
kata prognōsin theou patros en agiasmō pneumatos eis upakoēn kai rantismon aimatos iēsou christou charis umin kai eirēnē plēthuntheiē
eulogētos o theos kai patēr tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou o kata to polu autou eleos anagennēsas ēmas eis elpida zōsan di anastaseōs iēsou christou ek nekrōn
eis klēronomian aphtharton kai amianton kai amaranton tetērēmenēn en ouranois eis umas
tous en dunamei theou phrouroumenous dia pisteōs eis sōtērian etoimēn apokaluphthēnai en kairō eschatō
en ō agalliasthe oligon arti ei deon lupēthentes en poikilois peirasmois
ina to dokimion umōn tēs pisteōs polutimoteron chrusiou tou apollumenou dia puros de dokimazomenou eurethē eis epainon kai doxan kai timēn en apokalupsei iēsou christou
on ouk idontes agapate eis on arti mē orōntes pisteuontes de agalliasthe chara aneklalētō kai dedoxasmenē
komizomenoi to telos tēs pisteōs umōn sōtērian psuchōn
peri ēs sōtērias exezētēsan kai exēraunēsan prophētai oi peri tēs eis umas charitos prophēteusantes
eraunōntes eis tina ē poion kairon edēlou to en autois pneuma christou promarturomenon ta eis christon pathēmata kai tas meta tauta doxas
ois apekaluphthē oti ouch eautois umin de diēkonoun auta a nun anēngelē umin dia tōn euangelisamenōn umas en pneumati agiō apostalenti ap ouranou eis a epithumousin angeloi parakupsai
dio anazōsamenoi tas osphuas tēs dianoias umōn nēphontes teleiōs elpisate epi tēn pheromenēn umin charin en apokalupsei iēsou christou
ōs tekna upakoēs mē suschēmatizomenoi tais proteron en tē agnoia umōn epithumiais
alla kata ton kalesanta umas agion kai autoi agioi en pasē anastrophē genēthēte
dioti gegraptai agioi esesthe dioti egō agios
kai ei patera epikaleisthe ton aprosōpolēmptōs krinonta kata to ekastou ergon en phobō ton tēs paroikias umōn chronon anastraphēte
eidotes oti ou phthartois arguriō ē chrusiō elutrōthēte ek tēs mataias umōn anastrophēs patroparadotou
apothemenoi oun pasan kakian kai panta dolon kai upokriseis kai phthonous kai pasas katalalias
ōs artigennēta brephē to logikon adolon gala epipothēsate ina en autō auxēthēte eis sōtērian
ei egeusasthe oti chrēstos o kurios
pros on proserchomenoi lithon zōnta upo anthrōpōn men apodedokimasmenon para de theō eklekton entimon
kai autoi ōs lithoi zōntes oikodomeisthe oikos pneumatikos eis ierateuma agion anenenkai pneumatikas thusias euprosdektous theō dia iēsou christou
dioti periechei en graphē idou tithēmi en siōn lithon akrogōniaion eklekton entimon kai o pisteuōn ep autō ou mē kataischunthē
umin oun ē timē tois pisteuousin apistousin de lithon on apedokimasan oi oikodomountes outos egenēthē eis kephalēn gōnias
kai lithos proskommatos kai petra skandalou oi proskoptousin tō logō apeithountes eis o kai etethēsan
umeis de genos eklekton basileion ierateuma ethnos agion laos eis peripoiēsin opōs tas aretas exangeilēte tou ek skotous umas kalesantos eis to thaumaston autou phōs
oi pote ou laos nun de laos theou oi ouk ēleēmenoi nun de eleēthentes
agapētoi parakalō ōs paroikous kai parepidēmous apechesthai tōn sarkikōn epithumiōn aitines strateuontai kata tēs psuchēs
tēn anastrophēn umōn en tois ethnesin echontes kalēn ina en ō katalalousin umōn ōs kakopoiōn ek tōn kalōn ergōn epopteuontes doxasōsin ton theon en ēmera episkopēs
upotagēte pasē anthrōpinē ktisei dia ton kurion eite basilei ōs uperechonti
eite ēgemosin ōs di autou pempomenois eis ekdikēsin kakopoiōn epainon de agathopoiōn
oti outōs estin to thelēma tou theou agathopoiountas phimoun tēn tōn aphronōn anthrōpōn agnōsian
ōs eleutheroi kai mē ōs epikalumma echontes tēs kakias tēn eleutherian all ōs theou douloi
pantas timēsate tēn adelphotēta agapate ton theon phobeisthe ton basilea timate
oi oiketai upotassomenoi en panti phobō tois despotais ou monon tois agathois kai epieikesin alla kai tois skoliois
touto gar charis ei dia suneidēsin theou upopherei tis lupas paschōn adikōs
poion gar kleos ei amartanontes kai kolaphizomenoi upomeneite all ei agathopoiountes kai paschontes upomeneite touto charis para theō
eis touto gar eklēthēte oti kai christos epathen uper umōn umin upolimpanōn upogrammon ina epakolouthēsēte tois ichnesin autou
os amartian ouk epoiēsen oude eurethē dolos en tō stomati autou
os loidoroumenos ouk anteloidorei paschōn ouk ēpeilei paredidou de tō krinonti dikaiōs
os tas amartias ēmōn autos anēnenken en tō sōmati autou epi to xulon ina tais amartiais apogenomenoi tē dikaiosunē zēsōmen ou tō mōlōpi iathēte
ēte gar ōs probata planōmenoi all epestraphēte nun epi ton poimena kai episkopon tōn psuchōn umōn
omoiōs gunaikes upotassomenai tois idiois andrasin ina kai ei tines apeithousin tō logō dia tēs tōn gunaikōn anastrophēs aneu logou kerdēthēsontai
epopteusantes tēn en phobō agnēn anastrophēn umōn
ōn estō ouch o exōthen emplokēs trichōn kai peritheseōs chrusiōn ē enduseōs imatiōn kosmos
all o kruptos tēs kardias anthrōpos en tō aphthartō tou praeōs kai ēsuchiou pneumatos o estin enōpion tou theou poluteles
outōs gar pote kai ai agiai gunaikes ai elpizousai eis theon ekosmoun eautas upotassomenai tois idiois andrasin
ōs sarra upēkousen tō abraam kurion auton kalousa ēs egenēthēte tekna agathopoiousai kai mē phoboumenai mēdemian ptoēsin
oi andres omoiōs sunoikountes kata gnōsin ōs asthenesterō skeuei tō gunaikeiō aponemontes timēn ōs kai sunklēronomois charitos zōēs eis to mē enkoptesthai tas proseuchas umōn
to de telos pantes omophrones sumpatheis philadelphoi eusplanchnoi tapeinophrones
mē apodidontes kakon anti kakou ē loidorian anti loidorias tounantion de eulogountes oti eis touto eklēthēte ina eulogian klēronomēsēte
o gar thelōn zōēn agapan kai idein ēmeras agathas pausatō tēn glōssan apo kakou kai cheilē tou mē lalēsai dolon
ekklinatō de apo kakou kai poiēsatō agathon zētēsatō eirēnēn kai diōxatō autēn
oti ophthalmoi kuriou epi dikaious kai ōta autou eis deēsin autōn prosōpon de kuriou epi poiountas kaka
kai tis o kakōsōn umas ean tou agathou zēlōtai genēsthe
all ei kai paschoite dia dikaiosunēn makarioi ton de phobon autōn mē phobēthēte mēde tarachthēte
kurion de ton christon agiasate en tais kardiais umōn etoimoi aei pros apologian panti tō aitounti umas logon peri tēs en umin elpidos alla meta prautētos kai phobou
suneidēsin echontes agathēn ina en ō katalaleisthe kataischunthōsin oi epēreazontes umōn tēn agathēn en christō anastrophēn
kreitton gar agathopoiountas ei theloi to thelēma tou theou paschein ē kakopoiountas
oti kai christos apax peri amartiōn apethanen dikaios uper adikōn ina umas prosagagē tō theō thanatōtheis men sarki zōopoiētheis de pneumati
en ō kai tois en phulakē pneumasin poreutheis ekēruxen
apeithēsasin pote ote apexedecheto ē tou theou makrothumia en ēmerais nōe kataskeuazomenēs kibōtou eis ēn oligoi tout estin oktō psuchai diesōthēsan di udatos
o kai umas antitupon nun sōzei baptisma ou sarkos apothesis rupou alla suneidēseōs agathēs eperōtēma eis theon di anastaseōs iēsou christou
os estin en dexia theou poreutheis eis ouranon upotagentōn autō angelōn kai exousiōn kai dunameōn
christou oun pathontos sarki kai umeis tēn autēn ennoian oplisasthe oti o pathōn sarki pepautai amartias
eis to mēketi anthrōpōn epithumiais alla thelēmati theou ton epiloipon en sarki biōsai chronon
arketos gar o parelēluthōs chronos to boulēma tōn ethnōn kateirgasthai peporeumenous en aselgeiais epithumiais oinophlugiais kōmois potois kai athemitois eidōlolatriais
en ō xenizontai mē suntrechontōn umōn eis tēn autēn tēs asōtias anachusin blasphēmountes
oi apodōsousin logon tō etoimōs echonti krinai zōntas kai nekrous
eis touto gar kai nekrois euēngelisthē ina krithōsin men kata anthrōpous sarki zōsi de kata theon pneumati
pantōn de to telos ēngiken sōphronēsate oun kai nēpsate eis proseuchas
pro pantōn tēn eis eautous agapēn ektenē echontes oti agapē kaluptei plēthos amartiōn
ekastos kathōs elaben charisma eis eautous auto diakonountes ōs kaloi oikonomoi poikilēs charitos theou
ei tis lalei ōs logia theou ei tis diakonei ōs ex ischuos ēs chorēgei o theos ina en pasin doxazētai o theos dia iēsou christou ō estin ē doxa kai to kratos eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn amēn
agapētoi mē xenizesthe tē en umin purōsei pros peirasmon umin ginomenē ōs xenou umin sumbainontos
alla katho koinōneite tois tou christou pathēmasin chairete ina kai en tē apokalupsei tēs doxēs autou charēte agalliōmenoi
ei oneidizesthe en onomati christou makarioi oti to tēs doxēs kai to tou theou pneuma eph umas anapauetai
mē gar tis umōn paschetō ōs phoneus ē kleptēs ē kakopoios ē ōs allotriepiskopos
ei de ōs christianos mē aischunesthō doxazetō de ton theon en tō onomati toutō
presbuterous oun tous en umin parakalō o sumpresbuteros kai martus tōn tou christou pathēmatōn o kai tēs mellousēs apokaluptesthai doxēs koinōnos
poimanate to en umin poimnion tou theou mē anankastōs alla ekousiōs kata theon mēde aischrokerdōs alla prothumōs
mēd ōs katakurieuontes tōn klērōn alla tupoi ginomenoi tou poimniou
kai phanerōthentos tou archipoimenos komieisthe ton amarantinon tēs doxēs stephanon
omoiōs neōteroi upotagēte presbuterois pantes de allēlois tēn tapeinophrosunēn enkombōsasthe oti o theos uperēphanois antitassetai tapeinois de didōsin charin
tapeinōthēte oun upo tēn krataian cheiran tou theou ina umas upsōsē en kairō
pasan tēn merimnan umōn epiripsantes ep auton oti autō melei peri umōn
nēpsate grēgorēsate o antidikos umōn diabolos ōs leōn ōruomenos peripatei zētōn katapiein
ō antistēte stereoi tē pistei eidotes ta auta tōn pathēmatōn tē en tō kosmō umōn adelphotēti epiteleisthai
o de theos pasēs charitos o kalesas umas eis tēn aiōnion autou doxan en christō oligon pathontas autos katartisei stērixei sthenōsei themeliōsei
autō to kratos eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn amēn
dia silouanou umin tou pistou adelphou ōs logizomai di oligōn egrapsa parakalōn kai epimarturōn tautēn einai alēthē charin tou theou eis ēn stēte
aspazetai umas ē en babulōni suneklektē kai markos o uios mou
aspasasthe allēlous en philēmati agapēs eirēnē umin pasin tois en christōōste kai oi paschontes kata to thelēma tou theou pistō ktistē paratithesthōsan tas psuchas autōn en agathopoiia

name: ΠΕΤΡΟΥ Β΄
chapters: sumeōn petros doulos kai apostolos iēsou christou tois isotimon ēmin lachousin pistin en dikaiosunē tou theou ēmōn kai sōtēros iēsou christou
charis umin kai eirēnē plēthuntheiē en epignōsei tou theou kai iēsou tou kuriou ēmōn
ōs panta ēmin tēs theias dunameōs autou ta pros zōēn kai eusebeian dedōrēmenēs dia tēs epignōseōs tou kalesantos ēmas idia doxē kai aretē
di ōn ta timia ēmin kai megista epangelmata dedōrētai ina dia toutōn genēsthe theias koinōnoi phuseōs apophugontes tēs en tō kosmō en epithumia phthoras
kai auto touto de spoudēn pasan pareisenenkantes epichorēgēsate en tē pistei umōn tēn aretēn en de tē aretē tēn gnōsin
en de tē gnōsei tēn enkrateian en de tē enkrateia tēn upomonēn en de tē upomonē tēn eusebeian
en de tē eusebeia tēn philadelphian en de tē philadelphia tēn agapēn
tauta gar umin uparchonta kai pleonazonta ouk argous oude akarpous kathistēsin eis tēn tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou epignōsin
ō gar mē parestin tauta tuphlos estin muōpazōn lēthēn labōn tou katharismou tōn palai autou amartēmatōn
dio mallon adelphoi spoudasate bebaian umōn tēn klēsin kai eklogēn poieisthai tauta gar poiountes ou mē ptaisēte pote
outōs gar plousiōs epichorēgēthēsetai umin ē eisodos eis tēn aiōnion basileian tou kuriou ēmōn kai sōtēros iēsou christou
dio mellēsō aei umas upomimnēskein peri toutōn kaiper eidotas kai estērigmenous en tē parousē alētheia
dikaion de ēgoumai eph oson eimi en toutō tō skēnōmati diegeirein umas en upomnēsei
eidōs oti tachinē estin ē apothesis tou skēnōmatos mou kathōs kai o kurios ēmōn iēsous christos edēlōsen moi
spoudasō de kai ekastote echein umas meta tēn emēn exodon tēn toutōn mnēmēn poieisthai
ou gar sesophismenois muthois exakolouthēsantes egnōrisamen umin tēn tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou dunamin kai parousian all epoptai genēthentes tēs ekeinou megaleiotētos
labōn gar para theou patros timēn kai doxan phōnēs enechtheisēs autō toiasde upo tēs megaloprepous doxēs outos estin o uios mou o agapētos eis on egō eudokēsa

egenonto de kai pseudoprophētai en tō laō ōs kai en umin esontai pseudodidaskaloi oitines pareisaxousin aireseis apōleias kai ton agorasanta autous despotēn arnoumenoi epagontes eautois tachinēn apōleian
kai polloi exakolouthēsousin autōn tais aselgeiais di ous ē odos tēs alētheias blasphēmēthēsetai
kai en pleonexia plastois logois umas emporeusontai ois to krima ekpalai ouk argei kai ē apōleia autōn ou nustazei
ei gar o theos angelōn amartēsantōn ouk epheisato alla sirois zophou tartarōsas paredōken eis krisin tēroumenous
kai archaiou kosmou ouk epheisato alla ogdoon nōe dikaiosunēs kēruka ephulaxen kataklusmon kosmō asebōn epaxas
kai poleis sodomōn kai gomorras tephrōsas katastrophē katekrinen upodeigma mellontōn asebein tetheikōs
kai dikaion lōt kataponoumenon upo tēs tōn athesmōn en aselgeia anastrophēs errusato
blemmati gar kai akoē o dikaios enkatoikōn en autois ēmeran ex ēmeras psuchēn dikaian anomois ergois ebasanizen
oiden kurios eusebeis ek peirasmou ruesthai adikous de eis ēmeran kriseōs kolazomenous tērein
malista de tous opisō sarkos en epithumia miasmou poreuomenous kai kuriotētos kataphronountas tolmētai authadeis doxas ou tremousin blasphēmountes
opou angeloi ischui kai dunamei meizones ontes ou pherousin kat autōn para kuriō blasphēmon krisin
outoi de ōs aloga zōa gegennēmena phusika eis alōsin kai phthoran en ois agnoousin blasphēmountes en tē phthora autōn kai phtharēsontai
komioumenoi misthon adikias ēdonēn ēgoumenoi tēn en ēmera truphēn spiloi kai mōmoi entruphōntes en tais apatais autōn suneuōchoumenoi umin
ophthalmous echontes mestous moichalidos kai akatapaustous amartias deleazontes psuchas astēriktous kardian gegumnasmenēn pleonexias echontes kataras tekna
kataleipontes eutheian odon eplanēthēsan exakolouthēsantes tē odō tou balaam tou bosor os misthon adikias ēgapēsen
elegxin de eschen idias paranomias upozugion aphōnon en anthrōpou phōnē phthegxamenon ekōlusen tēn tou prophētou paraphronian
outoi eisin pēgai anudroi kai omichlai upo lailapos elaunomenai ois o zophos tou skotous tetērētai
tautēn ēdē agapētoi deuteran umin graphō epistolēn en ais diegeirō umōn en upomnēsei tēn eilikrinē dianoian
mnēsthēnai tōn proeirēmenōn rēmatōn upo tōn agiōn prophētōn kai tēs tōn apostolōn umōn entolēs tou kuriou kai sōtēros
touto prōton ginōskontes oti eleusontai ep eschatōn tōn ēmerōn en empaigmonē empaiktai kata tas idias autōn epithumias poreuomenoi
kai legontes pou estin ē epangelia tēs parousias autou aph ēs gar oi pateres ekoimēthēsan panta outōs diamenei ap archēs ktiseōs
lanthanei gar autous touto thelontas oti ouranoi ēsan ekpalai kai gē ex udatos kai di udatos sunestōsa tō tou theou logō
di ōn o tote kosmos udati kataklustheis apōleto
oi de nun ouranoi kai ē gē tō autō logō tethēsaurismenoi eisin puri tēroumenoi eis ēmeran kriseōs kai apōleias tōn asebōn anthrōpōn
en de touto mē lanthanetō umas agapētoi oti mia ēmera para kuriō ōs chilia etē kai chilia etē ōs ēmera mia
ou bradunei kurios tēs epangelias ōs tines bradutēta ēgountai alla makrothumei di umas mē boulomenos tinas apolesthai alla pantas eis metanoian chōrēsai
ēxei de ēmera kuriou ōs kleptēs en ē oi ouranoi roizēdon pareleusontai stoicheia de kausoumena luthēsetai kai gē kai ta en autē erga katakaēsetai
toutōn oun pantōn luomenōn potapous dei uparchein umas en agiais anastrophais kai eusebeiais

name: ΙΩΑΝΝΟΥ Α΄
chapters: o ēn ap archēs o akēkoamen o eōrakamen tois ophthalmois ēmōn o etheasametha kai ai cheires ēmōn epsēlaphēsan peri tou logou tēs zōēs
kai ē zōē ephanerōthē kai eōrakamen kai marturoumen kai apangellomen umin tēn zōēn tēn aiōnion ētis ēn pros ton patera kai ephanerōthē ēmin
o eōrakamen kai akēkoamen apangellomen kai umin ina kai umeis koinōnian echēte meth ēmōn kai ē koinōnia de ē ēmetera meta tou patros kai meta tou uiou autou iēsou christou
kai tauta graphomen ēmeis ina ē chara ēmōn ē peplērōmenē
kai estin autē ē angelia ēn akēkoamen ap autou kai anangellomen umin oti o theos phōs estin kai skotia en autō ouk estin oudemia
ean eipōmen oti koinōnian echomen met autou kai en tō skotei peripatōmen pseudometha kai ou poioumen tēn alētheian
ean de en tō phōti peripatōmen ōs autos estin en tō phōti koinōnian echomen met allēlōn kai to aima iēsou tou uiou autou katharizei ēmas apo pasēs amartias
ean eipōmen oti amartian ouk echomen eautous planōmen kai ē alētheia ouk estin en ēmin
ean omologōmen tas amartias ēmōn pistos estin kai dikaios ina aphē ēmin tas amartias kai katharisē ēmas apo pasēs adikias
ean eipōmen oti ouch ēmartēkamen pseustēn poioumen auton kai o logos autou ouk estin en ēmin
teknia mou tauta graphō umin ina mē amartēte kai ean tis amartē paraklēton echomen pros ton patera iēsoun christon dikaion
kai autos ilasmos estin peri tōn amartiōn ēmōn ou peri tōn ēmeterōn de monon alla kai peri olou tou kosmou
kai en toutō ginōskomen oti egnōkamen auton ean tas entolas autou tērōmen
o legōn oti egnōka auton kai tas entolas autou mē tērōn pseustēs estin kai en toutō ē alētheia ouk estin
os d an tērē autou ton logon alēthōs en toutō ē agapē tou theou teteleiōtai en toutō ginōskomen oti en autō esmen
o legōn en autō menein opheilei kathōs ekeinos periepatēsen kai autos outōs peripatein
agapētoi ouk entolēn kainēn graphō umin all entolēn palaian ēn eichete ap archēs ē entolē ē palaia estin o logos on ēkousate
palin entolēn kainēn graphō umin o estin alēthes en autō kai en umin oti ē skotia paragetai kai to phōs to alēthinon ēdē phainei
o legōn en tō phōti einai kai ton adelphon autou misōn en tē skotia estin eōs arti
o agapōn ton adelphon autou en tō phōti menei kai skandalon ouk estin en autō
o de misōn ton adelphon autou en tē skotia estin kai en tē skotia peripatei kai ouk oiden pou upagei oti ē skotia etuphlōsen tous ophthalmous autou
graphō umin teknia oti apheōntai umin ai amartiai dia to onoma autou
graphō umin pateres oti egnōkate ton ap archēs graphō umin neaniskoi oti nenikēkate ton ponēron egrapsa umin paidia oti egnōkate ton patera
egrapsa umin pateres oti egnōkate ton ap archēs egrapsa umin neaniskoi oti ischuroi este kai o logos tou theou en umin menei kai nenikēkate ton ponēron
mē agapate ton kosmon mēde ta en tō kosmō ean tis agapa ton kosmon ouk estin ē agapē tou patros en autō
oti pan to en tō kosmō ē epithumia tēs sarkos kai ē epithumia tōn ophthalmōn kai ē alazonia tou biou ouk estin ek tou patros all ek tou kosmou estin
kai o kosmos paragetai kai ē epithumia autou o de poiōn to thelēma tou theou menei eis ton aiōna
paidia eschatē ōra estin kai kathōs ēkousate oti antichristos erchetai kai nun antichristoi polloi gegonasin othen ginōskomen oti eschatē ōra estin
ex ēmōn exēlthan all ouk ēsan ex ēmōn ei gar ēsan ex ēmōn memenēkeisan an meth ēmōn all ina phanerōthōsin oti ouk eisin pantes ex ēmōn
kai umeis chrisma echete apo tou agiou kai oidate pantes
ouk egrapsa umin oti ouk oidate tēn alētheian all oti oidate autēn kai oti pan pseudos ek tēs alētheias ouk estin
tis estin o pseustēs ei mē o arnoumenos oti iēsous ouk estin o christos outos estin o antichristos o arnoumenos ton patera kai ton uion
idete potapēn agapēn dedōken ēmin o patēr ina tekna theou klēthōmen kai esmen dia touto o kosmos ou ginōskei ēmas oti ouk egnō auton
agapētoi nun tekna theou esmen kai oupō ephanerōthē ti esometha oidamen oti ean phanerōthē omoioi autō esometha oti opsometha auton kathōs estin
kai pas o echōn tēn elpida tautēn ep autō agnizei eauton kathōs ekeinos agnos estin
pas o poiōn tēn amartian kai tēn anomian poiei kai ē amartia estin ē anomia
kai oidate oti ekeinos ephanerōthē ina tas amartias arē kai amartia en autō ouk estin
pas o en autō menōn ouch amartanei pas o amartanōn ouch eōraken auton oude egnōken auton
teknia mēdeis planatō umas o poiōn tēn dikaiosunēn dikaios estin kathōs ekeinos dikaios estin
o poiōn tēn amartian ek tou diabolou estin oti ap archēs o diabolos amartanei eis touto ephanerōthē o uios tou theou ina lusē ta erga tou diabolou
pas o gegennēmenos ek tou theou amartian ou poiei oti sperma autou en autō menei kai ou dunatai amartanein oti ek tou theou gegennētai
en toutō phanera estin ta tekna tou theou kai ta tekna tou diabolou pas o mē poiōn dikaiosunēn ouk estin ek tou theou kai o mē agapōn ton adelphon autou
oti autē estin ē angelia ēn ēkousate ap archēs ina agapōmen allēlous
ou kathōs kain ek tou ponērou ēn kai esphaxen ton adelphon autou kai charin tinos esphaxen auton oti ta erga autou ponēra ēn ta de tou adelphou autou dikaia
kai mē thaumazete adelphoi ei misei umas o kosmos
ēmeis oidamen oti metabebēkamen ek tou thanatou eis tēn zōēn oti agapōmen tous adelphous o mē agapōn menei en tō thanatō
pas o misōn ton adelphon autou anthrōpoktonos estin kai oidate oti pas anthrōpoktonos ouk echei zōēn aiōnion en eautō menousan
en toutō egnōkamen tēn agapēn oti ekeinos uper umōn tēn psuchēn autou ethēken kai ēmeis opheilomen uper tōn adelphōn tas psuchas theinai
os d an echē ton bion tou kosmou kai theōrē ton adelphon autou chreian echonta kai kleisē ta splanchna autou ap autou pōs ē agapē tou theou menei en autō
teknia mē agapōmen logō mēde tē glōssē alla en ergō kai alētheia
kai en toutō gnōsometha oti ek tēs alētheias esmen kai emprosthen autou peisomen tas kardias ēmōn
oti ean kataginōskē ēmōn ē kardia oti meizōn estin o theos tēs kardias ēmōn kai ginōskei panta
agapētoi ean ē kardia ēmōn mē kataginōskē ēmōn parrēsian echomen pros ton theon
kai o ean aitōmen lambanomen ap autou oti tas entolas autou tēroumen kai ta aresta enōpion autou poioumen
kai autē estin ē entolē autou ina pisteusōmen tō onomati tou uiou autou iēsou christou kai agapōmen allēlous kathōs edōken entolēn ēmin
kai o tērōn tas entolas autou en autō menei kai autos en autō kai en toutō ginōskomen oti menei en ēmin ek tou pneumatos ou ēmin edōken
agapētoi mē panti pneumati pisteuete alla dokimazete ta pneumata ei ek tou theou estin oti polloi pseudoprophētai exelēluthasin eis ton kosmon
en toutō ginōskete to pneuma tou theou pan pneuma o omologei iēsoun christon en sarki elēluthota ek tou theou estin
kai pan pneuma o mē omologei ton iēsoun ek tou theou ouk estin kai touto estin to tou antichristou o akēkoate oti erchetai kai nun en tō kosmō estin ēdē
umeis ek tou theou este teknia kai nenikēkate autous oti meizōn estin o en umin ē o en tō kosmō
autoi ek tou kosmou eisin dia touto ek tou kosmou lalousin kai o kosmos autōn akouei
ēmeis ek tou theou esmen o ginōskōn ton theon akouei ēmōn os ouk estin ek tou theou ouk akouei ēmōn ek toutou ginōskomen to pneuma tēs alētheias kai to pneuma tēs planēs
pas o pisteuōn oti iēsous estin o christos ek tou theou gegennētai kai pas o agapōn ton gennēsanta agapa kai ton gegennēmenon ex autou
en toutō ginōskomen oti agapōmen ta tekna tou theou otan ton theon agapōmen kai tas entolas autou poiōmen
autē gar estin ē agapē tou theou ina tas entolas autou tērōmen kai ai entolai autou bareiai ouk eisin
oti pan to gegennēmenon ek tou theou nika ton kosmon kai autē estin ē nikē ē nikēsasa ton kosmon ē pistis ēmōn
tis estin o nikōn ton kosmon ei mē o pisteuōn oti iēsous estin o uios tou theou
outos estin o elthōn di udatos kai aimatos iēsous christos ouk en tō udati monon all en tō udati kai en tō aimati kai to pneuma estin to marturoun oti to pneuma estin ē alētheia
to pneuma kai to udōr kai to aima kai oi treis eis to en eisin
ei tēn marturian tōn anthrōpōn lambanomen ē marturia tou theou meizōn estin oti autē estin ē marturia tou theou oti memarturēken peri tou uiou autou
o pisteuōn eis ton uion tou theou echei tēn marturian en autō o mē pisteuōn tō theō pseustēn pepoiēken auton oti ou pepisteuken eis tēn marturian ēn memarturēken o theos peri tou uiou autou
kai autē estin ē marturia oti zōēn aiōnion edōken ēmin o theos kai autē ē zōē en tō uiō autou estin
o echōn ton uion echei tēn zōēn o mē echōn ton uion tou theou tēn zōēn ouk echei
tauta egrapsa umin ina eidēte oti zōēn echete aiōnion tois pisteuousin eis to onoma tou uiou tou theou
kai autē estin ē parrēsia ēn echomen pros auton oti ean ti aitōmetha kata to thelēma autou akouei ēmōn
kai ean oidamen oti akouei ēmōn o ean aitōmetha oidamen oti echomen ta aitēmata a ētēkamen ap autou
ean tis idē ton adelphon autou amartanonta amartian mē pros thanaton aitēsei kai dōsei autō zōēn tois amartanousin mē pros thanaton estin amartia pros thanaton ou peri ekeinēs legō ina erōtēsē
pasa adikia amartia estin kai estin amartia ou pros thanaton
oidamen oti pas o gegennēmenos ek tou theou ouch amartanei all o gennētheis ek tou theou tērei auton kai o ponēros ouch aptetai autou
oidamen oti ek tou theou esmen kai o kosmos olos en tō ponērō keitai
oidamen de oti o uios tou theou ēkei kai dedōken ēmin dianoian ina ginōskomen ton alēthinon kai esmen en tō alēthinō en tō uiō autou iēsou christō outos estin o alēthinos theos kai zōē aiōnios
teknia phulaxate eauta apo tōn eidōlōnkai tautēn tēn entolēn echomen ap autou ina o agapōn ton theon agapa kai ton adelphon autou

name: ΙΩΑΝΝΟΥ Β΄
chapters: o presbuteros eklektē kuria kai tois teknois autēs ous egō agapō en alētheia kai ouk egō monos alla kai pantes oi egnōkotes tēn alētheian
dia tēn alētheian tēn menousan en ēmin kai meth ēmōn estai eis ton aiōna
estai meth ēmōn charis eleos eirēnē para theou patros kai para iēsou christou tou uiou tou patros en alētheia kai agapē
echarēn lian oti eurēka ek tōn teknōn sou peripatountas en alētheia kathōs entolēn elabomen para tou patros
kai nun erōtō se kuria ouch ōs entolēn kainēn graphōn soi alla ēn eichamen ap archēs ina agapōmen allēlous
kai autē estin ē agapē ina peripatōmen kata tas entolas autou autē ē entolē estin kathōs ēkousate ap archēs ina en autē peripatēte
oti polloi planoi exēlthan eis ton kosmon oi mē omologountes iēsoun christon erchomenon en sarki outos estin o planos kai o antichristos
blepete eautous ina mē apolesēte a eirgasasetha alla misthon plērē apolabēte
pas o proagōn kai mē menōn en tē didachē tou christou theon ouk echei o menōn en tē didachē outos kai ton patera kai ton uion echei
ei tis erchetai pros umas kai tautēn tēn didachēn ou pherei mē lambanete auton eis oikian kai chairein autō mē legete
o legōn gar autō chairein koinōnei tois ergois autou tois ponērois
polla echōn umin graphein ouk eboulēthēn dia chartou kai melanos alla elpizō genesthai pros umas kai stoma pros stoma lalēsai ina ē chara ēmōn peplērōmenē ē
aspazetai se ta tekna tēs adelphēs sou tēs eklektēsteknia phulaxate eauta apo tōn eidōlōn

name: ΙΩΑΝΝΟΥ Γ΄
chapters: o presbuteros gaiō tō agapētō on egō agapō en alētheia
agapēte peri pantōn euchomai se euodousthai kai ugiainein kathōs euodoutai sou ē psuchē
echarēn lian erchomenōn adelphōn kai marturountōn sou tē alētheia kathōs su en alētheia peripateis
meizoteran toutōn ouk echō charan ina akouō ta ema tekna en tē alētheia peripatounta
agapēte piston poieis o ean ergasē eis tous adelphous kai touto xenous
oi emarturēsan sou tē agapē enōpion ekklēsias ous kalōs poiēseis propempsas axiōs tou theou
uper gar tou onomatos exēlthan mēden lambanontes apo tōn ethnikōn
ēmeis oun opheilomen upolambanein tous toioutous ina sunergoi ginōmetha tē alētheia
egrapsa ti tē ekklēsia all o philoprōteuōn autōn diotrephēs ouk epidechetai ēmas

dia touto ean elthō upomnēsō autou ta erga a poiei logois ponērois phluarōn ēmas kai mē arkoumenos epi toutois oute autos epidechetai tous adelphous kai tous boulomenous kōluei kai tēs ekklēsias ekballei
agapēte mē mimou to kakon alla to agathon o agathopoiōn ek tou theou estin o kakopoiōn ouch eōraken ton theon
dēmētriō memarturētai upo pantōn kai upo autēs tēs alētheias kai ēmeis de marturoumen kai oidas oti ē marturia ēmōn alēthēs estin
polla eichon grapsai soi all ou thelō dia melanos kai kalamou soi graphein
elpizō de eutheōs se idein kai stoma pros stoma lalēsomen (15) eirēnē soi aspazontai se oi philoi aspazou tous philous kat onomaaspazetai se ta tekna tēs adelphēs sou tēs eklektēs

name: ΙΟΥΔΑ
chapters: ioudas iēsou christou doulos adelphos de iakōbou tois en theō patri ēgapēmenois kai iēsou christō tetērēmenois klētois
eleos umin kai eirēnē kai agapē plēthuntheiē
agapētoi pasan spoudēn poioumenos graphein umin peri tēs koinēs ēmōn sōtērias anankēn eschon grapsai umin parakalōn epagōnizesthai tē apax paradotheisē tois agiois pistei

pareiseduēsan gar tines anthrōpoi oi palai progegrammenoi eis touto to krima asebeis tēn tou theou ēmōn charita metatithentes eis aselgeian kai ton monon despotēn kai kurion ēmōn iēsoun christon arnoumenoi
upomnēsai de umas boulomai eidotas apax panta oti kurios laon ek gēs aiguptou sōsas to deuteron tous mē pisteusantes apōlesen
angelous te tous mē tērēsantas tēn eautōn archēn alla apolipontas to idion oikētērion eis krisin megalēs ēmeras desmois aidiois upo zophon tetērēken
ōs sodoma kai gomorra kai ai peri autas poleis ton omoion tropon toutois ekporneusasai kai apelthousai opisō sarkos eteras prokeintai deigma puros aiōniou dikēn upechousai
omoiōs mentoi kai outoi enupniazomenoi sarka men miainousin kuriotēta de athetousin doxas de blasphēmousin
o de michaēl o archangelos ote tō diabolō diakrinomenos dielegeto peri tou mōuseōs sōmatos ouk etolmēsen krisin epenenkein blasphēmias alla eipen epitimēsai soi kurios
outoi de osa men ouk oidasin blasphēmousin osa de phusikōs ōs ta aloga zōa epistantai en toutois phtheirontai
ouai autois oti tē odō tou kain eporeuthēsan kai tē planē tou balaam misthou exechuthēsan kai tē antilogia tou kore apōlonto
outoi eisin oi en tais agapais umōn spilades suneuōchoumenoi aphobōs eautous poimainontes nephelai anudroi upo anemōn parapheromenai dendra phthinopōrina akarpa dis apothanonta ekrizōthenta
kumata agria thalassēs epaphrizonta tas eautōn aischunas asteres planētai ois o zophos tou skotous eis aiōna tetērētai
eprophēteusen de kai toutois ebdomos apo adam enōch legōn idou ēlthen kurios en agiais muriasin autou
poiēsai krisin kata pantōn kai elegxai pantas tous asebeis autōn peri pantōn tōn ergōn asebeias autōn ōn ēsebēsan kai peri pantōn tōn sklērōn logōn ōn elalēsan kat autou amartōloi asebeis
outoi eisin gongustai mempsimoiroi kata tas epithumias autōn poreuomenoi kai to stoma autōn lalei uperonka thaumazontes prosōpa ōpheleias charin
umeis de agapētoi mnēsthēte tōn rēmatōn tōn proeirēmenōn upo tōn apostolōn tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou
oti elegon umin ep eschatou tou chronou esontai empaiktai kata tas eautōn epithumias poreuomenoi tōn asebeiōn
outoi eisin oi apodiorizontes psuchikoi pneuma mē echontes
umeis de agapētoi epoikodomountes eautous tē agiōtatē umōn pistei en pneumati agiō proseuchomenoi
eautous en agapē theou tērēsate prosdechomenoi to eleos tou kuriou ēmōn iēsou christou eis zōēn aiōnion
ous de sōzete ek puros arpazontes ous de eleate en phobō misountes kai ton apo tēs sarkos espilōmenon chitōna
tō de dunamenō phulaxai umas aptaistous kai stēsai katenōpion tēs doxēs autou amōmous en agalliasei

monō theō sōtēri ēmōn dia iēsou christou tou kuriou ēmōn doxa megalōsunē kratos kai exousia pro pantos tou aiōnos kai nun kai eis pantas tous aiōnas amēnelpizō de eutheōs se idein kai stoma pros stoma lalēsomen

name: ΑΠΟΚΑΛΥΨΙΣ ΙΩΑΝΝΟΥ
chapters: apokalupsis iēsou christou ēn edōken autō o theos deixai tois doulois autou a dei genesthai en tachei kai esēmanen aposteilas dia tou angelou autou tō doulō autou iōannē
os emarturēsen ton logon tou theou kai tēn marturian iēsou christou osa iden
makarios o anaginōskōn kai oi akouontes ton logon tēs prophēteias kai tērountes ta en autē gegrammena o gar kairos engus
iōannēs tais epta ekklēsiais tais en tē asia charis umin kai eirēnē apo o ōn kai o ēn kai o erchomenos kai apo tōn epta pneumatōn a enōpion tou thronou autou
kai apo iēsou christou o martus o pistos o prōtotokos tōn nekrōn kai o archōn tōn basileōn tēs gēs tō agapōnti ēmas kai lusanti ēmas ek tōn amartiōn ēmōn en tō aimati autou
kai epoiēsen ēmas basileian iereis tō theō kai patri autou autō ē doxa kai to kratos eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn amēn
idou erchetai meta tōn nephelōn kai opsetai auton pas ophthalmos kai oitines auton exekentēsan kai kopsontai ep auton pasai ai phulai tēs gēs nai amēn
egō eimi to alpha kai to ō legei kurios o theos o ōn kai o ēn kai o erchomenos o pantokratōr
egō iōannēs o adelphos umōn kai sunkoinōnos en tē thlipsei kai basileia kai upomonē en iēsou egenomēn en tē nēsō tē kaloumenē patmō dia ton logon tou theou kai dia tēn marturian iēsou
egenomēn en pneumati en tē kuriakē ēmera kai ēkousa opisō mou phōnēn megalēn ōs salpingos
legousēs o blepeis grapson eis biblion kai pempson tais epta ekklēsiais eis epheson kai eis smurnan kai eis pergamon kai eis thuateira kai eis sardeis kai eis philadelphian kai eis laodikian
kai epestrepsa blepein tēn phōnēn ētis elalei met emou kai epistrepsas eidon epta luchnias chrusas
kai en mesō tōn luchniōn omoion uion anthrōpou endedumenon podērē kai periezōsmenon pros tois masthois zōnēn chrusan
ē de kephalē autou kai ai triches leukai ōs erion leukon ōs chiōn kai oi ophthalmoi autou ōs phlox puros
kai oi podes autou omoioi chalkolibanō ōs en kaminō pepurōmenēs kai ē phōnē autou ōs phōnē udatōn pollōn
kai echōn en tē dexia cheiri autou asteras epta kai ek tou stomatos autou romphaia distomos oxeia ekporeuomenē kai ē opsis autou ōs o ēlios phainei en tē dunamei autou
kai ote eidon auton epesa pros tous podas autou ōs nekros kai ethēken tēn dexian autou ep eme legōn mē phobou egō eimi o prōtos kai o eschatos
kai o zōn kai egenomēn nekros kai idou zōn eimi eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn kai echō tas kleis tou thanatou kai tou adou
grapson oun a eides kai a eisin kai a mellei genesthai meta tauta
to mustērion tōn epta asterōn ous eides epi tēs dexias mou kai tas epta luchnias tas chrusas oi epta asteres angeloi tōn epta ekklēsiōn eisin kai ai luchniai ai epta epta ekklēsiai eisin
tō angelō tēs en ephesō ekklēsias grapson tade legei o kratōn tous epta asteras en tē dexia autou o peripatōn en mesō tōn epta luchniōn tōn chrusōn
oida ta erga sou kai ton kopon kai tēn upomonēn sou kai oti ou dunē bastasai kakous kai epeirasas tous legontas eautous apostolous kai ouk eisin kai eures autous pseudeis
kai upomonēn echeis kai ebastasas dia to onoma mou kai ou kekopiakes
alla echō kata sou oti tēn agapēn sou tēn prōtēn aphēkes
mnēmoneue oun pothen peptōkes kai metanoēson kai ta prōta erga poiēson ei de mē erchomai soi kai kinēsō tēn luchnian sou ek tou topou autēs ean mē metanoēsēs
alla touto echeis oti miseis ta erga tōn nikolaitōn a kagō misō
o echōn ous akousatō ti to pneuma legei tais ekklēsiais tō nikōnti dōsō autō phagein ek tou xulou tēs zōēs o estin en tō paradeisō tou theou
kai tō angelō tēs en smurnē ekklēsias grapson tade legei o prōtos kai o eschatos os egeneto nekros kai ezēsen
oida sou tēn thlipsin kai tēn ptōcheian alla plousios ei kai tēn blasphēmian ek tōn legontōn ioudaious einai eautous kai ouk eisin alla sunagōgē tou satana
mēden phobou a melleis paschein idou mellei balein o diabolos ex umōn eis phulakēn ina peirasthēte kai exete thlipsin ēmerōn deka ginou pistos achri thanatou kai dōsō soi ton stephanon tēs zōēs
o echōn ous akousatō ti to pneuma legei tais ekklēsiais o nikōn ou mē adikēthē ek tou thanatou tou deuterou
kai tō angelō tēs en pergamō ekklēsias grapson tade legei o echōn tēn romphaian tēn distomon tēn oxeian
oida pou katoikeis opou o thronos tou satana kai krateis to onoma mou kai ouk ērnēsō tēn pistin mou en tais ēmerais anteipas o martus mou o pistos mou os apektanthē par umin opou o satanas katoikei
all echō kata sou oliga oti echeis ekei kratountas tēn didachēn balaam os edidasken tō balak balein skandalon enōpion tōn uiōn israēl phagein eidōlothuta kai porneusai
outōs echeis kai su kratountas tēn didachēn tōn nikolaitōn omoiōs
metanoēson ei de mē erchomai soi tachu kai polemēsō met autōn en tē romphaia tou stomatos mou

o echōn ous akousatō ti to pneuma legei tais ekklēsiais tō nikounti dōsō autō tou manna tou kekrummenou kai dōsō autō psēphon leukēn kai epi tēn psēphon onoma kainon gegrammenon o oudeis oiden ei mē o lambanōn
kai tō angelō tēs en thuateirois ekklēsias grapson tade legei o uios tou theou o echōn tous ophthalmous autou ōs phlox puros kai oi podes autou omoioi chalkolibanō
oida sou ta erga kai tēn agapēn kai tēn pistin kai tēn diakonian kai tēn upomonēn kai ta erga sou ta eschata pleiona tōn prōtōn
alla echō kata sou oti apheis tēn gunaika iezabel ē legousa autēn prophētin kai didaskei kai plana tous emous doulous porneusai kai phagein eidōlothuta
kai edōka autē chronon ina metanoēsē kai ou thelei metanoēsai ek tēs porneias autēs
idou ballō autēn eis klinēn kai tous moicheuontas met autēs eis thlipsin megalēn ean mē metanoēsousin ek tōn ergōn autēs
kai ta tekna autēs apoktenō en thanatō kai gnōsontai pasai ai ekklēsiai oti egō eimi o eraunōn nephrous kai kardias kai dōsō umin ekastō kata ta erga umōn
umin de legō tois loipois tois en thuateirois osoi ouk echousin tēn didachēn tautēn oitines ouk egnōsan ta bathea tou satana ōs legousin ou ballō eph umas allo baros
plēn o echete kratēsate achri ou an ēxō
kai o nikōn kai o tērōn achri telous ta erga mou dōsō autō exousian epi tōn ethnōn
kai poimanei autous en rabdō sidēra ōs ta skeuē ta keramika suntribetai ōs kagō eilēpha para tou patros mou
kai dōsō autō ton astera ton prōinon
o echōn ous akousatō ti to pneuma legei tais ekklēsiais
kai tō angelō tēs en sardesin ekklēsias grapson tade legei o echōn ta epta pneumata tou theou kai tous epta asteras oida sou ta erga oti onoma echeis oti zēs kai nekros ei
ginou grēgorōn kai stērison ta loipa a emellon apothanein ou gar eurēka sou ta erga peplērōmena enōpion tou theou mou
mnēmoneue oun pōs eilēphas kai ēkousas kai tērei kai metanoēson ean oun mē grēgorēsēs ēxō ōs kleptēs kai ou mē gnōsē poian ōran ēxō epi se
alla oliga echeis onomata en sardesin a ouk emolunan ta imatia autōn kai peripatēsousin met emou en leukois oti axioi eisin
o nikōn outōs peribaleitai en imatiois leukois kai ou mē exaleipsō to onoma autou ek tēs biblou tēs zōēs kai omologēsō to onoma autou enōpion tou patros mou kai enōpion tōn angelōn autou
o echōn ous akousatō ti to pneuma legei tais ekklēsiais
kai tō angelō tēs en philadelphia ekklēsias grapson tade legei o agios o alēthinos o echōn tēn klein daueid o anoigōn kai oudeis kleisei kai kleiōn kai oudeis anoixei
oida sou ta erga idou dedōka enōpion sou thuran ēneōgmenēn ēn oudeis dunatai kleisai autēn oti mikran echeis dunamin kai etērēsas mou ton logon kai ouk ērnēsō to onoma mou

idou didō ek tēs sunagōgēs tou satana tōn legontōn eautous ioudaious einai kai ouk eisin alla pseudontai idou poiēsō autous ina ēxousin kai proskunēsousin enōpion tōn podōn sou kai gnōsin oti egō ēgapēsa se
oti etērēsas ton logon tēs upomonēs mou kagō se tērēsō ek tēs ōras tou peirasmou tēs mellousēs erchesthai epi tēs oikoumenēs olēs peirasai tous katoikountas epi tēs gēs
erchomai tachu kratei o echeis ina mēdeis labē ton stephanon sou

o nikōn poiēsō auton stulon en tō naō tou theou mou kai exō ou mē exelthē eti kai grapsō ep auton to onoma tou theou mou kai to onoma tēs poleōs tou theou mou tēs kainēs ierousalēm ē katabainousa ek tou ouranou apo tou theou mou kai to onoma mou to kainon
o echōn ous akousatō ti to pneuma legei taisekklēsiais
kai tō angelō tēs en laodikia ekklēsias grapson tade legei o amēn o martus o pistos kai alēthinos ē archē tēs ktiseōs tou theou
oida sou ta erga oti oute psuchros ei oute zestos ophelon psuchros ēs ē zestos
outōs oti chliaros ei kai oute zestos oute psuchros mellō se emesai ek tou stomatos mou
oti legeis oti plousios eimi kai peploutēka kai ouden chreian echō kai ouk oidas oti su ei o talaipōros kai eleeinos kai ptōchos kai tuphlos kai gumnos

sumbouleuō soi agorasai par emou chrusion pepurōmenon ek puros ina ploutēsēs kai imatia leuka ina peribalē kai mē phanerōthē ē aischunē tēs gumnotētos sou kai kollurion enchrisai tous ophthalmous sou ina blepēs
egō osous ean philō elenchō kai paideuō zēleue oun kai metanoēson
idou estēka epi tēn thuran kai krouō ean tis akousē tēs phōnēs mou kai anoixē tēn thuran kai eiseleusomai pros auton kai deipnēsō met autou kai autos met emou
o nikōn dōsō autō kathisai met emou en tō thronō mou ōs kagō enikēsa kai ekathisa meta tou patros mou en tō thronō autou
o echōn ous akousatō ti to pneuma legei tais ekklēsiais
meta tauta idon kai idou thura ēneōgmenē en tō ouranō kai ē phōnē ē prōtē ēn ēkousa ōs salpingos lalousēs met emou legōn anaba ōde kai deixō soi a dei genesthai meta tauta
eutheōs egenomēn en pneumati kai idou thronos ekeito en tō ouranō kai epi ton thronon kathēmenos
kai o kathēmenos omoios orasei lithō iaspidi kai sardiō kai iris kuklothen tou thronou omoios orasei smaragdinō
kai kuklothen tou thronou thronous eikosi tessaras kai epi tous thronous eikosi tessaras presbuterous kathēmenous peribeblēmenous en imatiois leukois kai epi tas kephalas autōn stephanous chrusous
kai ek tou thronou ekporeuontai astrapai kai phōnai kai brontai kai epta lampades puros kaiomenai enōpion tou thronou a eisin ta epta pneumata tou theou
kai enōpion tou thronou ōs thalassa ualinē omoia krustallō kai en mesō tou thronou kai kuklō tou thronou tessara zōa gemonta ophthalmōn emprosthen kai opisthen
kai to zōon to prōton omoion leonti kai to deuteron zōon omoion moschō kai to triton zōon echōn to prosōpon ōs anthrōpou kai to tetarton zōon omoion aetō petomenō

kai ta tessera zōa en kath en autōn echōn ana pterugas ex kuklothen kai esōthen gemousin ophthalmōn kai anapausin ouk echousin ēmeras kai nuktos legontes agios agios agios o theos o pantokratōr o ēn kai o ōn kai o erchomenos
kai otan dōsousin ta zōa doxan kai timēn kai eucharistian tō kathēmenō epi tō thronō tō zōnti eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn
pesountai oi eikosi tessares presbuteroi enōpion tou kathēmenou epi tou thronou kai proskunēsousin tō zōnti eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn kai balousin tous stephanous autōn enōpion tou thronou legontes
axios ei o kurios kai o theos ēmōn labein tēn doxan kai tēn timēn kai tēn dunamin oti su ektisas ta panta kai dia to thelēma sou ēsan kai ektisthēsan
kai eidon epi tēn dexian tou kathēmenou epi tou thronou biblion gegrammenon esōthen kai opisthen katesphragismenon sphragisin epta
kai eidon angelon ischuron kērussonta en phōnē megalē tis axios anoixai to biblion kai lusai tas sphragidas autou
kai oudeis edunato en tō ouranō oute epi tēs gēs oute upokatō tēs gēs anoixai to biblion oute blepein auto
kai eklaion polu oti oudeis axios eurethē anoixai to biblion oute blepein auto
kai eis ek tōn presbuterōn legei moi mē klaie idou enikēsen o leōn o ek tēs phulēs iouda ē riza daueid anoixai to biblion kai tas epta sphragidas autou

kai eidon en mesō tou thronou kai tōn tessarōn zōōn kai en mesō tōn presbuterōn arnion estēkōs ōs esphagmenon echōn kerata epta kai ophthalmous epta oi eisin ta epta pneumata tou theou apestalmena eis pasan tēn gēn
kai ēlthen kai eilēphen ek tēs dexias tou kathēmenou epi tou thronou

kai ote elaben to biblion ta tessara zōa kai oi eikosi tessares presbuteroi epesan enōpion tou arniou echontes ekastos kitharan kai phialas chrusas gemousas thumiamatōn ai eisin ai proseuchai tōn agiōn
kai adousin ōdēn kainēn legontes axios ei labein to biblion kai anoixai tas sphragidas autou oti esphagēs kai ēgorasas tō theō en tō aimati sou ek pasēs phulēs kai glōssēs kai laou kai ethnous
kai epoiēsas autous tō theō ēmōn basileian kai iereis kai basileusousin epi tēs gēs
kai eidon kai ēkousa ōs phōnēn angelōn pollōn kuklō tou thronou kai tōn zōōn kai tōn presbuterōn kai ēn o arithmos autōn muriades muriadōn kai chiliades chiliadōn
legontes phōnē megalē axios estin to arnion to esphagmenon labein tēn dunamin kai plouton kai sophian kai ischun kai timēn kai doxan kai eulogian

kai pan ktisma o en tō ouranō kai epi tēs gēs kai upokatō tēs gēs kai epi tēs thalassēs kai ta en autois panta kai ēkousa legontas tō kathēmenō epi tō thronō kai tō arniō ē eulogia kai ē timē kai ē doxa kai to kratos eis tous aiōnas tōn aiōnōn
kai ta tessara zōa elegon amēn kai oi presbuteroi epesan kai prosekunēsan
kai eidon ote ēnoixen to arnion mian ek tōn epta sphragidōn kai ēkousa enos ek tōn tessarōn zōōn legontos ōs phōnē brontēs erchou
kai idon kai idou ippos leukos kai o kathēmenos ep auton echōn toxon kai edothē autō stephanos kai exēlthen nikōn kai ina nikēsē
kai ote ēnoixen tēn sphragida tēn deuteran ēkousa tou deuterou zōou legontos erchou
kai exēlthen allos ippos purros kai tō kathēmenō ep auton edothē autō labein tēn eirēnēn ek tēs gēs kai ina allēlous sphaxousin kai edothē autō machaira megalē
kai ote ēnoixen tēn sphragida tēn tritēn ēkousa tou tritou zōou legontos erchou kai idon kai idou ippos melas kai o kathēmenos ep auton echōn zugon en tē cheiri autou
kai ēkousa ōs phōnēn en mesō tōn tessarōn zōōn legousan choinix sitou dēnariou kai treis choinikes krithōn dēnariou kai to elaion kai ton oinon mē adikēsēs
kai ote ēnoixen tēn sphragida tēn tetartēn ēkousa phōnēn tou tetartou zōou legontos erchou
